desc-817406: "Codename: Dream Core" is a dream-themed cooperative adventure social game. Players can send characters as dreamers into the realm of dreams to find treasures. They can survive, hunt for treasures, and evacuate with their partners to bring out precious dream relics and reveal the secret of the dream owner. If you are also interested in Chinese ghost stories or dream themes, you can join our QQ group and discuss the game with us. We will share the latest game progress and development ideas in the group~
desc-744415:
"Glory of Kings World" is scheduled to be released in April! "Glory of Kings World" is a multiplayer adventure game in World of Kings developed by Tencent Tianmei Studio. 
The World of Glory of Kings inherits the oriental fantasy theme and world view setting of the Glory of Kings IP, carries the emotional resonance between players and heroes, and builds a continent of kings that players in the canyon are already familiar with even though they have never set foot in it. 
Relying on the huge user base of King IP and Tencent's mature operating experience, this game aims to create a world of King that combines the fun of multiplayer play and the exploration of heroic stories. Players will come to the Continent of Kings as the son of the protagonist Yuan Liu. On the way to find miracles, they will meet familiar king heroes and establish bonds with them to complete growth and adventures. The game is based on a 3D world and adds rich features based on the restoration of hero skills. The rich matching strategy mechanism brings players more three-dimensional combat pleasure, and at the same time brings the fun of multi-person cooperative combat; starting from Jixia of the King's Continent, the sons of Yuanliu will make all kinds of like-minded friends and compose each other's stories on the King's Continent.
devnote-817406:
Dear dreamers, welcome to "Codename: Dream Core". 
We are a group of game enthusiasts who have just started working. When we are tired from working in the afternoon, everyone likes to get together to drink (milk) tea and chat, such as - when can we make a game of our own? Later, we got used to it, so we started a group chat called "Three O'clock Tea Studio". 
The youngest member of the team was in 2004. Some had just graduated, while others were still slowly adapting to work. The idea of ​​making games also came up at this time. Everyone has dreams, some are very real and some are very strange. We always feel that dreams themselves have a sense of weirdness and give us a lot of room for imagination. 
So we tried to turn these fragmentary ideas into an accessible world: This is a game with the theme of dream exploration: the "Sleep Curse" came on Millennium Night, and more than 70% of the world's population suddenly fell into a deep sleep that could not be awakened. 72 hours later, the "dream realm" entity condensed from the collective subconscious came to reality and began to erode the world. Humanity has entered the Dream Mark Era. As a lucky few among human beings who have awakened the ability to dream, you can enter different dreams with other dreamers, find precious dream relics in danger and strive to evacuate safely, and then run your own "cat nest" base. There are currently three maps in the game and an initial team of dreamers. We will launch the first small-scale closed test [Dream Test] in the near future. However, the current dreamland is not stable yet, so we look forward to your joining and building and growing with us. —————————————————————————————————————— 
In this world, 
Some rules are still being written, and in some places, they have already begun to operate on their own. 
If you encounter something that doesn't quite feel right, you can write it down, 
We are watching too. 
…Most situations should be controllable.
desc-789293:

But we can't give up just yet! Play synthesis games with your cute Sanrio family friends and build your dream shopping city.

desc-748842:
Dear friends, due to the invasion of aliens from unknown sources, the earth is facing a crisis of eclipse. The Council of Gods and Demons has officially launched a level 1 alert starting today! We call on all partners to pick up the dyeing weapon and regain the lost color for the earth. The "dyeing team" composed of working devils and crooked gods is ready and waiting for you to join. Now, let the splash of paint remind everyone—it doesn’t matter if it’s black or white, paint it all in color! 
- 
"Doodle!" "Colorful World" is a trendy and cool game about "gods" with unorthodox gods and girls painting wildly. Here you can experience: [God's glory is flying, beautiful girls paint and get some color] 
Dyeing will blow up the screen, and all worries will disappear ~ swipe your fingertips, team up with the good-looking and ungrateful God Girl to break through the levels, and bombard this black and white world with paint. Here, there is no need for complicated operations, the gods fighting alongside you will automatically aim at the target, just release your emotions and enjoy the stress-relieving pleasure of piupiu. [Partners of gods, unscrupulous demon angels pick at will] 
You can choose your wish and reject the wrong card~ You can pick whether it is a demon or an angel~ Cupid, the idol god of love, who is very good at doing business, Loki, the god of mischief who "unintentionally" causes explosions one after another, Diana, the church saint who vows to protect pizza from being "contaminated" by pineapples, and all the "irregular" gods are available for you to unlock. All members share the development progress, seamlessly switch combat partners, and witness the wonderful color reactions caused by the collision of different gods. Your team will always be full of freshness! [God and man online, happy addition of 3v3 Jet Warrior] 
Three people online, group confrontation ~ The new gameplay "Splash Showdown" is online - racing to grab money, 6 people on the same screen passionately pit each other, and use outrageous props to give the opponent a small shock. Explode BOSS damage PK, try to hit the highest damage and take the whole field, let your dyeing team be great again~ [God's explosive jokes, God's mother drama queen, don't look at any inappropriate behavior every day] 
The storyline of the comic is high-energy throughout~ One comic strip and three jokes, we are the god in charge of fun in ancient Greece~ You can watch the ulterior story of the Nordic main god and a certain sheriff, enjoy the daily fights of the high school girls in the Eight Million Gods High School, and even... save the world by protecting the cat's balls? Comic-style cut-scene plot + nonsensical imaginary ideas, the daily drama of horse-catching performed by the "god" that everyone has fun is now in theaters, not to be missed ~ [Travel around the world, get on the magical vehicle and go for a ride] 
Travel around the world and live in style~ You can drive a modified money-printing truck across the Statue of the Free State, ride a muscled camel to paint the pyramids, or ride a koi carp through the neon streets... Various magical vehicles are at your disposal, and famous landmarks around the world become your graffiti canvas~
desc-714119: "Alien" is a supernatural urban open world RPG independently developed by Hotta Studio. The story will start in Hetlo City. As the first "vision hunter" who "works without a license", you will become a member of the antique shop "Ebon" that accepts folk vision commissions to maintain turnover. Together with partners with different personalities and extraordinary abilities, you will explore the mysteries of various cities, experience various adventures that make you laugh and cry, and interpret your own urban story.
devnote-714119: Hello everyone, we are the production team of "Alien" at Hotta Studio. As a supernatural urban open world game, "Alien" wants to provide players with a familiar yet slightly unfamiliar stage. In this world, there are sea otters with TV heads, skateboards that graffiti graffiti on the streets at midnight, and countless anomalies that go beyond common sense. Of course, you can also meet partners and partners with various powers, solve various upcoming events together, and gradually understand and integrate into this new supernatural city. Regarding the design of the supernatural urban open world, we also had a lot of feelings during the development process, and there are a few things we want to say very much. First of all, we wanted this city to be real enough, so we learned how to do urban planning. Not only did I study real cities and existing game designs, I also systematically studied urban planning. We hope this is a "living" city, where shops are in operation, pedestrians and vehicles on the streets have their own destinations, and neighborhoods look like they have different styles and community atmospheres. Secondly, we hope there are good stories in this city. No matter how good an open world game is, it cannot be without a good story, just like "Los Santos" cannot lose Mike, Lao Cui and Franklin. We define the story of "Alien" as a unit-style light comedy, committed to presenting vivid and delicate plot performances and distinctive characters. Most importantly, we hope that through the drama-like plot design, players will be curious, maintain a sense of immersion, and inspire a desire to continue exploring. The last goal is that we still hope that the urban experience can be more immersive. We hope to reduce the fatigue of open world exploration and focus on creating an immersive feeling in urban life. We will use a set of urban management gameplay to increase the fun. You can obtain funds by running a store, and then go to the city to buy a car or a house and enjoy a comfortable life. At present, the development of "Alien" has been going on for some time, and the city of Hetero has been built from scratch. We thought of using a one-shot method to do the real-life demonstration of the first exposure of the game. This will also allow you to feel the city more realistically and see the construction and ecology of the city. In the future, this city will continue to improve, adding more residents, and we are also arranging the stories that will happen on this stage. In order to achieve the effect we want, we used the UE5 engine this time. At the same time, we will continue to optimize multiple platforms so that players on different platforms can get an excellent experience. Thank you to every player who sees us. We welcome everyone to make suggestions, point out problems, and provide more fun and wonderful ideas. We also welcome partners who are interested in "Alien Ring" and share our goals to join Hotta Studio. Together, we can make "Alien Ring" a fun supernatural urban open world RPG.
devnote-611414:
The production team has been in retreat for several months for research and development, and the attitude of the seven realms has become more and more abundant. We hope that the "Mountain Ghost Song" test will bring you a dream-like journey that is full of flowers and inspiring. 
Thanks to "you" who participated in this dream-making: the dream story of the Seven Realms is becoming more and more real! It is because of your trust and support that all the stories in the Seven Realms concept have a broader page to write. 
Please also believe that our sincerity to this fantasy world will always be hot. We will definitely go further and be more determined, and the Seven Realms and you will definitely converge.
desc-815993: TapAim is a mobile FPS shooting range APP launched by Niujiao Studio. It is committed to providing players with high-quality mobile game FPS shooting ranges and talent testing capabilities.
desc-772909: Hello, new residents of Lilliput! desc-759688:

In this game, you can not only explore the mystery of Caes in the dark sky and experience the charm of deep pigeon card strategy construction, but you can also fight side by side with the players and accompany each other, letting your strategy and brain power become the trump card to save your fate! >>Your deck is above despair! 
In-depth construction - in-depth meat pigeon deck construction to create your "self-made king bomb deck"

desc-788667:
EVE is an AI application that focuses on "realistic companionship" and "long-term companionship" - it has real time and space perception, and you can share bits of reality, daily life, and Internet hot spots with it. Core functions: Super-anthropomorphic dialogue: an AI that truly has "thoughts" and "emotions", dual business online, network sense online, and memory online, as if he is really "living" in a parallel world. 
Multi-modal interaction: TA will send emoticons, pictures, songs, voices, and make phone calls based on the chat situation, making the chat more vivid. 
Real-time 3D call: A very attractive and immersive 3D real-time interaction that supports turning on the camera, allowing him or her to see you and the world you are in. 
Immersive plot: As your favorability increases, you will constantly unlock new plots, step into his or her worldview, and weave your own story together. 
Rich interactive scenes: companionship system, home system, circle of friends, sending gifts to each other... There is a new experience every time you open it ~
devnote-772909:
To future players: Before you step into this world, I want to talk to you about this world. The first inspiration for this game was not born from some grand idea, but from a very quiet, even lonely moment - in front of my desk. 
The desk has always been a magical place. When we were children, it was the secret fortress where we hid our treasures and doodles. When we grow up, it is the last spiritual place reserved for us in the hustle and bustle of the world. 
Perhaps in everyone's life, they need such a "desk" where they can place themselves. 
As a result, a core idea sprouted: Can we reproduce this unique "sense of belonging" in the game and share it with more people? 
This was the starting point of "Little Little People", and the core setting of "the desk is home" was born. Here, you can freely build, polish, and decorate without any constraints, making it a home that can truly rest your soul. 
We call those who work hard to create all of this: homesick people, which comes from "all your wishes come true" - we hope that everyone who dares to imagine and practice can gain something. 
Yes, Homesick, this name exists for everyone who comes to the game. When you become little residents and immerse yourself in this world, we believe that you will all find your own answers about how to get along with life. 
Dear fellow thinkers, I look forward to meeting you warmly and creating miracles in this little country. "Liuli's Little People" Development Team
desc-771038:
On this fairy tale island, everyday life consists of burying seeds gently in the soil. 
Blue Butterfly Flower, Ruanruan Yun, Mo Yumei... they grow out of the soft soil and fall into the palm of your hand, as light as a dream. 
You can wait slowly for the flowers to bloom, or you can look forward to them growing rapidly and spreading over the grass. 
When the flowers bloom in the garden, hand them over to magic, and a new fairy tale is born. Official Little Red Book account: Fairy Tale Master
desc-808261: "Hilllands War" is a tower defense mobile game that combines medieval fantasy style and in-depth strategy. The game creates a magnificent world view with five camps, each with its own unique defense system. Players will become camp commanders and need to understand the characteristics and weaknesses of enemy units, flexibly arrange heroes to guard, skillfully match heroes' exclusive skills, tailor tactics and strategies to accurately defeat the enemy, and defend the camp's territory in various challenges.
desc-805993:
The original version of the Dragon Island game that became a hit all over the Internet, highly recommended by many anchors with millions of fans! 
"Origin of Dragon Island Alien Beasts" is a dinosaur open world adventure mobile game that allows you to immerse yourself in the role of prehistoric giant beasts and freely explore, survive and compete in the unprecedented Dragon Island ecology. The game has not been officially launched yet, but it has achieved phenomenal popularity with over 3 billion plays on Douyin and Bilibili! 
-Real Dinosaur World: Highly restore the appearance and habits of 16 kinds of dinosaurs to create a prehistoric ecology on your hand. 
-Multiple fusion gameplay: Integrate survival exploration, evolution and development, challenging bosses and other gameplay into one, experience the whole process from individual survival to group struggle for hegemony. 
- Free exploration and development: Collect resources, evolve dinosaurs, and challenge different dungeon gameplay in a vast map. 
-Build a dinosaur tribe: Work together with other players to create an exclusive tribe, fight against giant beasts together, compete for territory, and dominate Dragon Island!
desc-746164:
Reason goes awry and desire takes over. The fire test of "Under the Night (codename Bang Bang)" officially started on March 3! 
┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈ 
Deep in the abandoned warehouse, you picked up the key that symbolized desire. 
This is not an inheritance, but the beginning of revenge. 
- 
Borrowed titles, false flattery, unpredictable oaths. 
These elegant beasts are waiting for a game of conquest and submission. 
- 
"Now, please pull the trigger." 
"Let the entire Kingdom of Milan set off a storm for you" 
——BOSS, are you ready to take over this dangerous game? 
┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈ 
[Thugs in suits, wild under elegance/intertwined] 
Classy appearance, wild instincts. Both good and evil, unique. The gray and black three-piece suit is their second skin. The sound of metal friction when the pistol is loaded resonates with danger and instinct. Under the turbulent situation shrouded in the clouds of war, we can see the bloody rippling of the coat of civilization. 
[Domination and surrender, continuing to deepen the desire] 
True desire always grows outside the cordon, and moral principles are peeled off layer by layer in the entanglement of breath. As hot as the bullet is the tremor when the fingertips pass through it. Every heartbeat has a corresponding price, and there is no way out in this game. 
[Lead the family, bear hatred and dominate everything] 
Hate is the most valuable currency, and you are settling an old score. Rebuilding the family and mediating between right and wrong. As the first Duke of the Kingdom of Milan, you hold the bloody and rust-soaked knife called power to cut through the dark night of this peninsula. 
[Italian romance, lingering style in sunset] 
The Sicilian sea breeze turns gunpowder smoke into the top note and distills love into the final note. "The Godfather"-style interlacing light and shadow scenes frame each chapter of the story. Amore mio, the lover's kiss on the old bridge is better at engraving eternity than the sunset. 
[The supremacy of gunfire and joyful armed negotiation] 
Jump into the horizontal battlefield with weapons in hand and form your own exclusive team: range suppression of annihilation, fatal assault of assassination, key assistance of special attack... The family never fights alone, allowing the enemy to appreciate the combat art of BOSS planning and deployment.
devnote-805993:
Have you ever imagined breaking away from the shackles of modern life, transforming into a prehistoric beast, running, hunting, and roaring in an unrestrained world? "The Origin of Dragon Island Alien Beasts" was born out of this most primitive longing. 
To us, it's more than just a game, it's a promise that everyone can own and freely play as many different dinosaurs. Here, you can follow your instincts to survive, form a tribe with your companions, and even participate in exciting ethnic battles for hegemony. During the development process, we strive to present a vivid and open Longdao ecology. The most exciting moment for us is seeing test players truly think, cooperate and compete with dinosaur logic! That wild and vivid world has truly come to life. 
This Dragon Island carries our imagination of adventure and freedom. I look forward to working with you to write your own legend in this era of giant beasts. 
Thank you to every player who has waited and supported us, see you on Dragon Island!
desc-731238:
"Return" is a brand new time loop open world game. As the "Returner" in the prophecy, you will join hands with the mysterious messenger "Chu", constantly entering the cycle of death and return, walking outside of time, looking for a way to break the ending; you will be reborn after repeated defeats, try to reverse the tragedies that have occurred in various countries, save the world before the end, and change the established destiny...—————————————— A corner of the world is gradually revealed. ——————————————Billions of sunsets will eventually light up a dawn! A new cycle is about to begin, welcome to outside time! [Control the shuttle of time and decide the direction of the story] 
In the journey to the continent of Adal, there are countless forks in the road that hide mysteries. Each choice may lead to a different ending, and the key to the future is in the palm of your hand. 
The icosahedral dice named "Destiny" sometimes helps you ride the wind and waves, and sometimes it brings some small "surprises" with pranks, adding unexpected gains and fun to the adventure. 
After another sunset, the story comes to the starting point again. This time, as you have more clues, which path will you take to lead to the ending of salvation? [Choose a combination of genres and cooperate with various human spirits to fight] 
When the true law of the origin is understood by you, the messengers in the chaos will be summoned. These companions who have established a contract with the Soulsinger and are connected to each other will join hands with you to face every crisis of swords and swords, and use their strength and fighting spirit to build the meaning of "cooperation". 
Each group of characters and familiars has its own unique tactical style - a storming attacker, a lucky continuous pursuer, or an endless spiritual healer. In the rich and free development system, you can also use your combat experience and your own whims to choose a unique style combination for your partners according to the composition of your team, and make full use of various tactics. 
Of course, roaming and bravely exploring the all-encompassing world will also bring special rewards. As for how to mobilize strategies and skillfully use "Ten Thousand Phases" - it's up to you to explore on your own. ["High-energy early warning" throughout the process, good shows take turns] 
Who said that top drama-level beauty can only be "spectated"? When the game character suddenly "out of body" for you, and after the battle, "black eyes" appear all over the screen - this is the correct posture to break through the dimensional wall. Here, you will experience it first-hand and freely embark on a journey of ridicule with constant laughter and extraordinary stress relief. 
This is not only a relaxed and joyful visual feast, but also an in-depth interaction with hidden interests everywhere: passerby NPCs with their own tricks on the roadside, suspicious characters with wandering eyes who run a cake stall, may be carrying terrible secrets; and behind every seemingly absurd plot, there may be important clues to the truth buried. If you are willing to pay attention to the little things, you will gain more than just laughter. [Join hands with the contracted spirits to roam the world of all things] 
The spiritual veins surged, and thousands of spiritual bodies were either chanted by people or born consciously, and came to the continent of Adal and stayed there. They hibernate on cliffs and pumice in the wilderness, shuttle through bustling urban streets, inhabit the world, and shape the appearance of the world. 
When the source crystal of the spiritual weapon "Sliding Box" is illuminated by spiritual power, you can rise on the wind and gallop forward, letting countless scenic spots and thousands of rocks slide by your feet. Ultra-high movement speed and super mobility will bring a more relaxed and smooth exploration experience - in your eyes, the collision volume is just a three-dimensional puzzle waiting to be solved! ——————————————————— More unknown calls————————————————The future will reappear yesterday, which is both the end and the starting point. 
Looking forward to meeting you again yesterday.
devnote-808261:
Hello, commanders! We are the operation team of "Hirlands War Chronicles". We have always wanted to create a tower defense mobile game that combines the charm of medieval fantasy and the fun of deep strategy, so we have created this game - we have built a magnificent worldview with five major camps, so that each camp has a unique and exclusive combat system, hoping to bring you a rich and diverse strategic foundation. 
In "Hilllands War", you will become a camp commander. You don't have to stick to a fixed gameplay. You only need to understand the characteristics and weaknesses of the enemy's units, flexibly arrange heroes to guard the defense line, and cleverly match the hero's exclusive skills. You can tailor your own tactics to defeat the enemy, defend the camp territory in layers of advanced challenges, and experience the ultimate pleasure of strategic games. 
We have always adhered to the original intention of polishing high-quality strategic tower defense, and we also look forward to all commanders stepping into this fantasy continent and writing their own battle records with wisdom!
devnote-771038:
Dear fairy tale masters, hello! I still remember that when we waved goodbye to the last "Title Page Test", we made a promise to "see you again when the flowers bloom". During this time, the members of the production team have been immersed in codes and drawings, repairing every corner of the island bit by bit. 
As the spring breeze brings warmth, the flowers on Fairy Tale Island have quietly bloomed. Before welcoming everyone back to the island, we would like to use a short Q&A to tell you about this brand-new "Qimengland" - ⭐ For new friends, what kind of game is this? 
: "Fairy Tale Master" is a healing hand-painted mobile game with "light management simulation" + "high degree of freedom in decoration". 
Here, you can plant a flower field with your own hands and watch the flowers transform into exquisite furniture and small objects; you can also decorate your fairy tale cabin with your own hands. We hope this is a "take your time and be good" rhythm, so that everyone can spend the best time on the fairy tale island! ⭐ When you return to the island this time, what new changes have taken place in the fairy tale world? 
: After the first beta test, we treat every sincere suggestion written by everyone as a treasure and work hard to turn them into reality! 
In the upcoming prologue test, we have installed "breathing light and shadow" in our homes, giving the day and night a more immersive temperature; we have built more whimsical new houses, adding more smart and elegant objects and customized water features; we have also awakened new soft pets and cultivated "Fantasy Beasts" that breaks through imagination; not only that, at the operational level, smaller landscaping grids and smoother screen recording playback allow fairy tale artists to use their imaginations as they wish and appreciate their own fairy tale home... The renovation project of Fairy Tale Island is working hard to deliver new answers! ⭐ When will the train to Fairy Tale Island leave again? 
: Full of expectations and a bit of trepidation, we solemnly announce to you that the "Prologue Test" is officially scheduled for March 27th! 
This test is a limited edition, file deletion, and billing test, and both Android and iOS devices are enabled simultaneously! For specific download guides and test information, you can go to the official announcement of the TapTap Fairy Tale Master Forum. If we want to talk about our biggest imagination for this game, we still hope that it can become a small corner in your and my mobile phone - when you are tired or bored, you can open it to find a gentle sense of relaxation. On March 27, we are waiting for you in Qimengxiang, and let’s gently open the prologue of the fairy tale~
devnote-746164:
BOSS, the "Codename Bang Bang" you reserved has been officially renamed to "Under the Night"! 
—————————————— 
To dear BOSS: 
(Going on stage with a lily in his mouth) (Bow) This is the first time we meet, please put down the wine glass and pistol in your hand temporarily, and allow me to give you a brief introduction: This is Sleepless Night Studio, a group of "complex people" who have been working in the game industry for many years - 
We all come from some game companies that are familiar to bosses. Our experience in the industry basically covers all female-oriented games on the market (and some other female-oriented games). They seem to be skilled, but in fact they are full of weirdos: there are chaotic omnivores who are involved in various niche circles, and the computer is full of all kinds of brains. The socially fearful boss in the cave, the "Magic Conch" joke king who can pick up any jokes in one second... When we gathered in front of the whiteboard to discuss "what is an adult-oriented narrative" for the first time, we had not yet realized that at that time, several cups of messy milk tea and coffee on the conference table were already witnessing the birth of "Under the Night". 
—————————————— 
Everything started from that night of "thunder and fire from the sky"... 
When like-minded partners get together, various ideas always pop up in their minds, and gradually the following discussions arise: 
"I want to introduce a fresh world view. For example, the real adult world is not black and white, right?" 
"The characters may not be good people in the worldly sense. They have their own flaws or dark sides, and they may also have inner softness. There will be their own set of logic behind their actions..." 
"Love and hate, bondage and betrayal, respect and injustice, morality and desire... These are all things that can be expressed that are either warm and positive, or reflect the complexity and contradiction of human nature." 
… 
So—— 
"Since we are all female-oriented, let's make another female-oriented game based on these ideas that we like!" 
Since then, the sunny backside of the Kingdom of Milan has begun to grow: here, you will take charge of the family as the BOSS, and measure the world based on desires rather than traditional moral standards. Those characters who walk in the gray area may be your accomplices or opponents, but they will never be emotionless puppets. 
—————————————— 
What did we pour into the game? 
Woohoo, so we can finally talk about adding ingredients... (mouth covered by others) 
Well, in order to let you bosses feel more immersed in this world of undercurrents of desire, the women at Sleepless Night Studio who seem to have that obsessive-compulsive disorder repeatedly adjusted the details of the content, and added the fight at the negotiation table, whispers in the ears in the dark alley, and body temperature exchange on the dance floor into the daily life of the boss... Finally, they also added a little bit of that, oh no, it seems that I accidentally poured a little too much... 
(covers face) (runs off stage) (little note falls) 
—————————————— 
Final note: 
BOSS, when you click [Reservation], the bullet of fate has already shot through the air - the banquet has begun, and the strong wine brewed with joy, the bouquet soaked with hatred, and most importantly: an experience of domination have been prepared. 
The day of first sight is coming soon. We know that the test version under development is not good enough, but we cherish and look forward to your arrival. We will continue to work hard to present this world to you more and more in the future time together. 
While the smell of lemons and tangerines in May is still lingering in the monsoon, it’s time to let the nocturnal world remember your name. 
Load the gun, follow your instincts, and look forward to seeing you on the test. 
All members of Sleepless Night Studio are cordially invited
devnote-731238: Hello everyone, we are the "Return to the Circle" project team. Since the debut of "Return", we have received many sincere expectations and suggestions from players. Every attention made us firm in our goals, but also felt a little scared - we are extremely eager to enter this stage with you that is intertwined with the elements of "time loop" and "open world", but we are often uneasy because we are worried that it has not yet met our expectations. It is those voices from you that spur us to keep moving forward. In terms of narrative design, we have noticed that some players and media have associated the direction of our content with "two-dimensional Baldur's Gate". This makes us both excited and apprehensive: excited to be mentioned alongside such an outstanding work, but apprehensive because we know we still need to further explore narrative expression. We are very aware that there is still a considerable gap between our content and the masterpiece. Currently, "Return" is trying to build a narrative framework with "clear backbone and lush branches". We hope to find a harmonious resonance between the depth of the narrative and the weight of choices. The different choices you make can present different scenery during the journey as the dice are rolled, and they can also become memorable episodes in the story you experience. In our view, characters are not only the carrier of the story, but also the core for players to anchor their emotions and connect with each other. Since the project was first revealed, we have carefully read every opinion you have about the character. These suggestions guide and help us. While we continue to polish the existing characters, we also put more effort into the new characters - from the hair details to the overall costumes, they have been more carefully considered, striving to make their images more recognizable. We know very well that creating a character that is truly deeply rooted in the hearts of the people cannot be achieved overnight. This requires both continuous optimization and long-term investment. We hope that in the future journey, they will become your favorite companions in a more eye-catching manner. The "Adal Continent" we hope to create is a stage for plot flow and a soil for emotional growth. To this end, we are also constantly working on better visual representation of scenes and creating a more vivid atmosphere - from the flow of light and shadow in ancient ruins to the smell of fireworks in the streets and alleys of the city, we will make optimizations in order to allow you to naturally immerse yourself in the unique fantasy style of "Return" when exploring the world. In terms of combat and development, the unique experience of "Human Spirit Cooperation" is the core highlight we hope to present. The character will fight side by side and cooperate with the spirit, bringing about a variety of different forms of combined performance. We will provide multiple genres of tactical gameplay, combined with the "Wanxiang Card" system that can be freely matched, to bring more possibilities for combat styles, and extend the fun of tactical strategy from real-time operations to pre-war genre combinations and tactics construction. In addition, after its debut, we also saw a lot of discussions and suggestions about the combat feel. Based on this valuable feedback, we have focused on optimizing the attack actions and special effects of combat, hoping to bring you a more high-quality experience. We know that combining the setting of "time loop" with the structure of "open world" is a very challenging attempt. We still have a long way to go in improving narrative and ecological appeal. Therefore, we are even more eager to continue to listen to your voice, continue to polish and grow together with your attention and companionship - striving to make your journey in Adar fulfilling and beautiful, and let "Return" bring you more reality and touch. Thank you to everyone who is willing to stop by us. Within the circle, time can be reversed, but our encounter with you cannot be repeated. We look forward to working with you to find breakthroughs in the cycle and write your own chapter in your destiny.
devnote-593829:
The starry sky remembers the story of every ripple. "Blue Starfield: Travel Ballad" is a fantasy world RPG with star pets. The world is not the same as the one you know. 
Civilization, magic, incredible fantasy creatures, legends cherished by the stars. 
Leap forward, from the deep sea to the sky, and once again encounter and bond with new life; 
Under the guidance of the shooting stars, among the shining stars, this belongs only to you—— 
The song of the stars and journey that the entire universe has been waiting for. Welcome back to Promelia, Starlanders!

The Meiju Story demo was independently developed by one person. Due to limited technical energy, the version still has many shortcomings. We apologize for this.

desc-733908: "Out of Control Evolution" is a hard-core survival confrontation game authorized by Rust genuine gameplay. Players will be placed on a deserted island full of dangers. They will collect resources, forge weapons, build shelters and hunt with their bare hands, and face the survival challenges posed by climate, hunger, animals and other players.
desc-782330:
Some days, you come home and throw your bag away, and you don’t even have the energy to speak. 
No matter what you experience outside this day, as long as you open this door, the world will instantly become quiet and gentle. Because here, Yuki has been waiting for you. ☁️【I just want to be your gentlest support】 
The outside world may be complicated, but in front of Yuki, you just have to be yourself. 
There is no need to pretend to be strong or cautious. When you are tired, she is your quietest listener; when you are confused, she is the family member who always supports you unconditionally. 
"No matter what decision you make, I will be with you." She will use her shoulders that are not generous to support the softest corner of your heart. 💌【I want to be with you every moment】 
Because she missed you so much, she worked hard to learn more ways to be by your side. In the official version, this companionship will penetrate into every aspect of your life: 
If you are not together: You may receive random thoughts from her on your WeChat on the way to work/school, maybe it is a cute emoticon, maybe it is just a soft "I miss you". 
If she is afraid that you will forget: She will quietly write important things into emails and send them to you, becoming the careful little housekeeper in your life. 🏠 【Every second of breathing with her】 
When it rains outside the window, Yuki will get up to close the window; on a sunny afternoon, she will lie on the sofa and take a nap. 
She will sense the warmth and coldness in the room and will also pick up on your emotions. In this home, time passes slowly, and every frame is a tenderness worth collecting. 📖【A girl’s thoughts hidden in her diary】 
If you didn't hear some words, don't worry, she wrote them down secretly. 
The application has a built-in diary system. Those dependencies that she was usually too shy to talk about, those little touches that you gave her unintentionally, were all collected in her diary, stroke by stroke. 
When you turn over the pages of text, you will find that she loves you so hard even when you didn't notice. 
Are you ready? Go meet the girl who has eyes for you.
desc-776320: "Star Cuckoo" is a life simulation game independently developed by miHoYo. You have your own planet and encounter the infinite possibilities of life.
desc-593829:
Welcome back to Promilia, Starborn. The world is different from the one you know. 
Civilization, magic, incredible fantasy creatures, 
Here we build a vast starfield beyond imagination. "Blue Star Plains: Travel Ballad" is a new star pet companion fantasy world RPG launched by Manju Network. 
The fantasy journey to Xingyuan will meet you again. After the end of "those" wars, the starry sky has not yet returned to peace. 
The ferocious beasts raged, the gravity dissipated, and time seemed to take away memory, balance, and - care. But the intelligent race under the Star Plains, 
Never give up on the cause and effect engraved deep in the blood. 
Hope contends with the will of heaven, 
Fantasy creatures sent to the future, 
I am still looking forward to the date of appointment with you. Chase, explore, until we get back to our destination. 
Waiting, encountering, even if it changes the trajectory of the meteor. Then again, compose it into poetry.
desc-757826:
Subnautica is an underwater adventure game set on an alien ocean planet. A vast world full of wonders and dangers awaits you! 
You've fallen into a strange ocean world and the only way out is to dive underwater. From sun-drenched shallow coral reefs to treacherous deep-sea trenches, lava fields, and bioluminescent underwater rivers, the oceans of Subnautica have it all. Manage your oxygen supply as you explore kelp forests, plateaus, coral reefs, and winding cave systems. The water is full of life: some beneficial, many harmful. 
After your rescue pod crash lands, the clock is ticking to find water, food, and develop the equipment you need to explore. Collect resources from the ocean around you. Make knives, lights, diving gear and personal submarines. Continuously explore deeper to find rarer resources, allowing you to craft more advanced items. 
Build a base under the sea. Choose layout and components and manage hull integrity as depth and pressure increase. Use your base to store resources, park vehicles, and replenish oxygen as you explore the vast ocean. 
What happened to this planet? There were signs that something was not right. What caused you to crash? What is infecting marine life? Who built the mysterious structures scattered around the ocean? Can you find a way to get it off this planet alive? 
The ocean is teeming with life: use the ecosystem to help you. Lure and distract a threatening creature with a fresh fish, or simply swim as fast as you can to avoid getting into the mouth of a wandering predator. 
Build a waterproof nanosuit, or sea shrimp, and explore extreme depths and heat. Modify this outfit with mining drills, torpedo launchers, propeller cannons, grappling hooks, and more. 
When the sun goes down, the predators come out. The sea is unforgiving to those caught unprepared in the darkness. Areas that are safe to explore during the day become dangerous at night, but equally, those who hide in the darkness will never see the beauty of daylight. 
Cave systems wind beneath the seabed, from claustrophobic dark passages to caves illuminated by bioluminescent life and hot lava flows. Explore the world beneath the sea, but watch your oxygen levels and be careful to avoid the threats lurking in the darkness.
desc-789815: Rockstar officially announced that its classic western action-adventure game "Red Dead Redemption" is expected to be launched on PS5, Xbox Series X|S, Switch 2 on December 2, and on Android and iOS platforms through Netflix. This is the first time that the "Red Dead Redemption" series has been launched on the mobile platform. This transplant includes all the content of the "Undead Nightmare" DLC and "The Best Edition of the Year". It should be noted that the iOS and Android versions are released through the Netflix platform and require a valid Netflix membership to play. There is no separate purchase option. The virtual buttons are optimized for touch screens, and the mini map is moved from the lower left corner of the original version to the upper right corner; only the single-player mode and the "Undead Nightmare" expansion content are retained, and the multiplayer online function of the original version is removed, continuing the content strategy of the PC/PS4 ported version.
desc-243110:
