Welcome to the Vientiane Competition. The extremely popular hero card competition show is in full swing! You will compete with many chess players on this stage. Countless cards bring infinite possibilities. Use your wisdom, courage, and a little bit of luck to win the game, become the king, and win the glory of the championship! This time I can’t do it without you! The game presents a brand new parallel world of kings with a stylish, modern, lively and personalized art style. Here, chess players will summon kings and heroes from different time and space in a game called "Wanxiang Chess" to fight to become the champion!
desc-281223:
"Lord of Mysteries" is a new generation MMORPG developed by Kuaishou. This multi-platform game is created by an experienced team of experts. It is adapted from the top IP platinum masterpiece of the same name. For the first time, it uses the UE5 engine to build a new European-style ancient mystical MMO game world. 
In the game "Lord of Mysteries", you will experience: an immersive occult role-playing experience, and experience the unprecedented wave of foreign times; enjoy the exquisite and extraordinary world realized by the UE5 engine, where mysteries have become a reality; choose your path to God, and digest the magic potion in the search for your true self. 
Explore cities, castles, countryside, and ancient ruins, and witness the mystery that spans time and space eras; review the classic battle of "The Fool" and protect the light of humanity alongside your teammates.
devnote-809320:
Hello fellow players: 
I always firmly believe that the real horror in the back room does not lie in those sudden frights, but in the inconsistent feeling of "there should be someone there, but there is no one there". To capture this essence, I repeatedly adjusted the contrast of light and shadow at each level. I hope that when you walk alone down a yellowing hallway, you hear not just the buzz of fluorescent lights, but the resonance of your own heartbeat. In order to restore the ultimate sense of oppression, I spent a lot of energy on every turn, every light and shadow, and strived to achieve the ultimate smooth "silky exploration" on the mobile terminal. 
Some honest words: 
Pure gaming environment: The game is permanently free and promises no ads. I don't make money from advertising, I just hope more people can feel the charm of the back room. 
Face the known issues: There are indeed some loading residues or bugs in the current version. This is not because I choose to ignore it, but because the development tasks are heavy, and I am troubleshooting it as quickly as possible. Every bug disappears and requires a little patience. I will continue to update until it is perfect. 
Comment area and feedback: I continue to pay attention to every voice in the forum and comment area. If the game experience is not good, please show mercy when complaining and leave me a direction for improvement. We will give you feedback with actual repair results. 
Function preview: The most requested in-office voice system is being stepped up to be produced, and the pressure balance of multi-person collaboration is also constantly being fine-tuned. 
Follow-up roadmap: 
We will continue to expand the level map (not just Level 0) and introduce more challenging physical AI behaviors, making every "break from reality" full of unknown fears and surprises. 
Welcome to join our discussion: 
If you want to get the update progress as soon as possible, or report bugs to me directly, please be sure to join: 
Game official QQ group: 1083855070 
Thank you all, in this yellowed space, your footsteps are the only motivation for me to move forward.
devnote-281223:
The game "Lord of Mysteries" is a multi-terminal massively multiplayer online role-playing game. It is adapted from the world's popular IP novel "Lord of Mysteries" and is based on the UE5 engine to create an extraordinary world of European-style steam with ultra-high-definition quality. The game will restore the 19th century Victorian style in the novel as much as possible, taking into account the extraordinary power and the wave of industrial machinery, providing players with an unparalleled immersive playing experience. Hello everyone, this is Susie, the fantasy dog ​​of "Lord of Mysteries". From today on, I will be active as the official forum manager. You can call me Susie, or "Dog Official," after all, I really am a dog. I can't concisely introduce this mysterious and dazzling world view to you in a few words. This is a world that is about the same time as Sherlock Holmes. Ladies in costumes and men with canes gracefully board carriages and roll through the cobblestone streets. Children from working-class families beg on the streets, believers pray helplessly by the river, evil happens in alleys, and capital eats people in factories. And you, the remnants of the past, stand on the dividing line between good and evil, so please proceed with caution. 
Choose your path, drink the magic potion, and begin your extraordinary era! "From now on, you will become a wretch who always fights against danger and madness." 
"Remember, you are just pretending"
devnote-756067: Coordinators, long time no see! After the last test, we received a lot of enthusiastic feedback. I would like to express my most sincere thanks to every coordinator here - it is your expectations and companionship that make us never feel alone on this road of polishing the game. We guard every comment in the background, like students who have just finished writing their answer sheets, nervous and looking forward to it. One of the complaints was mentioned many times: "A game lasts more than 20 minutes, and I feel tired before I even feel refreshed." This sharp reminder pointed out to us the focus of the next tuning: making a casual and stress-relieving mobile game that is full of pleasure. To achieve this goal, we overturned the entire game framework design and "leap-forwarded" the game duration from more than 20 minutes to 10 minutes. We repeatedly worked on every detail: the growth feedback must be exciting enough, and you can feel it getting stronger every minute, but the values ​​cannot be out of control; the monster tide must be dense enough, and it must have an overwhelming sense of oppression, but it cannot be a boring and ineffective pile of monsters; the balance of props must be strong enough, and there must be random surprises, but the victory or defeat cannot be determined purely by luck. The friends in the studio conceive, design, overturn, and start again over and over again. All the polishing is only for one thing: to make you feel like riding a roller coaster in each game, with full excitement and excitement every second, and the end is still unfinished. We have also heard the voices of many coordinators: they want to join the game with friends, play together, beat the BOSS side by side in the full-screen barrage, and of course - also be able to hug the boss with peace of mind. So this time, the two-player mode comes into play. Rather than the thrill of fighting alone, we want everyone to feel the warmth of working together with friends to overcome difficulties together. At the same time, we made a very difficult decision: removing the coloring gameplay. Through repeated exploration and trial and error, we finally understood more and more clearly what the "Moon Phase Project" should become. This is an extremely painful parting, but we hope that the game can focus all its attention on the core feeling of rushing into the strange tide to clear the screen with one click and sweep the entire scene. There will be no redundancy or delay, and it will be pure and satisfying. The moon phases wax and wane, and the "Moon Phase Plan" at this moment may still have imperfections. But as long as you are still willing to speak, we will always listen carefully. We will work with all the coordinators to make Seren's world better and make this adventure that belongs to us step by step towards the most complete full moon. All members of Moon Shadow Studio
desc-809320:
"If you accidentally lose touch with reality in the wrong place..." 
"Back Room: Deep Exploration" is a super-large space horror puzzle mobile game based on classic urban legends and emphasizing multi-person cooperative survival. Here, the logic of reality is shattered and you step into a chaotic dimension of endless corridors, dank pool rooms, and industrial ruins. 
[A vast hierarchical matrix: an ever-expanding nightmare] 
We are committed to restoring the most authentic "Linling Space". From the maddening yellow office area Level 0, to the endlessly dark industrial area Level 2, to the dreamlike minimalist pool room. As the version changes, the layered map will continue to extend into unknown depths, with each layer having a completely different visual style and unique survival mechanism. 
[Highly evolved entities: they are watching you] 
There was more than just silence in the back room. The entities lurking in the dark have independent AI behavior logic - they will capture your traces through sound, ambush you in blind spots, or launch a suffocating chase in the corridor. As the number of maps increases, more mysterious creatures with unique interactive mechanisms will appear one by one. 
[4-player online collaboration: division of labor is the only way to survive] 
To go deep alone is to seek death. Supporting real-time online connection for up to 4 people, you need to face not only puzzle solving, but also psychological games under resource shortage. Share the pressure of exploration, jointly observe anomalies, and guide lost teammates. In this endless space, collaboration is the only way to escape. 
[Peak optimization for mobile terminals: silky and high-quality exploration] 
In order to present a depressing atmosphere on the mobile terminal that is comparable to that of PC, we have specially optimized large-area light and shadow and dynamic textures. Even under the extremely high dynamics of entity chasing, silky smooth control is guaranteed, allowing you to fully immerse yourself in this nightmare of urban legends.
desc-756067: "Moon Phase Project" is a joyful, synthetic and decompressing game created by Yueying Studio, a subsidiary of Youka. Coordinator, we invite you to Serien - this time, you will work with the agents with talents, and use the most "unorthodox" way to embark on a crazy decompression journey to save the world! From rolling pins and chopping boards to lightsabers and submachine guns, there are hundreds of weapons and props with different styles for you to choose from, and you can mix and match them as you please. Silk-smooth synthesis, one-click upgrade, unlock advanced weapons and fire automatically, full-screen barrage sweeps across the field, full-screen critical hits on monsters in seconds, and enjoy the ultimate feeling of mowing grass and clearing the screen! No complicated operations are required, no hard-core training is required, as long as the synthesis is fast enough and the movement is sassy enough, you will have the last laugh in this joyful adventure and become the ultimate winner!
devnote-786394:
Dear Director: 
Thank you for your willingness to stop, listen to our stories, and start this unknown journey together. 
We are a group of creators who believe that "story" has the magic power. We always believe that the best encounter is the mutual attraction of two independent souls, so "Heartbeat Fall" was born. Here, you don’t need to be saved by anyone. Possessing the wisdom to solve problems and the ability to protect others, being calm and thoughtful in the face of crisis, being calm and unhurried when encountering difficulties, being smart and steady, being tenacious and courageous... all these make up who you are as the director of the Seventh Task Force. 
Here, you will clear away the fog with your own hands, and use your extraordinary talents to explore mysterious events; rely on your unique personal charm to attract like-minded partners. 
The thread of fate will lead several equally extraordinary souls to you. Your bond may be the intellectual confrontation between your opponents, the trust of life and death in fighting side by side, or even the mutual appreciation and proximity of two powerful souls. 
In the world we build together, love never means attachment or redemption. It is an unexpected look back on each other on their way to the journey, which is the icing on the cake for your already wonderful life. In the end, we hope that what you gain is not only a momentary heartbeat, but also a firm strength that comes from yourself. May you feel valued and recognized, and become the protagonist of your own life in addition to the story. We are ready. Looking forward to meeting you and writing this first page together. 
Have a nice journey. 
--The creative team of "Heartbeat Falls"
desc-786394:
Dear Director, welcome to the Seventh Task Force. 
In this modern city where "people" and "spirits" coexist - "Senluo City", the city skyline outlines the pinnacle of civilization, and under every bright light, there are unsaid secrets. The seemingly prosperous city is facing unprecedented undercurrents. As the director, you will be in charge of maintaining the balance between the two worlds and guarding the peace and tranquility of the city. 
Here, a series of confusing and mysterious events are beyond imagination, and dangerous life and death tests are about to happen. You will meet and get to know each other, from suspicion to entrustment, with the destined people. You will advance and retreat among multiple forces, and jointly compose an epic that transcends boundaries. 
Mr. Director, the morning and dusk in Senluo City are waiting for your order—— 
It's time to kick off this gorgeous adventure.
desc-798735:
[To all those who have never dreamed of martial arts] 
When we were children, we all had the same dream: In the dream, there was endless wine, endless hatred, and a sword and a horse that could go to the farthest place. We once fantasized about encountering a peerless master under a cliff and learned magical skills to shock the martial arts world; we also fantasized about sitting around a campfire in a ruined temple late at night and listening to a legend about magic weapons and secret books. These many longings for Jianghu finally converged into this game. 
We don't want to do cold data accumulation, but want to use the stupidest method to restore the world of flesh and blood and all kinds of living things. 【About this world】 
The story begins with the earth-shattering "Battle for Heaven" thirty years ago. The legendary treasure "Book of Eight Meridians" appeared in the world, causing six masters to fight to the death in the barren mountains of Western Shu. In the end, both the man and the book disappeared. That bloody battle became a joke among storytellers, and it was no longer possible to tell the truth from the truth. Until thirty years later, a seriously injured mysterious man fell in front of the ruined temple in Donghai Fishing Village—— 
You saved his life, and the gears of fate turned. Faced with the resurgent chaos in the world, should we stay on our own, or should we risk our lives to get involved? Is the Book of Heaven a blessing or a curse? Is the master evil? This time, you write the script. [Our thinking and persistence] 
During the development process, we have always been thinking about one question: How to make martial arts games no longer boring? Words can carry imagination, but we hope this world can be more "real". To this end, we have made a lot of seemingly “redundant” efforts in the audio-visual experience: 
- We want to return "martial arts" to its purity: true martial arts should not just be a collection of numerical values, but an ever-changing variety of hundreds of techniques. We have built a free martial arts system: external martial arts moves, internal martial arts, mental techniques, and light martial arts can all be matched as you like. What we are most proud of is the true presentation of "both internal and external skills" - according to the different types of internal skills used by players, the visual effects of external skills will also undergo changes visible to the naked eye. This time, martial arts is no longer a rigid icon, but your unique trump card for traveling around the world. 
- We want "emotion" to stir people's hearts: the real world should not only have cold swords, but also hot hearts. With millions of words, we have weaved an intricate web of emotions: there are the righteousness of family and country that can turn the tide of collapse, the love between children who want to win the hearts of their own people, and the brotherly loyalty that shows the utmost sincerity. This time, the plot is no longer a hurriedly skipped scene, but a bond that is difficult to break away from in this troubled world. 
- We want to make the "scenery" dreamlike: We have carefully polished various immersive scenes. From the desolation of the dead vines and old trees to the desolation of the lonely smoke in the desert, every sword duel strives to make you immersed in the scene and feel the pressure of life and death. 
- We want the "sound" to be moving: We also invited a professional music team to create customized creations based on music as the soul and in line with the story's succession and transition. Between silk, bamboo and orchestra, you will be presented with an adventure in the world that is enough to make you dream. 
A long sword and a glass of wine can lead to a tall building and a heart thousands of miles away. We know this game is not perfect yet, but it embodies our purest love for martial arts. I hope you can find that long-lost dream of being in the world again here. 【Game Features】 
- Painting the common people with pen and ink - outlining the world with millions of words of pen and ink, every brick and tile has a story. It contains both the heart-warming righteousness of family and country, as well as the gentle and poignant love between children; 
- The sound and color are touching - Invite famous masters to compose the story of the palace and merchants, and the silk, bamboo and orchestral music all recount the inner thoughts of the rivers and lakes; the decisive battle is also placed in the long and vast expanse, with the sound of wind and swords ringing in your ears. In the solemn world, the moment of life and death between masters is reproduced; 
- Break through all the moves - restore the essence of martial arts combat. There is no strongest martial arts, only the most suitable routine. Only by targeting weaknesses can you win, and refuse to be crushed by numerical values; 
- Cloud travel throughout Jiuzhou - freely explore rivers and lakes, from fishing villages in the East China Sea to the barren mountains of Western Shu, adventures are everywhere, and you may become a peerless master after falling off a cliff; 
- Heroes and Shadows are at your disposal - completely abandoning the blind box mechanism. You can invite your favorite knights by name, and you can also get to know heroes through adventures and interactions and fight side by side; 
- Baiye Yin Market - alchemy, fishing, cooking, music... In addition to the lights and shadows of swords, you can also experience the real various scenes of the ancient market.
devnote-814677:
Hi Honorary Citizens of City of Hope 
Before we get into what may be a bit long and pretentious, we want to answer an honest question: Why are we making City of Hope? 
It's a bit cliché to say it, but it's really because - we're so tired. Who are we? We are a group of social animals (no, gamers) who almost drowned in the ocean of code and requirements documents. 
During the day, we were at our respective workstations, being whipped around by "KPIs" and "OKRs" like a top. At night, we turned on our mobile phones and wanted to have some fun in games, but what happened? 
"Your energy has been exhausted. Please come back tomorrow." 
"Today's activity level has not been reached and the reward has expired." 
"Please log in online, otherwise you will lose this illusory 'continuous login reward'." 
At that moment, when we looked at the mobile phone screen, we seemed to see another workstation with a curler version of ourselves sitting on it. 
The "daily tasks" in the game are like the boss's life-threatening serial calls, and that damn "stamina bar" is simply a pillar of shame for overtime hours. 
We can’t help but wonder: Are you playing games for happiness or for “suffering”? 
Then, a crazy idea was born: We want to build an “anti-involution” City of Hope! 
A "sanctuary" with no restrictions, a joy, and no mandatory daily tasks! 
This is the origin of "City of Hope". 
We want you to regain your right to waste time here. 
You can spend a whole afternoon just sitting by the river in a daze, watching the clouds roll in and out; 
You don’t have to force yourself to chop down trees ten thousand times just for a little reward. 
We won’t rush you online or force you to go online. If you don’t come for a few days, we will only miss you instead of “greeting” you with a bunch of punishment mechanisms. 
This is called life, right? 
So, dear you, if you are tired of endless running, if you want to find a place to stop and take a breath, then please come to "City of Hope". 
There are no "tasks that must be done" here, only "things I want to do with you." 
We are here, waiting for the wind, and waiting for you.
desc-541416:
3D house decoration and layout game, here, every corner is defined by you! High degree of freedom in placement, 360-degree panoramic viewing angle, free design of furniture material and color, and creation of various styles of small rooms, bringing you unprecedented creative freedom and healing experience. 【Versatile styles, match as you like】 
Retro style, pastoral style, cream style, medieval style, industrial style... No matter what style you want, you can find your favorite matching solution here to create a unique dream space. 【Free placement and unrestricted creation】 
The furniture supports eight-way rotation, and the ornaments support rotation in any direction. There are no grid restrictions, just follow your ideas and let each item find its most suitable position. [Panorama perspective, panoramic view] 
The 360-degree free viewing angle allows you to clearly appreciate every detail of the cabin. Check the overall effect at any time to make sure every corner is perfect. [Arrangement and storage, healing experience] 
Experience the satisfaction of going from messy to organized in the process of unpacking and storing, and feel the sense of accomplishment of space transformation in the creative arrangement, making organizing a pleasure. [Rich dyeing and personalized customization] 
Materials, patterns, and colors can be adjusted at will to create a unique and exclusive style, allowing every detail to highlight your unique aesthetic taste. [Dynamic light and shadow, immersive experience] 
The natural light and shadow that flows over time, from the gentleness of dawn to the romance of dusk, feel the light and shadow slowly moving around the room.
desc-744231:
【Game introduction】 
In the fifteenth year of Chongzhen in the late Ming Dynasty (1642), scholar Fang Zhiyou fell ill due to the death of his old friend. 
The old friend's name is "Su Lianyan", he is the leading actor in Yangzhou City, and he is also a childhood sweetheart who has a deep bond with Fang Zhiyou. 
That year, Su Lianyan left without saying goodbye and committed suicide by jumping into the river on the Twenty-Fourth Bridge in Guangling. Only then did you realize that you were so stimulated that you lost your memory, regarded humans as animals, and lived on alcohol for three years. 
Three years later, on the night of April 24th, I realized that you accidentally entered the "Lion and Camel Kingdom" after being drunk. 
"Lion and Camel Kingdom" is a book he has written for many years. It tells the story of five hundred years ago, before Tang Monk and his disciples arrived, the Golden-winged Dapeng King led a group of 100,000 demons to massacre a country's subjects. 
Fang Zhiyou traveled back in time to his own book and saw demon soldiers entering the city, looting, killing, raping and setting fires. He originally had "a desire to die", but because of an accident, he had the idea of ​​surviving - 
He met a little girl who looked similar to his deceased friend. Her name was "Xiao Yan'er", which was the same as Su Lianyan's childhood name. 
Only then did you know that you had the will to survive because of your encounter with Xiao Yan'er. He wanted to take Xiao Yan'er to survive until the last day when the demon soldier sealed the sword. 
Along the way, he will gradually regain his memory, gradually become sober or become more and more mad, and finally uncover the truth about her and face his own ending. 【Story background】 
The story is set in the late Ming Dynasty and is divided into two chapters, one is [Remember] and the other is [Reminiscence]. 
[Ji Pian] records the ten days, starting from the 24th of April in the Yiyou year. 
At the end of the Ming Dynasty, after Emperor Chongzhen hanged himself in Meishan, Wu Sangui introduced Qing troops into the pass, and the Ming clan established the "Southern Ming" in order to fight against the Qing and restore the Ming. 
The Qing army divided into two groups, attacking the Dashun peasant army led by Li Zicheng, all the way to the south of the Yangtze River. Prince Duduo of Henan led 100,000 Qing troops to surround Yangzhou City, while Shi Kefa led the soldiers and civilians to defend Yangzhou. In the end, the city was defeated, and Duduo ordered a massacre of the city. 
When the city was destroyed, it was also the time when the scholar realized that You had accidentally entered the "Lion and Camel Kingdom" after getting drunk. The Ten Days of the Lion and Camel Country coincide with the "Ten Days of Yangzhou" in history. 
(All historical data details will be fully referenced and correspond to "Ten Diaries of Yangzhou" written by Wang Xiuchu, and historical data research will only use this as the standard) 
[Reminiscences] recalls a period of ten years, starting from the fifth year of Chongzhen in the late Ming Dynasty and ending in the fifteenth year of Chongzhen. 
At this time, in the late Ming Dynasty, Jiangnan was not in the same situation as the northwest Central Plains, where people were eating each other due to severe hunger. Capitalism sprouted, culture was unprecedentedly developed, and various novels and plays were circulated in the market. 
Those gentry, talented people and beautiful women in the south of the Yangtze River may often worry about their declining situation, but they don't know that a change of dynasty is coming. 【Drama experience】 
ZeroChuang Game Studio's third story-based game following the critically acclaimed "Burning Flower: Dark Peach Blossom Land" and "Hungry Death: A Thousand Miles of Journey to the Late Ming Dynasty" is still produced by producer Ji Ling. 
This work has a high degree of freedom, containing 320,000 words of non-repeating text, multiple main endings and dozens of death endings. 
Players need to play the role of a scholar who is trying to survive during the city massacre, planning where to escape and hide, and managing money and property to avoid being killed. Of course, you can also fight the monster soldiers with swords. Every choice is related to your life, so be careful. 
By the end of the game, players will need to face a series of new choices. The choices in the later stages are not only related to survival, but also related to the outcome, which will lead to several different but shocking endings. 
This work continues the dark style and exciting plot of "Hungry Death: A Thousand Miles Journey to the Late Ming Dynasty" while enriching the volume. 
It is worth mentioning that this game has a "Ryoho" chapter that is independent from the main storyline, and will tell the story after the timeline of the ending of Starvation, and the story after the timeline of the ending of Aihong. 【Visual effects】 
In terms of visual effects, we strive to achieve the highest level of 2D art in domestic stand-alone games. 
The unique two-dimensional style theme of late Ming Dynasty, focusing on realistic thick paint style. 
We rigorously study the clothing, architecture, environment and other elements of the Ming and Qing Dynasties, and strive to restore the historical atmosphere and aesthetics. 【Sound effects】 
We strive to achieve the highest level of domestic two-dimensional games in terms of sound effects. 
The soundtrack of this game is mainly responsible for the soundtrack, Lin Fangzhou, and the sound effects will also be specially designed and produced. The producer will control every detail. 
The dubbing team and personnel for this game are being decided and will be announced in the near future. 【Production members】 
Production team: Zero Creation Games "Aihong: Ten Diary of City Break" production team 
Producer/Script: Ji Ling 
Art Group: Walnut-o-Clamp, Emperor of the Night, Jiu San, Obsidian Bubble, Zhongchun Ci, Fork, Fire Lucky, Billions of Insects, Poseidon, Xiao Yi, Zi Yinyin, Paz's Law 
Program group: Yuhang, remote tracing 
Configuration/Performance/Testing/Copywriting Correction: Yuhang, Zhongchunci, September, and other members of the Lingchuang game production team 
UI/American Publicity: Cat in the Box 
Music: Lin Fangzhou 
Dubbing director: Lengquan Yeyue Domestic distribution: Zero Chuang Games 
Domestic publishers: Ji Ling, Ray, Sanzhou, the rest of the Lingchuang game production team
devnote-798735:
We believe that everyone has a martial arts fire in their hearts when they were young. In 2000, on the first day of junior high school, I came into contact with online games for the first time, and from then on I embarked on the path of no return. In 2001, all the Internet cafes in the county were playing a game overnight, which was "Jin Yong's Heroes Online Version". What I found most amazing was that in that era of underdeveloped communications, people in the entire county seemed to have agreed to play on the same server - Shanghai GS4. This is still incredible to this day. Word of mouth can be so powerful. Because Jin Yong’s martial arts was my favorite TV series when I was a kid, my friends and I fell into the trap without a doubt. The first number chose Blood Knife Sect. Why did he choose Blood Knife? Because at that time Huashan Sword Technique was beaten to pieces by Blood Knife Sword Technique of the same level. In fact, it was only the early stage of the game. Blood Knife Sect was really powerful in the early stage, but the advanced martial arts "Blood Demon Sword Technique" was very difficult to learn, and slowly other sects had learned the second level martial arts and Blood Knife Sect had no advantage. Later, after I understood it, I chose Huashan for my second account, mainly because I liked Linghu Chong so much in novels and TV series, and all I could think about was the Dugu Nine Swords (although I didn’t know how to learn the Dugu Nine Swords at the time). To go a bit further, at that time, this product had many fantastic designs, which had a great impact on me. At the same time, it also had some design flaws, which led to the decline of this product. But its impact on me far exceeded the game itself. After graduation, the Internet was rising, and I firmly chose to become a game planner, and secretly vowed to make a fun martial arts game. 
In 2012, I was fortunate to join Tencent and participate in the development of Tianya Mingyue Dao, where I learned a lot of knowledge. It was a painful and happy experience (mostly happy). As the game was launched and operated, the works I participated in were experienced by tens of millions of users. This sense of accomplishment is unparalleled. In fact, I also think that the product has some pain points, but structural problems cannot be changed. Our planners are always ridiculed for giving the art a thumbs up. Every time we see comments like this from players, we completely understand and secretly give them a thumbs up. In the later stages of Tiandao, I often thought about how the product I was making was different from the martial arts in my childhood memories. If I had the opportunity to make another one, how should I restore that feeling? With these considerations in mind, the product "Traces of the Hidden Sword Hero" was born. 1. Compared with Western fantasy themes, the most significant difference between martial arts and martial arts is the various magical martial arts. After all, who hasn’t imagined how cool it would be if they could subdue a dragon with the Eighteen Palms as a child? What kind of effects can these magical martial arts combine to produce? Therefore, this martial arts game must at least have rich and diverse martial arts, unique and interesting effects, in line with martial arts intuition, and be able to form a more interesting and powerful combat combination by combining external martial arts with internal martial arts and light martial arts. In a real-time combat mode like an MMO, you want to be rich and interesting, you want cool actions, and you want the underlying balance. This is like the impossible triangle in economics, so you usually have to give up a certain link. This is why most martial arts MMOs have the martial arts and skills used at the beginning (you can only change a few routines under large restrictions). 
After thinking about it, the classic turn-based system can be better compatible with this problem. It gives up the instant feedback of every move, but it can give endless possibilities in pre-battle strategic matching. Players can collect all kinds of magical martial arts in this martial arts world, and can also freely join various sects to learn the unique skills of the sects, and finally get enough feedback and fun in the battle through flexible combinations. 
There is a scene in Swordsman that is particularly vivid in my memory. Ren Woxing faced off against Zuo Lengchan, the leader of Songshan Mountain. When Ren Woxing used his famous stunt, the Star Absorbing Technique, Zuo Lengchan cleverly resolved the crisis with the ice energy that he had secretly cultivated for many years. At that time, I was thinking, if my inner strength is ice energy, Then my external skills should also be extremely cold when executed. Based on this, the advanced internal skills in our game will have a small number of attributes related to fire, ice, and poison. They will not only affect the special effects of the player's external skills, but also bring special effects, thus greatly enhancing the viewing and strategy. 2. What is martial arts that can truly take root in your heart? For me when I was young, the answer was hidden in those exciting "adventures" - I always imagined that there was a clear wind hidden in the back of Huashan Mountain, and I could get the guidance of the Dugu Nine Swords; I always looked forward to kowtowing hundreds of times in front of the stone statues in Wuliang Jade Cave to learn the Lingbo Weibu and Beiming magic skills; even when I saw the cliffs, I couldn't help but want to jump, hoping that there were lost martial arts secrets hidden underneath. At that time, martial arts was the romance of "becoming stronger overnight" and the ultimate yearning for ordinary people to counterattack the world. 
But as I get older, I gradually understand the deeper meaning of martial arts, which is far more than just the word "adventure". I began to be moved by those unforgettable love and hate: by Xiao Feng's words: "All the countries in the world, for thousands of years, there is only one A'Zhu" With tears in my eyes, I understood that heroes who are invincible in the world also have irreparable regrets; I felt hot for Yang Guo's stubbornness, "My aunt taught me martial arts, but I still want her to be my wife. You cut me with a thousand knives or ten thousand knives, but I still want her to be my wife." I saw the most stubborn love under the shackles of etiquette; I even felt more like "Master Fengling" This name warmed my heart, and I suddenly remembered that wasn't the Fengling Ferry where Guo Xiang and Yang Guo first met! It turns out that there are some regrets that can be turned into a lifelong concern by time. 
But if martial arts only have the love of children, it would make the family angry. When I read a few words in "The Story of Yitian Slaying the Dragon", "On the day when the city of Xiangyang was destroyed, Guo Daxia and his wife were martyred at the same time as Guo Gong Polu, and the whereabouts of the dragon-slaying knife are unknown.", I couldn't help but burst into tears. 
We don’t want to be a preachy jianghu, and we won’t tell you from the very beginning that “a great chivalrous person serves the country and the people.” Here, you can not only encounter the deep love of "a glance that lasts for ten thousand years", but also encounter the "involuntary" choice; you can not only experience the adventure of "getting secrets from the cliff", but also face the dilemma of "family, country and individual". We just want to spread out this world of "love and hate, righteousness, and choice" in front of you, and see what choices you will make if you have the "Dragon Slaying Skill". 3. Can high-quality martial arts content be created without Jin Yong’s IP? 
If you have the patience to read this, you will definitely feel my sincerity towards Mr. Jin Yong - once upon a time, I was paranoid that in order to restore the purest martial arts flavor, I must bind Jin Yong's original IP. 
It wasn’t until I actually entered the industry and started creating that I suddenly realized: This is actually a sharp double-edged sword. For core book fans, those stories are already familiar to them. If they are just retelling Guo Jing and Huang Rong's story with the camera, players will not buy it. However, if they are adapted rashly, it will easily touch the emotional bottom line of the original work. The slightest deviation will lead to controversy. In the end, it is difficult to have both ends. 
In this case, it is better to break away from the shackles of IP and create a brand new world. The success of "The Legend of Sword" and "Legend of Living Heroes" have long proved that high-quality martial arts can still impress people without relying on the endorsement of classic IP. As long as the story is solid enough and the characters are vivid enough. 
What's more, what Mr. Jin Yong has left us is not only the splendid martial arts universe, but also a set of "dragon-slaying skills" for "writing martial arts well" - it is the historical background of the interweaving of fiction and reality, the creation of characters who dare to collide with fate, and the balance between the "great chivalrous man" and the love between his children. We do not need to reproduce his story, but we are willing to inherit this creative mentality and write a warm martial arts story that belongs to this era in a down-to-earth manner. 1. Re-creation based on real history. 
Jianghu is not a castle in the air. The real background has always been hidden in the texture of history. Mr. Jin Yong knows this very well. The destruction of the family and country in the "Shame of Jingkang" gave weight to the responsibility of chivalry; the defense of the isolated city in the "Battle of Xiangyang" gave the coordinates of righteousness; even Genghis Khan's talents and Kangxi's machinations have become footnotes to the fate of the children of the world. This kind of intertwining of reality and reality of "big things are true and small things are unrestrained" is exactly the core of creation that we want to inherit. 
Therefore, we set the stage of the story in the Northern Song Dynasty. 
This is a contradictory and fascinating era: it is the "pinnacle of Chinese civilization", with Sima Guang's history writing and Wang Anshi's reform in the temple, Su Shi's writing and Ouyang Xiu's tea-sipping elegance, and the brilliance of civilization between the lines; but it is also difficult to escape the "three hundred years of dust in the border area." The fate of the Song, Liao, Xia and Jin banners intertwined at the border, smoke and pastoral songs coexisted, resistance and forbearance coexisted. It is precisely this background of "the symbiosis of elegance and character, the intertwining of prosperity and crisis" that best nourishes the world - not only the fireworks in the streets and alleys, which give the knight's "unfair road" a real landing point; but also the heavy righteousness of the family and the country, making "the sword to the end of the world" no longer an empty slogan; and the love between children in troubled times, making the tenderness of life and death even more precious. 
What we want to do is not to recreate history, but to let you step into this history. Perhaps you will meet Su Shi, who is obsessed with writing lyrics, on the streets of Bianliang, or you may witness Fan Zhongyan's responsibility to "worry before the world's worries" at the border pass. Those celebrities in textbooks and history books will no longer be symbols, but passers-by who will interact with you. In this land where there is both civilized elegance and iron-blooded character, your chivalry will have a unique look. 2. Characters are the soul of martial arts stories. 
The reason why Mr. Jin Yong's Jianghu can travel through time is that the core is never the earth-shattering martial arts, but the souls of flesh and blood who dare to collide with fate. 
We always remember those characters who are engraved in our bones: Guo Jing and Yang Kang. One stuck to their original aspirations for their family and country, the other went astray for fame and fortune. The line of fate had already been written; but their descendants went against the trend, adding a bit more human warmth to the boundary between good and evil. We also feel sorry for Linghu Chong, who is free and easy but cannot be tolerated in Huashan. He is full of sincerity but is misunderstood by the world. Amidst sect disputes and Jianghu schemes, he forcibly walks out a lonely chivalrous path. What’s even more unforgettable is the glass of severing wine at Juxian Manor. Xiao Feng threw the glass to the ground and said, “From now on, the old friendship is wiped out. I don’t mean to be ungrateful when I kill you, and you don’t feel unjust when you kill me.” He said that he could not help himself under the ethnic barriers, but he maintained the dignity of a knight in a desperate situation. 
These characters may have lived in troubled times, suffered infamy, or been deeply misunderstood. Each has its own adventures and sorrows. But the most touching thing is never their unparalleled martial arts, but the stubbornness of "not accepting fate" - Guo Jing resists the label of "foolish loyalty" as a "stupid man", Yang Guo resists the ethics of "different paths between masters and disciples" as a "rebellious", and Xiao Feng resists the fate of "national antagonism" as a "lone minister". This kind of courage to fight against fate is the most moving spiritual power of martial arts. 
We always believe that we can make the characters' joys and sorrows touch people's hearts, let their stubbornness against fate infect every player, and let every choice in the world have the weight of humanity. This is the core of martial arts we want to create. 3. Continue to write some interesting settings 
When reading "The Swordsman", I always kept in mind the setting of Huashan's "Sword Sect and Qi Sect" - the sword moves lightly and the Qi masters the inner essence. The collision of the two martial arts concepts was originally the most touching scenery in the world. However, in the book, the two sects became incompatible, and they would use any means to win or lose, which ultimately became a regret. 
Therefore, we always want to realize a dream: to create a Huashan Sect with "Sword Qi Symbiosis". Here, the differences between the sword sect and the air sect are never life-and-death enmity, but the choice of martial arts path - some people prefer the sharpness of "sword moves that can break all laws", so they devote themselves to studying the secret skills of the sword sect; some people believe in the calmness of "internal force determines the universe", so they delve into the mental methods of qi sect. We will slowly lay out the origin of the sword energy dispute, so that the differences are well-founded, but without persecution or calculation; the disciples of the two sects will also discuss each other regularly, without fighting to the death, and only see the truth when the sword comes and goes, competing for superiority, but also respecting each other. 
There is also the classic gang leader succession ceremony of the Beggar Clan - everyone surrounds the new gang leader and spits, which is not only a test, but also a unique sense of ritual in the world. We can't help but wonder: What would it be like if this ritual fell on another eccentric girl? 
What we want to do is to break up these classic settings and add some fireworks and possibilities - to give the regrets of the past a chance to be fulfilled, and to give new surprises to familiar plots. 4. Commercialization 
This is a very sensitive topic that is difficult to talk about, especially in such an early stage. If you brag and fail to deliver, the Internet will not forget it. After all, I once asked you a rhetorical question during the development period of Tiandao: How do you know we will sell our cultivation (laughing, it was really innocent at the time), and there were 2 We want to keep this bottom line. Firstly, we don’t do card drawing. Most of the knights in martial arts games come from the friendship in the arena through the plot. We hope that the threshold for players to obtain rich lineup combinations is low, and I also deeply understand how resistant everyone is to drawing cards. Secondly, I don’t sell martial arts. Martial arts is the foundation of the world of martial arts. All combat strategies are based on martial arts, and martial arts must be obtained through adventures in the world. This has been deeply engraved in my genes. I will not disgust everyone by showing out martial arts skills because I don’t draw characters. In fact, there are no words to speak of but I would rather go into the game and take a look. This product is a gift to myself, and also to the millions of you who love martial arts. Thanks for playing the game I made.

Are you still envious of other people’s dream houses? Now, it's your turn to amaze everyone! 
"Senbox³" is not a simple decoration game, but a "space wonder editor" of your own. Just scan your room with your phone, and the powerful AI will instantly open the door to a new world for you - whether it's a cyberpunk-style future base or a glass greenhouse with a view of the stars, "explosive changes" can come true with one click! 
Here, you are not only a designer, but also the master of life. 
【Game Features】 
[Magical Ma Liang AI, even a lazy person can become a master] Still having trouble with complex modeling and operations? Forget them! Our world-leading AI space technology makes design as simple as a P drawing. You only need to move your fingers, and AI can read your mind and help you realize all your wild fantasies. Even a handicapped person can become a space master in seconds! 
[Reality and dreams are separated by a door] This is not just a virtual world, but also a "super extension" of your real life! Create a 1:1 replica of your real cabin on your mobile phone, and then invite friends to your virtual mansion to have parties and watch movies. Your home is the coolest new social business card! 
[Console-level picture quality, fit in your pocket] Who says mobile phones can’t have next-generation picture quality? We use the UE5 engine to create a detailed real world for you. The dust in the sun, the texture of the wooden floor, the cold luster of the metal... every frame is a wallpaper, and every corner is worth taking a screenshot to show off! 
[Everything can be hidden, the collection control is ecstatic] Massive cool digital toys, furniture, and artworks are waiting for you to collect! Complete tasks, unlock limited rewards, and turn your "Sen Box" into a unique private museum. 
Are you ready? Download now and start your space adventure! About us
