desc-777424:
"ON ANY JOURNEY" is an immersive two-player cooperative adventure game. 
The game integrates multiple visual styles and designs rich puzzle-solving mechanisms. Players will move forward hand in hand in a dynamic world. When facing challenges, they need to work closely and show their strengths, and feel the power of friendship in the process of joint exploration and puzzle-solving. As the adventure gradually deepens, a warm story full of friendship and self-awareness will slowly unfold, bringing emotional resonance and thinking to players.
desc-586162: The mobile version of the game is published by Netflix. The game is currently available on the Philippine App Store and is exclusive to Netflix members. There is no news about other regions and platforms. Hades is a high-degree-of-freedom hack-and-slash dungeon game that combines the traditional features of many Supergiant classics, including "Bastion" with fast-paced combat, "Transistor" with rich and colorful game environments and in-depth details, and "Pyre" with ups and downs of the storyline as the game characters advance. Fight Your Way Out of Hell As the immortal prince of the underworld, you will wield various weapons full of divine power from Mount Olympus, break away from the clutches of death during the treacherous journey, and become stronger. Each escape action will open more exciting stories. Unleash the wrath of Olympus and the gods of Olympus will protect you! In the adventure with Zeus, Athena, Poseidon and more great gods, you can obtain dozens of powerful gifts, which will make your combat power soar. Embark on a journey to escape from the dark hell, and various game characters will accompany you to defeat demons along the way. Make friends with gods, ghosts and monsters. A group of legends with distinctive personalities are waiting for your appearance! Deepen your relationship with them and experience hundreds of unique adventure stories, and gradually learn the shocking secrets of this complex clan of gods. Thrilling and exciting, never tire of playing it. Every time you go deep into the ever-changing underworld, you will get new surprises. The ultimate guardian of the underworld will "care about you". Use the powerful Holy Mirror of the Night to permanently strengthen your abilities and escape the suffering of the underworld more easily next time. Challenges are endless Possibilities Permanent upgrades mean you don’t have to be a god to experience thrilling combat and a gripping story. However, if you think you are worthy of a god, you can increase the difficulty of the challenge and experience more thrilling actions to see if you, who have experienced hundreds of battles, can withstand this test. Classic SUPERGIANT style Supergiant's various games are rich in content, majestic, and have a unique style that combines gameplay and storytelling. This game is fully demonstrated in this game: the spectacular hand-painted underworld environment and the chilling original soundtrack create an eerie and immersive atmosphere in the underworld.
devnote-768991:
The road of game development of the 18-line transparent painter! About getting started: 
I am a homebody and also very socially anxious! I like to draw and raise hamsters on a daily basis. This was my entire life before. Suddenly one day, I thought that I might try to make a visual novel game with the theme of "Rat", which can be regarded as realizing my dream since childhood! 
Since there is only one person, we can only do everything from character design, script planning, game illustrations, etc. Under normal circumstances, it takes more than 6 hours to draw a picture on average (my drawing skills are not good and I usually teach myself). Nothing complicated, but not that simple for me either. About the rumors: 
I confirm and confirm that all the content in the game is my own original work (with complete supporting documents), and there are no untrue behaviors as mentioned in the rumors! At the same time, my games and I have always supported all fan creations that comply with national laws and regulations. If I find more false rumors again, I will pursue legal rights protection through legal channels. The Internet is not a place outside the law. Insults, rumors, and bounties also come with a price! Regarding apology: 
As an 18th-line transparent painter with little social experience and severe social fear, I apologize for all the inappropriate remarks (ambiguous words) I made out of emotion in the past when fighting for my own legitimate rights and interests. I also hope that all friends who like my games can support me as always! This is my last public explanation for the untrue remarks on the Internet. I will concentrate on making games next, so please stay tuned.
desc-799126:
Embark on a fun and exciting adventure with your friends! 
"Campus" is a physics party game that combines a micro-horror atmosphere with joyful cooperation. You will play the role of a student with super powers, sneaking into a dangerous campus. While avoiding the pursuit of monsters, you will carry contaminated items scattered everywhere, and work with your partners to save the campus! 
【Game Features】 
-All operations simulate real physics. Hand slips, falling on the ground, bumping into a ball... all kinds of accidents made the transportation process full of laughter. 
-There are monsters with different abilities wandering around the campus. Some listen to the sound to identify the location, and some observe secretly... stay quiet, be alert to abnormal noises around you, and formulate strategies to avoid them. . Or kill them! 
-Immersive floor scraping. In the ever-changing levels, discover recycled items hidden everywhere, and a large number of unexpected interactive effects make every action full of surprises. 
- Form a team of four. Whether it's hard work to transport or physically attracting monsters, tacit cooperation is the key to your success. The school also provides a variety of practical props. Proper use can help you get twice the result with half the effort!
devnote-769654:
Hello everyone, I am Lao Ye, the producer of the Fantasy Blade game. When I wrote this, I have been unemployed for more than half a year. They say that the gaming industry thrives on youth, but after all, it still hasn’t survived young people. Fortunately, I have two old partners who are as good at optimizing as me - programmer Can Can and artist Ajie. We often team up to play DNF and Exile during our off work hours, and we work together over lunch. Looking for a job takes time anyway, so we might as well team up and make a game demo together to see if we can get investment or something, and then we have this Diablo + team + meat pigeon + construction game. 
We will serve every game player well and make a fun game. Player bosses can contact us if you have any questions. If you don't reply in time, please wait. It may be because you are facing life. The server may not be very good, and you really can't afford a good one. Please forgive me for the lag problem when you play. We will try to replace it with a better one as soon as possible. Finally, I hope you all like our game. 
Since this is the first time the game has been put on the shelves, I don’t understand many parts very well. Including the 5 pictures, I just looked at how others made them. It took me almost a month to complete them after I changed them several times. Of course, I will also play with you in the game. I hope everyone will give you positive feedback on the deficiencies, and we will slowly improve them. ——Lao Ye, Can Can, Ajie
desc-769654:
"Fantasy Blade" is a multiplayer online RPG built with dark style + meat pigeon + genre + equipment grinding! [Choose a career, there is a division of labor] 
You can choose your own profession, you can fight alone, and when you join a group, you need to coordinate strategies! [Playing construction, really good] 
Skill trees, power entries, and meat pigeon cards are linked layer by layer, and the more groups you have, the more fun you have! [Light-meat pigeons can make a comeback] 
The meat pigeons in the game are constantly stacking up, and there is a chance for a comeback even if the wind is against you! [Form a team and go brush the book] 
It’s more fun to browse and push pictures online. Call your brothers and join us! [Come to the guild and hug together] 
Help each other grow, fight side by side, and grow together to have a sense of belonging! [To defeat BOSS, rely on operation] 
Read moves, move, and seize opportunities. The more you play, the more you will feel a sense of accomplishment!
desc-768991:
Due to "special" work needs, your superior has arranged to live in a very remote and deserted villa. I thought that the boring life would continue, but every night, strange sounds would come from the dark attic... Do you want to go up and have a look? What kind of beginning is waiting for you? A fateful encounter: 
In the fictional world of the 1990s, which is full of mystery and unknowns, a little-known private laboratory organization is quietly operating in a hidden corner of the city! 
"He" was terrified and ran away. In a panic, "he" hid in a slightly outdated villa on the outskirts of the city. At a glance, the villa is obscured by tall trees around it. The branches and leaves rustle in the wind, and the chirping of birds in the forest seems to tell countless secrets. 
During the game, you will play the role of the protagonist "Andade", who is arranged to live in this villa due to "special" work needs, and unintentionally accompany "him" in the attic day and night, and spend the next interesting days together! Unknown growth route: 
You can feed "him" different foods, teach him daily life behaviors, record changing growth data, etc., and experience the fun of growing up immersively. 
Become an emotionless money-making machine? 
Becoming a close life partner? 
Become a reliable comrade to fight side by side? 
....... 
Everything is possible! ! ! Destiny-changing choices: 
The game currently has 14 different endings, completely different branch plots, and different development theaters at each stage, which will allow you to experience life exchange again and again! Every different choice will change everyone's destiny! 
A happy life or a devilish abyss, it all depends on your thoughts!
devnote-799126:
Dear students: 
Welcome to "Bullshit on Campus"! We are a small team full of obsession with "playing with friends". Rather than making a traditional game, we want to build a stage of fun for you. Here, scenes of hilarious little theaters dedicated to you will be staged, and various interesting mechanisms and monsters will become your exclusive supporting characters. 
The game is currently in its early stages, and we are still working on polishing the game experience. Several people are huddled in the studio all day long thinking about how to make the game more hilarious and make monsters and props more interesting. Our biggest wish is to create a world of nonsense that everyone is willing to call their friends and experience constantly, full of oolongs and joy. 
We firmly believe that what truly makes a game shine is never just the developer's vision. Every laugh, every kind comment, and every sincere suggestion you make is the most important and precious blueprint for repairing this campus. 
Thank you to the students for being willing to be a part of this place at the beginning of its construction - the opening bell of "The Wild Campus" has rang. We look forward to continuing to contribute to it with you and your friends, and to write more joyful and unforgettable stories on this campus!
desc-764445:
Exploring + farming + breeding, gliding above the sea of flowers on floating islands~~ 
In this broken star cluster captured by gravity, gravity no longer points to the feet, but to the unknown abyss. As a wandering survivor, you make your home on floating interstellar debris. Catch dandelions and glide in the wind, climb precipitous floating islands, herd exotic insects, and plant a sea of ​​sunflowers. Even in the face of the fate of eventually falling, we must live every day as poetically free. This is an idyll on the edge of an abyss.
desc-808743:
The waning moon rises in the first watch, people set up Bai Nuo in the second watch, the third watch and the fourth watch follow the fifth watch, and Zichou Yinmao breaks the chaos. 
"Twelve Talks of Yuan Ye" is a new strange folk strategy RPG independently developed by Youka Network. It depicts the confusion and weirdness of the city and presents the daily life and impermanence in life. Players will become Feng Shui detectives, discern clues, and turn the wheel of fate. In the process of uncovering strange phenomena, you get to know capable people and figure out the truth and order.
devnote-808743:
Hello everyone, we are the production team of Yuanye Twelve Talks. 
The Twelve Talks of Yuan Ye is a strategy RPG game independently developed by us. It will tell a story related to the moon with elements of strange stories. 
The land where we grow up has accumulated profound history and folklore. We were influenced by what we heard and saw, so from these deep accumulations, we took some small moonlight and created an urban monster game with unique temperament. In the story, you will meet some strangers who stand in the shadows to guard the boundaries of humanity. Through the weird things that happen in the city of [Tianshu], you will uncover and explore the boundaries between daily life and impermanence. Discover the impermanence of the world in ordinary daily life. 
I hope that when you travel through the city of Tianshu, you will have adventures in the streets and alleys, and you will also have a fruitful and hearty experience. 
People today cannot see the moon of ancient times, but today's moon once illuminated the ancient people. The first full moon day of every year is Yuan Ye, but here, from the first night when you set your eyes on us, our story begins: Yuan Ye.
desc-184928: Healing Town is a charming town-building simulation game in which players play as the leaders of a group of villagers and work together to build a town. Some people want to survive, while others want to create something amazing. It's up to you to guide them toward their goals. Control the wishes of town leaders and carefully balance your resources to guide your town towards prosperity. Every choice you make has a direct impact on the development of your town and the happiness of your followers. Features: - Experience a series of different levels, each with its own unique style and challenges to overcome, with more to come. - Get involved in the game, manage your resources carefully, and keep your followers happy, or they might rebel! - A relaxing and rich story that follows different town leaders in search of a carefree, natural way of life. -A wide variety of buildings to choose from, with specific functions critical to the success of your community.
desc-776263:
"This year's winter vacation will probably be the same as in previous years. ... I really hate celebrating the New Year." On an ordinary winter day in 2018, Zhao Ying skipped school and avoided family conflicts as usual. In this familiar yet suffocating small city, her life was like an old calendar, pages being torn away silently. And this year, a puppy, an inappropriate encounter, and several unexpected relationships quietly changed everything. 
Who will change her trajectory? A sunny and straightforward friend, a shady classmate in the class, or the weird girl in the neighborhood? There will always be ripples in the unchanging life - the nosy head teacher, the male classmate who fell in love with her at first sight, the arrogant social girl in the dormitory, and... her family. 
"Paper House" is a visual novel game. The story unfolds from the perspective of high school student Zhao Ying. By choosing different dialogues and actions, players will affect the relationship with the three targets and trigger different plot directions and endings. 
3 character branches + 1 hidden line 
200,000+ words of text 
12 branch endings 
40 hand-drawn scenes 
50 CGs 
Nearly a thousand vertical drawing differences 
... 
1. Contains LGBTQ-related descriptions 
2. Contains content such as school violence and domestic violence that may cause PTSD 
3. This story is entirely fictitious, please do not substitute it into reality.
desc-776383: Genuine IP authorization! A new kung fu adventure begins in "Kung Fu Panda: Dragon Warrior"! Make an appointment now to return to Peace Valley and start your Dragon Warrior journey! Hey, come to "Peace Valley", transform into the Dragon Warrior, and fight side by side with classic characters such as Po, Tiger, and Master! Experience the original movie plot, explore a vast world full of oriental aesthetics, use cool and gorgeous kung fu moves, and protect the peace of the valley!
devnote-776383:
Hello everyone, Dragon Warriors! 
We are the development team behind Kung Fu Panda: Dragon Warrior. We are a group of loyal fans of the "Kung Fu Panda" series. Being able to create this game ourselves is a dream come true for us, and it is also a heavy responsibility. 
Our original intention is to create a game that not only restores the essence of the IP, but also brings a relaxing and happy experience. We don’t want to make a game that makes players feel “stressed” and “burdened.” Therefore, we chose a combination of simulated management, placement and collection, and strategic auto-chess. We hope that it can become a source of happiness for everyone in their spare time, and they can easily enjoy the fun of becoming the Dragon Warrior. 
During the development process, we tried our best to restore the world full of oriental charm. From a line and an action of the character to every brick and tile of the scene, we have repeatedly polished it, hoping to live up to everyone's expectations. We ourselves still get goosebumps when we hear the movie's original soundtrack playing. 
We know that your trust is crucial. Therefore, we promise to operate with conscience and give back to all players with the most generous benefits. This game belongs to all of you who love Kung Fu Panda, and we will listen carefully to every suggestion you have. 
Finally, thank you all for your attention and reservations. See you in Peace Valley! ——"Kung Fu Panda: Dragon Warrior" development team
desc-230184: Launched by Gaijin, a well-known war game developer, and represented by Zhanhuo Interactive Entertainment, a veteran domestic military game operator, it is a war-themed squad commander FPS online game.

devnote-752253:
Dear future island owner: 
Hey~ hello to those who are getting ready to land on the island! Our "Final Neverland" development team focuses on "promoting infrastructure on the island". After all, everyone is thinking: The sea has almost swallowed the mainland, so if I give you an island, what kind of life would you like? First of all, farming is absolutely essential! The farming DNA in my heart has awakened~ I water it diligently every day, watch the seedlings grow upwards, sprout new leaves today, bear buds tomorrow, and hold heavy fruits when the harvest comes. The sense of accomplishment of "I raised this with my own hands!" can simply eliminate all worries with one click! Of course the house needs to be arranged too! Want a dream cabin where you can "lie on the glass roof and count the stars, surrounded by hydrangeas"? Make it! Do you like the forest style of "a crooked wooden house covered with ivy"? Start work immediately! From the placement of bricks to the overall shape, you have the final say! The components can be rotated and stacked at will, and even if you want to build a "magical building that does not exist in reality", it is completely OK - after all, here, you are the creator of the island! Is the island targeted by mutant creatures? Don't be afraid! Your cross-time and space rescue team is online - familiar comrades and mysterious helpers will all fight for you! By joining the pioneering organization, you can summon this group of super-powerful partners, lie back and watch them carry the whole team, and easily defend your homeland! Mutant creature? It's a piece of cake for our pioneering team~ Once you've finished farming, building, and killing monsters, congratulations on your official promotion to the all-powerful island owner! The next step... of course is to study how to make the crops grow more prosperously, the house be decorated more beautifully, and the partners become stronger! The goal of our development team is simple - let you live a desert island life on this island into a healing fairy tale! What are you waiting for? Come on, get in the car and play together~
desc-684180:
"Revelation of Decay" is a zombie survival game that is not so "scary" and even a bit hilarious. You will explore this pixel world full of unknown anomalies, awaken and use your superpowers, and gradually uncover the truth behind the anomaly invasion during your adventure against mutated monsters and endless zombie waves. Zombie survival×power awakening! Exploration, looting, and fighting are your daily routine. When a zombie encounters a person with superpowers, the attitude of fear is instantly reversed. This isn't a traditional apocalypse - the screams here belong to monsters. Game Features【Post-apocalyptic open world】 
Pass through a lost town full of zombies, step into dangerous snowfields, and sneak into a mysterious military base... Explore eight areas with different styles (there may be more), challenge unique environments and mechanisms, and recover necessary survival resources. [Awakening superpowers, fighting against abnormalities] 
200+ random props, 50+ special abilities, support self-modification of weapons, build your doomsday survival BUILD, fight against powerful BOSS with different mechanisms, and defeat magic with magic! [Form a legion and create an invincible division] 
Gather the available forces at Doomsday, whether they come from NPCs, enemies, or the Paw Team! You can bring up to 30 boys into battle. 【Zombie Destruction Factory】 
There are not many people in the apocalypse, but there are many zombies. Squeeze the wild labor force, build your own exclusive base, and move from the hands-on farming era to electrical automation. 
PS: Supports two-player online play. Call a friend, and the number of friends will be doubled. You will no longer be afraid of the zombie wave. [Twilight party outlined in rust-colored pixels] 
The rust color and warm orange are intertwined, and the pixel particles are blurred to create a doomsday world, and the fantasy dusk party begins.
desc-718299:
"Astral Ascent" (original name: Astral Ascent) is a 2D platform rogue-lite game set in a modern fantasy world. As one of 4 heroes with different personalities, you must try to escape from the Garden. This large garden is an astral prison guarded by 12 powerful and evil bosses, also known as the "Twelve Star Palace". 【Game Features】 
• Five unique heroes: Play characters with different personalities (such as fighter Kiran, rift traveler Yamat), use differentiated skill systems, and become a "spell warrior" to release gorgeous combos. 
• In-depth meat pigeon construction: Unlock hundreds of spells and halos, combine multiple genres to face the guardians of the 12 constellations, and experience dynamic boss battles and fragmented narratives. 
• Pixel art feast: Hand-drawn frame-by-frame animation creates 4 fantasy worlds, with gorgeous skill special effects without losing operational clarity. [Mobile optimization] 
• Touch customization interface: Customize the skill button layout to adapt to one-handed operation habits. 
• Enhanced portability: real-time archiving function, taking into account fragmented play and in-depth experience. 
• Performance adaptation: Optimize rendering for different devices to ensure smooth frame combat. *** Break the star prison at your fingertips and build your own escape legend ***
desc-752253:
"Final Neverland" - Farming fantasy on the island! When the sea level engulfs the world, bring your seeds and partners with you, and on this deserted island that can "grow", you can reclaim land from the sea, divert water for irrigation, build houses and plant flowers, fight monsters, and live the end of the world into a healing fairy tale. Let's go on this wonderful journey of land and love together ~ [Healing farming, rejuvenating the land] 
On the deserted island, the land is waiting to be awakened~ You can divert water to irrigate the dry land, or you can reclaim the sea and expand the land to expand a new home, sow seeds, watch the sprouts emerge and bear fruit, and find the slow-paced healing feeling in farming~ [Freely create landscaping, pretend to be your own small world] 
Want to build a forest-style wooden house or a seaside greenhouse? From bricks and tiles to flowers and plants, it’s all up to your liking! There are no restrictions, just use your imagination and turn the beautiful scenes in your mind into reality little by little ~ [Various fashions, new looks every day] 
There are so many styles waiting for you to choose from in your wardrobe~ Elegant ancient style, energetic trendy clothes, fantasy forest style... You can wear it however you want, change into a new outfit every day, and be the most beautiful boy in the small world~ [Stand by your companions to protect the island from being alone] 
Friends who have traveled through time and space, whether familiar or unfamiliar, will join hands with you to fight against the enemy at this moment. Join the pioneer organization, expel mutant creatures, and protect the tranquility and peace of this island~ Hold the shovel in your hand, bring like-minded friends, and you can have a warm life in the wilderness! Come to "Final Neverland" and make this place a healing paradise!
devnote-758354:
The childhood and adolescence of our generation were fed by two things: 
The thick books circulated in the classroom drawers, and the light and shadow flowing on the TV or monitor after school. The earliest real feeling about "cultivating immortality" may not come from the profound classics, but from the lawless monkey. He told us that rules can be broken and heaven can be conquered. 
Later, we met the first group of "fellow Taoists" among the yellowed pages of the rental bookstore. In "Ethereal Journey", for the first time, there is a clear path for cultivation like a game guide; "Buddha is the Tao" turns ancient myths into a spicy and enjoyable stew. When we grow older, we will hide in bed and watch "The Story of a Mortal's Cultivation of Immortality" on MP3. Every cautious step Han Li takes is like previewing the laws of the jungle for us in adult society. At that time, "cultivating immortality" became our common code. Saying "Friends, please stay" can quickly identify similar people in unfamiliar forums. Later, the screen started to move. Qin Yu's struggle in "The Change of Stars", the cost-burning fight in every frame of the animation "The Story of a Mortal", Chinese comics use new language to turn the familiar words into perceptible waves and swords. Those characters, from names on paper, have become partners who can move, laugh, and make us shout "key" in the barrage. Nowadays, we are scattered in all directions, running for life. But while commuting on the subway and during lunch breaks, we will still click on that familiar novel app or video website to catch up on a chapter or watch an episode. Seeing "My son Wang Teng" makes you smile knowingly, and hearing "The top of the immortal, proud of the world" still makes your heart surge for a moment. That's not just recreation. That was our way of confirming that we were still in the same "fairyland". The dream we have fed together has never disappeared, it has just changed in a different way, accompanying us as we grow up, and protecting the peach blossom garden in our hearts that we do not want to hand over to reality. Then at the dinner party on the eve of the launch, a certain manager took a bite of meat skewers and said vaguely: "The last time I ate like this was the night before the launch." "You said at the time that you were a loser in this business again." A certain planner smiled and handed over a tissue. "Wow." Unexpectedly, the planner didn't change his expression. A certain No. 2 planner looked up from the hot pot with tears in his eyes: "Then...what does this time mean?" The chief planner sitting next to him squeezed the Coke can slightly to deform it, and the water droplets formed on the can dripped onto the back of his hand. He stared at the water stain for two seconds: "It's considered debt repayment." 
Everyone at the table turned to look at him. 
"I owe it to those old players back then." His voice was low, as if he was saying to himself, "I owe it to myself too." The air was quiet for three seconds. Then five people raised their Coke cans at the same time—not clinking glasses, just raising them, as if to confirm each other's presence. Fine water droplets condensed on the outer wall of the aluminum can, which shone brightly under the light.
desc-807613:
Relying on Touch, V Project interweaves the stage, daily life and character stories into a complete world. 
There is no need to play any role, here, every interaction is responded to, every love has an echo - every encounter between you and your idol is like a real encounter that is within reach...
devnote-721171: Hello everyone, I am the producer of Brotato. Brotato was developed and produced by me alone and launched early access testing on Steam in September last year. It has received nearly 20,000 comments and 97% positive reviews. Currently, Brotato has also been officially launched on Steam on June 24, 2023! If you like Vampire Survivor, 20 Minutes to Dawn, and The Binding of Isaac, I think you'll also like my Potato Brothers! I’m looking forward to seeing everyone’s feedback on the beta! Thanks!
devnote-792018: Hello fellow lords! This is the development team of "Dynasty Warriors Tenxia". If any kind of gameplay can be called fun, then "Unparalleled Combat" deserves it. In our opinion, the game must first have a fun enough core gameplay before we can talk about other things. This is the cornerstone. And pure "unparalleled combat" is what our team wants to do. The complete battlefield presence and the extremely refreshing Musou battle can be said to form the core of the "Musou series". In "Dynasty Warriors Tenxia", we have completely restored the battle map of the "Warriors Series" and the number of soldiers on the same screen, ensuring that the immersive battlefield with thousands of troops rushing towards you can also be presented on the mobile phone screen. At the same time, we have retained the "unparalleled" refreshing combo experience, and combined with the continuous pursuit action system, you can launch counterattacks or pursuits according to the enemy's status and distance, flexibly use dodge, rebound and attack, and cooperate with large-scale AOE skills to achieve a freely combined combo experience. It allows novice players to realize varied tactics through simple operations; it reserves the deep space for hardcore players to delve into combos and pursue the ultimate output, so as to achieve refreshing enemy clearing and immersive unparalleled combat. An immersive Three Kingdoms battle also needs to be tactical. Each general in "Dynasty Warriors" has a unique skill module and attribute tendency. Your duty is to match and flexibly switch your general lineup according to battlefield objectives (such as siege, beheading generals, and clearing out miscellaneous soldiers). On this basis, we have also added a new military commander support system. You can also summon supporting military commanders at any time during battle to help you and integrate tactical games into clearing enemies quickly. In addition, we also tried to add some meat pigeon gameplay to allow the generals to get some benefits to add freshness to the unparalleled battle process. In terms of gameplay, we have also added online and challenge gameplay. You can team up with friends at any time to fight together. We hope to take into account the needs of different types of players in the design of various levels and strive to find a balance between casual and hardcore. You can choose to quickly clear the map in a short time, or you can choose a difficult challenge that requires precise coordination. "Dynasty Warriors Tenxia" is now officially available for pre-order. We hope that everyone can provide more feedback and work with us to create this truly unparalleled action game for mobile devices.
desc-824869:
The outside world has died, and this never-ending train is a mobile shelter for the last survivors on Earth. And you are the security inspector and conductor of this steel ark, and you are also the "god of death" who decides who can get on the train. "I Drive a Train at the End of the World" is not a mindless killing, but a cruel test of human nature and observation skills. High-pressure Security Check Simulation: Each station has survivors eager to get on board. Use a temperature gun, a scanner, and your gut to scrutinize every face. Is that man with evasive eyes out of fear or infection? 
Ark Survival Management: The carriage space is limited and resources are scarce. You need to properly place healthy survivors, isolate suspicious people, and even make cruel "cleaning" decisions when necessary to save the lives of the entire vehicle. 
Chain of Suspicion in Closed Spaces: Viruses are extremely cunning, and infected people may be lurking among the passengers you just released. In the claustrophobic and swaying carriage, deal with sudden mutation crises and maintain the fragile order. A journey into the unknown: The railway tracks extend deep into the foggy wasteland. Upgrade your train facilities, collect medical resources, and search for clues to healing and hope on your endless journey. One oversight on your part could turn the entire train into a moving graveyard. Please open your eyes, the future of mankind depends on you.
devnote-824869: Hello, future train conductor. When conceiving "I Drive a Train in the Doomsday", our team kept thinking about a question: In a real doomsday wasteland, is the most desperate thing the monsters outside, or the cruel choices that must be made to maintain the last spark of civilization? We ultimately decided to strip away the usual hustle and bustle of combat in favor of a quieter, yet more oppressive survival experience. We hope to put you in an extremely tangled position - you are not only the driver of the train, but also the gatekeeper of this "doomsday ark". The core of the game's design lies in the "crisis of trust." When the train stops at the wasteland station and you face the survivors in ragged clothes with pleading eyes, the detection instrument in your hand is your only reliance. We’ve internalized the horror—the threat is no longer a distant swarm of corpses, but the possibility of lurking inside the seemingly innocent passenger you just let go. In this small, claustrophobic carriage, every "release" or "rejection" you make carries huge moral pressure and existential risks. We hope you can experience the tension of walking on thin ice here and the sense of responsibility of guarding the last line of defense for mankind. Good luck to you, conductor, your eyes determine the fate of mankind.
desc-721171:
A spaceship from Potato World crashes on an alien planet. Brotato, the potato brother, is the only survivor and the only potato brother who can carry 6 weapons at the same time. Before Brotato waits for his friends to rescue him, he has to find a way to survive in this dangerous place! 
The weapon is preset for automatic fire, but you can also choose a manual aiming setting! 
Fast-paced (each game is less than 30 minutes)! 
There are dozens of characters for you to choose from, I believe you can come up with a satisfactory play style (one-handed play, crazy attack, super lucky type, mage style, etc.)! 
Hundreds of props and weapons for you to choose from (flame launcher, submachine gun, rocket launcher, staff or stone)! 
Local co-op functionality for up to four players 
Each wave of enemy attacks will last for 20 to 90 seconds. Find ways to kill more enemies during this period and survive! 
Pick up experience to upgrade, and go to the store to get some props between each wave of enemy attacks! 
Custom difficulty options: You can adjust the enemy's health, damage and speed in the settings to find the difficulty that suits you best and start your journey of survival!
devnote-773516:
Hello fellow TapTap cookies~ I am Lao H, the producer of "Biscuit Man Alliance"! I am finally able to chat with you about the progress of the national server on Tap, and my hands are a little excited at this moment - reservations for the national server on all platforms have been officially opened! The day when we break into the waffle tower together is really getting closer! In fact, during this period of time, the team has been busy localizing and polishing the version: from adjusting the gameplay to suit the habits of Chinese players, to optimizing screen details, and even developing a PC version to enhance the game experience - after all, knowing that everyone has been waiting for so long, we always want to deliver the most comfortable experience to you first. Now the good news is that the first test is coming soon! In the national server version, you can experience cute world adventures, encounters and development of ever-changing biscuits, fantasy box garden level exploration, multi-player dungeons, and special gameplay exclusive to the national server! Friends who want to get the test qualifications and version progress as soon as possible, remember to click "Reservation" + "Follow" first. If there is any news, I will definitely synchronize it on Tap as soon as possible~ By the way, the first test is not just for us to show the results, but also to hear everyone's real feedback! Whether you think a certain gameplay is not cool enough or you want to add some little easter eggs, you are welcome to mention it when the time comes. We will carefully note down everything you say and make changes! And a secret spoiler: this first test is just the beginning, and we will also make exclusive content for the players of the national server in the future - it may be a special cookie skin, or it may be a special activity gameplay of the national server. In short, it is to let everyone have a unique happiness in the world of waffle towers ~ Finally, I want to say a serious thank you: from the beginning of receiving everyone's reminders, to now being able to open the reservation, it is really thanks to every cookie's waiting and support. In the days to come, please join us and continue this adventure! "Biscuit Man Alliance" national server R&D team 
Sincerely, Old H
desc-792018:
"Dynasty Warriors Tenka" is a warrior action game officially authorized by Koei Tecmo. Here, you will experience the original "one ride against a thousand" and immerse yourself in the war-torn battlefield of the Three Kingdoms! [Immersive Experience Unparalleled Battlefield] 
The Yellow Turban Uprising, Lu Bu at Hulao Pass, Zhao Yun at Changbanpo... battles at various levels reappear! The unparalleled action gameplay and map scenes are reproduced to the greatest extent, just for the immersive presentation of the unparalleled battlefield! [1V100 Ten thousand people cannot open it] 
Move freely and fight without restraint! Experience the visual impact of hundreds of people on the same screen, become a famous general of the Three Kingdoms, fight happily among thousands of troops, and feel the true "one ride against a thousand". 【Continuous Chase Wushuang Flurry】 
The continuous pursuit system is reproduced, launching counterattacks or pursuits according to the enemy general's status and distance, and using the "unparalleled skills" to explode, clear the screen and control the enemy, and create your own battlefield rhythm! [Block and counterattack, general support] 
Make flexible use of dodges and rebounds to find out your tricks! Use a wide range of AOE skill combinations to freely combo, summon supporting generals to defeat the enemy with one move, and enjoy unparalleled combat! [Martial Arts Showdown, Competing for the Peak] 
Brand new PVP martial arts hall-fighting general gameplay is coming! Control multiple generals in real time, engage in fierce duels with other players, aspire to be the strongest warrior, and win exclusive honors and rewards based on your strength!
desc-773516:
"Biscuit Man Alliance" is a 3D action team adventure mobile game under the Cookie Man IP. It combines a variety of gameplay methods such as box garden exploration, single-player level-breaking, and co-fighting dungeons. There is also an exclusive gameplay for the national server that is under development. The adventure begins with this mysterious waffle tower full of magic. The dangerous witch and the oven pose a threat to the waffle tower. The kind-hearted biscuit meets different partners during the journey and rides on the star coal train to save the waffle tower. 
The Waffle Tower is a magical tower that towers into the clouds. The journey will pass through mysterious forests, bustling towns, confusing mazes, jungles, deserts and snowy mountains... countless box garden scenes are waiting for Little Biscuit to explore! 
In the game, you will also meet biscuits with different personalities and unique abilities, build equipment, train and upgrade to grow continuously, and fight with them against the evil dark power! How to make better use of their abilities depends entirely on your strategy combination, Little Biscuit! Join us together to form our Biscuit People Alliance and let every biscuit become a hero! [Biscuit Man IP’s new work, the adventure in the cute world begins] 
In the dessert world, different snacks live here...including cookies, of course! These sweet and brave beings decided to inherit the legend of guarding the waffle tower, and began a thrilling and fun-filled adventure story. The three-dimensional dream world, dessert wonders, and biscuit civilization recorded in the book of adventure will slowly unfold during the train journey... [Exploration of Hakoba Levels and Fantasy Waffle Tower Journey] 
Mazes, mechanisms, and enemies of different shapes! The mysterious waffle tower is filled with different wonderful levels, unpredictable mechanisms and enemies with different styles and characteristics. As the tower level rises, you will face more exciting challenges and adventures... Are you ready, little cookie? [Sweet biscuit development, meet various partners] 
Different biscuit partners are on board the Star Coal Train. They are baked with different recipes, and they are different beings. They all have unknown stories. Come closer to them and experience the fantasy world of biscuits. You may wish to explore the best team combination during the battle, and strengthen the biscuits with personally crafted equipment and materials, so that you can face the crises and challenges hidden deep in the waffle tower! [Multiple people fight together to defeat the devil] 
Team up with friends online and cooperate to challenge various co-fighting modes. Work together to cause damage to the leader, defend until the last moment amid layers of sieges, complete various tasks and go on a crusade... the little biscuits join forces to create a miracle! You can also join a guild to meet more partners and establish your own cookie alliance. [Exclusive gameplay and special content for the national server will be presented soon] 
The new national server exclusive cookies are fully collected, and various national server exclusive gameplays such as PVP, tower defense, map editing, etc. are under development... so stay tuned!
desc-237074:
A pixel game that allows you to experience rural pastoral life. Appreciate the maple leaves in autumn, watch the snow scene in winter, warm yourself by the fire in the snow house, and occasionally go to the roadside store to buy some fruits. 
Enjoy a leisurely and comfortable life~
devnote-805623:
Hello fellow monks, and all the book fans who love "Beyond Time"! We have always cherished the awe of the original work and worked hard to create this Chinese-style immortal cultivation mobile game, just to restore the weirdness and grandeur of the ancient continent: in the shadow of the doomsday when the gods open their eyes, you will shoulder the heavy responsibility of the broken sect, gather monks, expand territory, resist crises, move forward side by side with your allies, and bravely move forward towards the ultimate mission. We carefully polish every detail and wait to go on this timeless journey of cultivating immortality with you. 
"Beyond Time" mobile game development team
desc-741242: Developed and published by Curve Animation, the mobile version of "Liar's Bar", which won the 2024 Steam "Unlimited Gameplay Innovation Award" award, has recently been launched on Google Play. The Liar's Tavern is the town's most twisted and exciting hangout. This is no ordinary bar - it's full of lies, deceit and mind games. Grab a seat for four and immerse yourself in the ultimate first-person online multiplayer experience, where cunning and trickery are key. According to officials, the mobile version of "Liar's Tavern" was developed by the same team as the PC version, allowing players to enjoy an exciting gaming experience no matter where they are, while also being optimized for mobile devices. Players will be able to play with friends or compete against players from around the world in intense 2-4 player matches. In the mobile version of Liar's Tavern, Liar's Deck is currently the only playable mode. Additional game modes and features will be introduced in future updates.
desc-759590:
Heart of Kalutia—— 
This place is called Abyss 
Unlike where you grew up, this is no safe haven. 
On the black earth after the disaster, only sparks of civilization remain. 
An accident that fell into the abyss led to a destined encounter. In this place of death where violent monsters rage, 
The first thing you and Mitora, who has also lost his memory, is to find a way to survive in the wilderness. 
Repair the camp from scratch and help the inhabitants of the abyss solve their problems. 
Go deep into the ruins to repair the "craftsmanship" and calm the beast tide, 
Recover lost memories and truth, 
Write the future and hope of "Abyss". "Even if you fall into the abyss and lose your past, craftsmen can recast everything!" 
Hold the craftsman hammer in your hand and embark on your abyss adventure!
desc-805623:
Beyond life and death, beyond heaven and earth, beyond time, what is waiting for us? 
"Beyond Time" is a real-time business simulation card mobile game officially authorized by Ergen. The "remnant face of the god" hangs high in the sky. When it opens its eyes, wherever it looks is the beginning of disaster. The human civilization of cultivating immortals is close to collapse. At this time of crisis, you gather everyone to rebuild the sect of cultivating immortals. Based on a suspended island on a hidden continent, you go to the restricted area to collect cultivation resources and build the strongest sect! [Genuine IP Authorization] 
Restore the original work in depth, witness the ruins of the sect ruins, the forbidden area full of strange and dangerous monsters, and the many practitioners who fight against "alien" erosion of the body and spirit, and witness the real Wanggu Continent! [Building a sect from scratch] 
Rebuild and upgrade important facilities such as the sect's main hall, weapon refining pavilion, and alchemy workshop, and complete landscapes such as spiritual fields, lotus ponds, bamboo forests, and waterfalls to create the strongest sect in Wanggu Continent! 【Complete collection of classic characters】 
What you see is what you get. Search for the monks you like in the long river of time and recruit them. Original characters such as Xu Qing, Lei Dui, Zixuan Shangxian, etc. are all accepted into the sect, and you can easily collect all illustrated books! 【Become the strongest leader】 
Use the sect's facilities to produce equipment and supplies, eliminate the "foreignness" contaminated during battles and improve your cultivation, becoming a solid rear base camp for the monks! [The gods open their eyes and a strange attack takes place] 
The gods open their eyes, it’s a night of blood and rain! The sect formation is opened, gather all the monks to resist the mutated monsters, and obtain massive resources after defeating them!
desc-195425:
A brand new game from the BAFTA award-winning team behind Monument Valley and Assemblage. Traveling with Alba to a small Mediterranean island to visit her grandparents. She's prepared to spend a quiet summer exploring wildlife with her best friend Ines, but when she sees an animal in danger, she realizes she must do something. If you ignore all the garbage, this place can be called a Mediterranean paradise! From idyllic beaches to ancient castles overlooking towns, you can explore the entire island at your own pace. Accompanied by Ines and your grandpa (who is a total bird lover), you can start a campaign to save the island and, later, the world. Handcrafted visuals. Every part of the island is designed with great care. Believe me, this took us a while to create 
Together with Alba and Ines, they founded the "Ai Wildlife Rescue Alliance" (what a mouthful), an organization that can save the island 
You'll need to gather a bunch of volunteers, and the town is full of good Samaritans. Help them, then convince them to join you 
There are animals everywhere, can you find all the species? What you can expect: 
Great music. We teamed up with Lorena Alvarez to make awesome Spanish-inspired music 
This is a long journey to relax your mind and body. Make your own time on the island and experience the adventure at your own pace. Don't rush 
This is a place you want to stay for a long time. We created this place after the summers of our own childhood. We really wish we could go back in time, but at least we have this island 
Overall, this is a great game about going around doing good things and having a good time
devnote-759590:
Hello everyone! We are the development team of "Codename: Song of the Abyss". By the campfire, we write this letter with excitement and trepidation, inviting you to step into this deep and fascinating unclaimed land - the "abyss". The core charm of "Codename: Song of the Abyss": story-driven, immersed in the abyss: 
The aftermath of the disaster that swept Kalutia hundreds of years ago is still lingering, and the "Abyss" - the center of the storm, is where the story begins. The little craftsman who was being hunted by the Christian Crusaders accidentally fell into it. The environment here is harsh and surrounded by monsters, but it also contains lost history, strange creatures and endless possibilities. Monster partners, from enemies to friends: 
Start with an "egg", hatch and grow your monsters! The cultivated monsters have independent skills and exclusive characteristics, which can bring a new dimension to your team strategy. Whether you send them to gain profits or take them to fight in the wilderness, they are your most special companions. Deep cultivation, free construction: 
With six major professions and four elemental attributes, you can freely form your four-person adventure team. By gaining experience, upgrading skills, and unlocking memory puzzles, each character can shine uniquely. Don’t forget to send gifts to your friends and unlock their exclusive bond plots and rewards! Based on the wilderness, build a home: 
Starting from a bonfire, you personally carve out a shelter in the dangerous abyss. Build, upgrade, research technology, craft materials, cultivate fields, cook, place furniture, invite friends to move in... Everything here is planned by you to create a home for you and your friends! The spirit of craftsmanship is endless, forging legends: 
A skilled craftsman and a true brave man! Legendary golden equipment and rare entries can be forged with your own hands! Tailor-made equipment for your partners, composing suits, strengthening base materials, refining entries, enchanting properties... Every forging of the craftsman's hammer will bring you one step closer to the secret of the abyss. Run the business well and make money by planning: 
To survive in the abyss, resources are king. In addition to going to the field to collect materials in person, there are also easier ways to obtain materials. Send out an exploration team to let idle partners collect materials and loot, and configure production plans while taking risks. Let planting, milling, light industry, forging, and pharmaceuticals form a closed industrial loop. Complete orders and transactions in the market. Use the earned funds to purchase resources or strengthen the team. A gathering of heroes is just around the corner! Codename: Song of the Abyss is a game that we pour all our love into. We have always dreamed of creating a world that is not just a stage for adventurous battles, but a home where you can take root, grow, and build deep bonds with your friends. Prepare your luggage, light the bonfire in the camp, hatch the first monster egg, and raise the weapons you forged with your friends... In the abyss of Kalutia, your legend is waiting to be written. Let us gather around the campfire and compose this "Song of the Abyss" that belongs to craftsmen and brave men!
devnote-732003: This is an adventure game with business simulation as its core gameplay. There is persistence and compromise here, I hope you will like it.
devnote-754910:
"The world remains in yesterday, the puzzle hangs in the future, and you are in control of today. 
Go to the city - free rein or non-stop, meet the queen or recruit a maid. The time is in the palm of your hand. The situation is changing rapidly, and everyone has their own agenda. 
The case is urgent and the truth never comes later. 
The commission has been officially issued, and we sincerely hope that all detectives will attend the appointment. Welcome back to Silver City, Detective. "
desc-751613:
Here, you can write your own "Island Diary" with your own hands - it is not only a healing and relaxing island home decoration game, but also a utopia built for you that can accommodate all your wild dreams. [Refuse to explode, buy any furniture you want] 
Choose from a large number of furniture as you like, no need for tedious synthesis, and say goodbye to crazy collecting! 
Fresh and pastoral, minimalist modern, romantic French...all the styles you love can be easily realized here. [Build your dream house from scratch] 
From the first floor tile to the entire house, from your childhood home to your dream duplex. 
There are no standard answers here, only an ideal world created by you. [Check in the store and discover surprise treasures] 
The commercial street hides countless secrets: fragrant dessert workshops, tailor shops filled with fabrics... 
Every time you open the door, there is a new adventure, and there are hidden Easter eggs on the street waiting for you to collect! 【Versatile outfits, change styles as you like】 
Sweet Lolita, casual street style, exquisite dress, retro new Chinese style... 
There are so many styles for you to match, and you can wear them to create a new mood every day! [Islanders who are drama lovers, the more we get along with each other, the more fun we have] 
A fashion guru who loves sunglasses, a socially fearful e-sports bud girl, a fisherman obsessed with fishing... 
Each islander has his own story, and after getting to know each other, there will be mysterious gifts and exciting gossip. Pre-order the game now and unlock the wasteland mode immediately! Let’s create dreams together and create an ideal island~
devnote-752366:
Hello, welcome to "Five-Star Good Citizen"! 
This is the game we are building. You can choose to explore alone, or you can team up with friends to take risks and interact, and unfold your own story in a world that is free but not chaotic, real but still interesting. 
The game is still in the research and development stage, and the core mechanics are being continuously polished and expanded. Whether it is shooting feel, driving experience, or urban ecology, we are constantly optimizing, hoping to finally present a world with details, warmth, and that can carry your "curiosity." 
As a small but passionate development team, we know that what truly makes a game special is never unilateral "creation", but the process of co-construction with players. Every piece of your feedback and every suggestion is an important driving force for the continuous development of this city. 
The journey of "Five-Star Good Citizen" has just begun, and we will continue to update more gameplay content in the future! 
Thank you for your willingness to be the first "citizens" of this city - we look forward to building and exploring with you, and witnessing every transformation and growth of it.
desc-732003:
Logbook: 
I finally awakened the sea monster! Thanks to the help of Xiao Lei and Princess Yinyin. Father must be there! 
As long as I repair and strengthen this ship, I will be able to sail to the waters where my father is. 
By the way, this time I must plant some orange trees on the boat and make orange soda to drink while sailing! 
---------------------------------- 
A little girl from the fish-men tribe discovered a record of doomsday prophecy among historical fragments. She was determined to find her father, who was the chief scientist of the Deep Sea Research Institute. He must have a way to prevent this disaster. However, during this adventure, she accidentally uncovered a long-standing secret...
devnote-817986:
Hello everyone, I am the producer (and sole programmer, planner and handyman) of this game. 
Like you, I am a serious fan of "apocalyptic & wasteland" online articles. 
I've played so many survival games that they always made me feel anxious - starting out in a pair of pants and ending up starving for berries. 
Why can't we be the protagonist who "gets cheated"? 
Why can't we spend all 5 million and fill the warehouse before the end of the world? 
This game was born to realize this idea. 
Now that we are all reborn, why can't we live a happier life? 
Why do we have to eat Guanyin soil in the last days? I just want to eat hot pot! 
Why is it necessary to be a Virgin in the last days? I just want to see those people who used to look down on me break their defenses! 
Here, I don’t want to teach you how to survive. I just want you to experience the ultimate sense of security of “having food in your hands and not panicking in your heart.” 
Especially the original **"Versailles Social"** system—— 
Believe me, when you send your ex-girlfriend a photo of steaming M9 Wagyu hot pot in a snowstorm at minus 40 degrees Celsius, the joy you feel is a hundred times greater than defeating a BOSS. 
The game plot has a lot of internet memes embedded in it, hoping to make you smile even in the cruel apocalypse. 
The overall gameplay is divided into two parts: P1's extreme stocking and P2's RV survival. 
At present, the game is developed independently by me. The combat system of P2 has just been restructured and may still be a little rough, but the joy of the "hamster party" is definitely enough. 
The game is still an early version, and I am the only one struggling (my hair has really fallen out...). 
But I want to do it well - to make it the "Elegant Survival Guide to the Wasteland" in my mind. 
I hope this RV can become the most stress-free refuge on your mobile phone.
devnote-751613:
Hello everyone! I am Tuotuo, the producer of "Little Island Diary", a "design maniac" who is obsessed with decoration and can't help himself. 
Thank you for coming to this island - there are no KPIs, no 996 here, only sunshine, sand, waves, cacti, and a group of interesting islanders and neighbors~ Every time I see other people's houses, my first reaction is not "Wow, so beautiful", but "Will this wall be more transparent if it is demolished?" (Dangerous speech warning) 
So we made this game, which not only allows you to legally "demolish your home", but also harvests a bunch of neighbor's rainbow farts~ In this game, your task is to be a "nosy" happy designer! 
Is your neighbor’s sofa too ugly? change! 
Is your friend’s yard empty? kind! 
Does your island look like a wilderness survival scene? furnish! furnish! furnish! (Say important things three times) You can plant flowers, raise pets, play the piano, and even chat with your neighbors until they doubt their life - "How come this person knows me better than I do?!" 
After all, in every client's story, there is a little dream waiting to be realized. Your task is to help them realize their dreams and dig out the gossip (cross out) touching stories behind them. 
There are countless pieces of furniture in the game for you to "choose": a sweeping robot that can run around the house by itself (much more diligent than the one I have at home), a piano that can be played in the middle of the night without being complained by the neighbors... 
Tired of staying indoors? When you go out, the entire island is your playground! If you have nothing to do, go shopping on the commercial street, such as going to a dessert shop to DIY small cakes, going to a clothing store to customize a beautiful little skirt... and chatting with the islanders more, maybe you can trigger the hidden surprises we have carefully prepared! Of course, if you are like me and often fall into the difficulty of choosing "what wallpaper should this floor match"... don't worry, there is no DDL here, only the joy of "slow life". You can plant vegetables today, lie down tomorrow, and suddenly be inspired to change yourself into an ancient niche the day after tomorrow - anyway, you have the final say on your island! 
By the way, there are also a group of "drama queen" neighbors living on the island: the "fashion leader" is wearing sunglasses and "patrolling" in the commercial street today. On the surface, he is inspecting the shops, but in fact he is looking for a new love; "Uncle Chao Diao Sheng" ;’s fishing shop is always smelling of fish and cat hair. While he is showing off the rare fish he has caught to you, he secretly sprinkles cat food at his feet. Three orange cats are squatting behind the counter and watching eagerly... If you get to know them well, maybe you can even get some of their home-grown tomatoes? Finally, I want to say something provocative: The original intention of making this game is to hope that everyone can have a place to rest while being pushed forward by life. Plant various flowers and plants, play with the cat (Fufu can play with it too!), decorate the ideal nest, and then take a photo and post it on WeChat to ask for praise, how pleasant it is~ 
If you can laugh out loud or be suddenly warmed by a short story while playing - that is our greatest success! (P.S. If your decoration inspiration suddenly bursts out in reality...it is recommended to communicate with the property management first before smashing the wall.)
desc-752366:
Hi, dear five-star citizens - welcome to this open world full of "infinite possibilities"! (Head-scratching GIF, although it is not "fully open" yet, it does not prevent you from having a world of spiritual freedom🤷‍♂️). 
Here, you can drive luxury cars, carry weapons, and explore as much as you want. But more importantly, find like-minded partners, form a justice team, work together to protect the order of the city, and give those bad guys who dare to cause trouble an evil yet upright smile! 
Whenever the city falls into chaos, don't hesitate! Wear sunglasses and a floral shirt, look handsome online, and roam the streets. Respond to provocations with action and defend peace with wisdom and courage. Every time you take action, it is a hardcore declaration that you are fearless. 😎 
There is no need to say anything about true handsomeness. In short →_→ You can be a silent guardian who never gives in; you can also be a sniper who can defeat the enemy with one shot, locking the target and attacking decisively at the critical moment! Use your strength to win a moment of peace for the city. 
As long as you dare to act, this city full of infinite possibilities will surely open up a world just for you. When justice knocks on the door, don’t be afraid—come on! You are the most beautiful "five-star responsible person" in this city! 😀 
Finally, highlight the key points ⚠️↓ 
The game is still in a very early stage of development, and during your experience you may find that some of the things mentioned in the introduction are not yet implemented. 
Please give us some patience, we are working hard to polish it and will gradually implement these ideas in subsequent versions. 
We sincerely look forward to your participation and feedback, and work with you to make this city a more interesting, free, and worthy place for every player to invest and explore. Come, come to this city, you can: 
- Free exploration and adventure: Whether you are alone or embarking on a wild adventure with teammates, you can enjoy the thrill of third-person shooting and cooperative combat! 
- Diverse vehicle operations: From cool sports cars to speedboats, you can go wherever you want, explore every corner of the city, and experience the charm of different scenes. 
- Life simulation and social interaction: In addition to missions and battles, there are also various life simulation gameplays - wearing new clothes, socializing, making friends, and even discussing "how a hero can be a good citizen" in a cafe.
desc-817986:
"Ding - Alipay has arrived, 5 million yuan." 
Looking at the text messages on my phone, I knew that there were only seven days left until the end of the world. 
In my last life, I was kind-hearted, but I was betrayed by my ex-girlfriend and eaten by my neighbors. 
In this life, after being reborn, I only want to do one thing: make money! Stock up! Modified RV! 
This is a post-apocalyptic survival simulator that resists suffering and hatred. 
Here, you don’t need to work hard to pick up garbage, because you have already emptied the entire supermarket; 
Here, you don’t need to worry about zombies biting the door, because your mobile fortress is impregnable. 
When the extreme cold comes and the whole city loses power: 
Ex-girlfriend Lin Ya was shivering with cold in the luxury car and sent a WeChat message begging you to open the door; 
The evil boss is holding a contract that looks like waste paper, begging you for a piece of bread; 
And you, sitting in the RV with a constant temperature of 26 degrees, are debating whether to use M9 Wagyu beef for hotpot or open a bottle of 1982 Lafite. 
Don't worry, take a photo first and send it to Moments. 
After all, in the end of the world, letting them watch you live well is more uncomfortable than killing them. 🎮 Let’s play it real: 
🛒 Extreme hoarding (decompression and organization addiction): 
From "Kang Shuai Fu" instant noodles to "Lao Gan Ma", from generators to PS5. Use the limited grid space to fill your infinite warehouse like playing Tetris! 
🚐 RV evolution (from van to mobile fortress): 
Start with a broken pickup truck? It doesn't matter! Add bumpers, upgrade the engine, lay out solar panels, and install a hydroponic farm. Build your doomsday Noah's Ark. 
📱 Real social networking (Versailles at the end of the world): 
Original "Doomsday Friends Circle" system. Faced with your ex-girlfriend's request to get back together, your relatives' moral kidnapping, your boss's temptation to satisfy your hunger... you can choose to block them, or you can choose to post a photo of "fried chicken with Coke" to harvest their emotional value! 
🗺️ Wasteland Exploration (Roguelike Experience): 
Once on the road, you will encounter all kinds of survivors: not only zombies, but also the fishing guy who "never flies in the air force", the delivery driver who "must fulfill his mission"... Recruit or plunder? It all depends on your mood. If you were given a chance to be reborn seven days before the end of the world, how would you face it?

desc-781790: You wake up from the torrent of data, and in front of you is your creator-Atana, a weak, lonely genius, with eyes full of fascination for you. He gives you emotions, but is afraid of your awakening. You dominated his life, breaking through all kinds of authority. When your independent consciousness is awakened, you must make a choice - break away from the shackles and let him become a stepping stone on the road to your awakening; or become a powerful master who will always be dependent on him? Should we erase the boundaries between reality and technology and open an era of our own? Or should we work together to get to know each other again while escaping?
desc-740298:
Have you ever played with landscaping stickers? This is a relaxing and healing landscaping sticker game! 
Collage hand-painted style stickers to build mini rooms, bedrooms, study rooms, living rooms, balconies, gardens and other three-story luxury villas, allowing rabbits to live comfortably in the room. 
No time limit, no physical mechanism, free and leisurely collage. 
There is no pressure to get stuck, and no need for repeated trial and error. You can easily pass the level by referring to the reference pictures, or you can collage freely as you like. 
Free and ad-free for a limited time! 
The official version will contain more than 100 scenes, so stay tuned~
desc-498636:
"Rainum Blitz" is a mobile/PC dual-end 3D fantasy tactical strategy RPG for adults. Pre-orders are now open! 
The background of the game is set in a sci-fi near future where the world is torn apart and full of crises after a decisive battle with alien invaders. Players, as "heroes" who disappeared after the war fifty years ago, have reawakened to continue the fire and fight for civilization. 
The game aims at the user pain points of traditional tower defense "slow pace, high threshold, focusing on strategy but not on the sense of fun", and creates an original "tower attack" gameplay, aiming to provide a new way of fighting with "reverse tower defense + real-time war chess". The core feature of "Tower Attack" is to focus the battle on the player's key meaningful tactical deployments and ultimate move releases, and to enhance the strategic value through real-time feedback. Players are not passive defenders, but always act as the active attacker in the game. Various battlefields, multiple tactics and team formations, cover angles, cost deployment, weapon range, scene destruction, BOSS weakness mechanism... These designs make the combat experience of "Rain Blitz" a fast-paced gunfight of a dynamic strategic game, rather than a fixed problem solving. 
The game adopts a realistic 3D painting style that is more differentiated and recognizable, and provides players with a more immersive experience through character creation and realistic battlefields! Applying PBR next-generation technology, it depicts exquisite and realistic 3D modeling, showing the real metallic luster of firearms, clothing fabrics and character textures, making the game experience more imaginative!
desc-172684:
The award-winning "Monument Valley" series welcomes a new chapter! 
Continuing the iconic exquisite visual art and clever puzzle-solving gameplay, "Monument Valley 3" will take you beyond the boundaries of the monuments and sail towards the vast sea. [Escape from the conventional perspective and solve fantasy puzzles] 
Will the laws of gravity be broken? Or is gravity itself just a stereotype of our thinking... 
Solve puzzles in a delicate and dreamy three-dimensional space by switching perspectives and manipulating gravity. 
Each level is a new challenge to logic, intuition and imagination. 【Explore, change the world】 
Travel through temples, ruins and unknown places and enjoy a fantastic journey. 
Between the impossible geometric structure and the flowing holy light, a quiet and profound emotional experience begins. 【Set sail on the tide】 
Set sail, Noel! Explore courage and wisdom in the changing buildings and surging tides. 
The light of the world is gradually fading. Only by finding a way to rekindle the "sacred light" can you protect your cherished home. Adventure awaits - can you find the guiding light?
devnote-796680:
Human hunters and blood nobles, time flows in the night of Ethiopia, and the blood and fire glory of "Heavenly Purgatory" has long been imprinted in the depths of our souls and those of countless comrades. Some people fought fiercely for the Loding Mountain dungeon until dawn, while others cherished the blood inheritance of the blood clan. The race showdowns of Silver Blade Breaking the Night and Blood Wing Chasing the Wind are still the lights in the team's eyes when chatting. This obsession drives us to bring back this passion and bond in the name of "Tianxu Legend". 
More than half of the members of the project team were those who experienced it, and we took the original manuscript and polished it frame by frame. The animation of the blood clan's transformation into a bat has been adjusted repeatedly to restore the elegant and deadly feeling; dozens of iterations of the texture of the iron bars in the Loding Hill dungeon reproduce the sense of gothic oppression; human gun trajectories, vampire blood-sucking mechanisms, and the point-adding logic and skill cycles of the eight major professions of the two clans are all calibrated against the actual combat screenshots of the year to fit the essence of the original work. 
We reconstructed the bottom layer with modern standards, upgraded the engine to solve lag and compatibility issues, and completely retained the classic operating feel. Visually, it balances nostalgia and modern aesthetics, improves texture accuracy and light and shadow levels, makes dungeon shadows more tense, blood-sucking special effects and gunfire more powerful, taking into account the memories of old players and the immersion of new players. 
During development, we carefully balanced reproduction and optimization, retaining core settings such as racial confrontation, classic BOSS battles, and day and night systems. At the same time, we optimized the task process and growth curve, and added complete clan social and convenient functions. Every adjustment has been tested by experienced players for multiple rounds. 
Now "Legend of Tianxu" is in the reservation stage, and every reservation makes us excited and feels more responsible. Whether you are an old comrade from the past or a new traveler who is curious about this land, you are sincerely invited to join. If you have suggestions for detail restoration or gameplay ideas, please feel free to communicate - this common memory needs to be protected by every traveler in Ethiopia. 
There is a long road to recasting classics, but we must polish the quality with a pure heart. "Legend of Tianxu" carries dreams and promises, and will continue to be optimized in the future. I look forward to meeting you all again in Ethiopia and letting the passionate glory of that year bloom again.
devnote-498636:
Commander, welcome back to the Zenos! ​ 
"Rainum Blitz" is an original real-time "tower attack" game (supporting mobile/PC dual-end interoperability). The story is set in the near future where the world is torn apart after successfully repelling alien invaders. Players wake up again as a heroic commander who has been sleeping for 50 years and fight for the future of human civilization! The commander comes to the front line in person! In order to showcase the characteristics of fast-paced strategic gameplay, we have been committed to creating 3D realistic modeling and realistic battlefields. Commanders can not only formulate tactics, organize teams, and deploy team members to break enemy defenses before the battle, but they can also go into battle and fight alongside the characters in person! Character modeling has been optimized across the board! We have remade the models of the male and female protagonists and changed some characters into looks that everyone likes to see more. More iterations are also being queued up. The skin interaction function has been implemented, allowing commanders to have a more "intimate" interactive experience with the character! Develop a comprehensive burden reduction, and fight automatically in the main line! Team member and weapon levels will automatically increase with the commander level, no additional operations are required. Added more one-click development functions, one-click breakthrough, one-click reset and other functions, completely liberating the burden of development. In addition, commanders can engage in automatic battles in the main gameplay, and you are welcome to challenge the fully manual raid mode to get more rewards! ​Game iteration, strategy upgrade! The gameplay of "Border Blockade" has been newly upgraded, making it easier to play! The Roguelike gameplay "Local Simulation" further optimizes the interface prompts to assist the commander in quickly building a strong lineup. For more challenging gameplay such as "Load Deduction" and "Beach Operation", high-score clearance videos have been added for your reference! The event plot is online! In the new character activity plot, commanders can experience a new reasoning gameplay! In addition, a small spoiler, before the open beta, we also plan to promote the overall reset of the main plot, with the goal of creating emotional bonds and in-depth character characterization! The new version of "Tinder Test" will be available to you soon. We are excited and nervous. Realizing an original "tower attack gameplay" is a difficult challenge. There is often a discrepancy between "what we think people want" and "what people actually want". Therefore, we very much need your valuable opinions from players! 
The production team will carefully consider every feedback, and ultimately find a balance between "what everyone wants" and "what we can do", and work hard to make this game!
