desc-809516:
Star Ocean promises to embrace the essence of Sabotage in every aspect, aiming to modernize the classic RPG from turn-based combat, storytelling, exploration and environmental interaction, while retaining plenty of nostalgia and pure fun. 
The game tells the story of two sons of the solstice who will combine the power of the sun and moon to cast eclipse magic. This is the only power that can stand against the monsters created by the evil alchemist "Fleshmancer". 
The game uses a navigation system that breaks through the limitations of traditional grid maps, allowing players to seamlessly travel through the game world and fight enemies in an immersive combat experience; there are no random enemies, no battlefield switching, and no boring monster spawning. Game features 
- Engaging turn-based combat: In addition to precise attack timing, combat also includes combos, reinforcements, and strategic "locking" systems, all of which are integrated into an immersive combat experience; there are no random enemies, no battlefield switching, and no boring repetitive work. 
- Fully dynamic lighting: Our self-developed rendering pipeline pushes the limits of 2D pixel art games to create stunning, lifelike worlds. 
- Story-rich adventure: Sometimes epic, sometimes lighthearted and humorous, sometimes deeply touching, "Star Ocean" is a role-playing game that explores classic themes such as adventure and friendship while also being full of unexpected twists and events that Sabotage always produces. 
- A world at your fingertips: sail, cook, fish, have a drink in the tavern or play that classic tabletop game called "Wheels"... Each system is designed to pay homage to retro classics and innovate in some aspects to deliver a smooth and modern experience. 
Carefully redesigned for mobile devices 
- Brand new interface – exclusive mobile UI, supports full touch operation 
- Support Google Play Games achievements 
- Cloud Save – sync game progress between Android devices 
- Compatible with gamepads
devnote-716974: Hi, dear store managers: Just like my face, I am the producer of "Dora's Camping Dining Truck" and a junior game designer working in Zeng Xinshou Village. From the beginning, I was about "flowers, food, camping and gentle animals" From a small idea, to the finalization of the art style, the polishing of the gameplay, the formation of the team and the formal development, it has been almost a year. Like most developers, there have been many sleepless nights due to the development cycle and financial pressure, and the team has also taken many detours. We are a small entrepreneurial team, and Dora is our first independent creation. This journey has brought surprises, but also a lot of anxiety and frustration. I am really grateful to the store managers for their support and companionship along the way. This is the source of our persistence. The content that everyone experienced in the previous test version also exposed many problems. The interface was not smooth enough, the details were not perfect enough, the gameplay design was also flawed, and there was a lack of experience in commercial design. We have carefully noted down, little by little review, modification, redo, there may still be many things that need to be modified, and there will also be many other difficulties (lack of funds, market changes), but please believe us, we will not give up, and it is our commitment to continue to update and maintain Dora. What I want to say most seriously: Thank you, thank you for every sincere suggestion, patient tolerance, thank you for still choosing to believe and wait when we are not good enough. Just like Dora said: "It's not a brave decision. If you like it, stay and do what you like." We want to create a small world wrapped in tenderness - there are steaming dining cars, slowly blooming flowers, cute and healing animals, relaxed and leisure gameplay, and a slow time where you don't have to worry. We recommend that the store manager not be too anxious about progress, collect and unlock slowly~ The story is still going on, and the journey is about to begin. We will continue to polish our products, explore more beautiful campsites, and develop more warm ways to play with food and flowers. We expect to officially launch tap in April, and we look forward to meeting you at a campsite full of flowers!

desc-775759:
"Even if it's a son-in-law, I can make a comeback." 
"Sister-in-law" is a mobile game authorized by the original IP and adapted from the novel of the same name by Angry Banana. Once I traveled through time and became a son-in-law, I wanted to lie down and eat soft food, but my strength did not allow it! 
This time, you will transform into a little "brother-in-law", from a small transparent person in the Su family to the richest man in Jiangning, use modern wisdom to stir up the ancient shopping malls, and make the life of a son-in-law a happy story! —— Hilarious plot, restoring classics, including all famous scenes 
Red hijab, groom's suit, send my uncle off to the sedan chair! 
From the wedding day to the fight for the Su family's palm print, to the Jiangning Poetry Festival, you will personally perform the classic scenes! ——Modern wisdom can crush the ancients and make a lot of money just by lying down 
Although the shopping mall is like a battlefield, with modern business thinking, you are not afraid of small opponents! 
Bargaining, membership points system, live streaming, takeout delivery... these little "showy" operations will make the ancient tycoons stunned! ——Salted Fish Turnaround, Life of the Richest Man, My Daily Life with Cool Stories 
I was once disliked by the Su family, but now I have become the pillar of the family; you once laughed at me for "eating soft food", but now you work with me to do odd jobs! 
A salty start? No, I will directly become the sponsor! ——A confidante, by your side, you will not be alone through ancient times 
He and Su Tan'er were in charge of business together, bickered with Xiao Chan and helped Liu Xigua reorganize Ba Dao Camp. 
A confidante will accompany you, either sweetly or cruelly. Who said that a surrogate son-in-law cannot wake up and take charge of the world, and lie drunk in the lap of a beautiful woman?

devnote-763323:
"We admit - we are not towering trees, but 'rotten wood' in the eyes of others: mushrooms grow in the code, ideas occasionally get moldy, and the project list is full of wormholes. 
However: 
Kuchiki knows cracks best—that’s where light breaks in, and it’s a battlefield where weeds grow wildly. 
Rotten wood is not afraid of being beaten - it is already riddled with holes, so why be afraid of breaking a few more branches? 
If fate says, "You should rot," we will carve the world out of the rotten texture and ignite new ways of playing in the moth-eaten holes. 
Yes, we carry the plaque forward until a flower that everyone recognizes blooms on the dry bones. " 
-------- Bulls and horses typing code on the ruins
desc-763323:
Game introduction: 
"Xia Ying Lu" is a Chinese-style martial arts stand-alone game. The game takes the blood feud between the masters and the conspiracy of Jianghu as the core, and builds a martial arts world overturned by blood and rain. You will play the role of a knight who bears the blood of his master. He originally entered the world to investigate the massacre of his sect, but unexpectedly got involved in the shocking conspiracy of "Eternal Tribulation Long Kui" and Burning Sky to change his life. Only with the long sword in hand and the ever-changing BD, can we detect the disguise, deconstruct the secret words, split the illusion between the light and shadow of the sword, and finally unravel the "eternal calamity" shrouding the martial arts world. [The iron law against fate] 
Protagonist: The blood of the master's sect is not yet cold, and the conspiracy in the world is already unfolding. Trample rotten wood into blades, cut through the web of lies. The scraps of paper and broken blades are all used as eyes, and the sea of ​​ink and the mountain of corpses seek their own light. When all these conspiracies come to light, we realize that you and I are both pawns. Only the sword in hand can cut through the illusion. 
Long Kui of Eternal Tribulation: Flesh and flesh are weak? Then tear down the bones and cast armor! Is it hard to violate destiny? Then burn the sky and change your fate! After completing his own ritual of breaking the ban, ascending the throne as emperor, and using secret techniques to control the major forces and courtiers, there will be no more fights. [All kinds of martial arts, all kinds of BD can be freely displayed] 
Four sets of weapon moves (more will be added in the future), hundreds of magic weapons, thousands of bell patterns, and a variety of unique martial arts techniques to freely construct BD routines. The rich Rogue elements allow you to play endlessly. 
Various routines and BDs can be switched freely, so there is no need to start the game alone. All levels are free to challenge, and different BDs will have different experiences when challenging different bosses. [Rich development outside of combat] 
The game clock will be retained every time you work hard. You can develop your own combat talent map by collecting meridians and martial arts points, create your own magic weapon to match your BD battle, explore ruins and cliff caves to obtain classic martial arts inheritance, and learn medical skills and alchemy to assist you in combat to make your battle more enjoyable. [Free and refreshing hidden weapon system] 
You can manipulate various forms of hidden weapons to carry out diversified strikes against enemies. With the exclusive talent of hidden weapons, and the unique tempering technology, hidden weapons can be released independently from weapon skills. Hidden weapons are equipped with matching weapon skills to attack together, and enjoy the thrill of combat that is exclusive to you. [Collect clues to decipher the truth] 
In this bloody martial arts world, every sword mark, half-page fragment, and even the posture of a corpse are all cobwebs of a giant web of conspiracy. You will: uncover the disguise, deconstruct the secret language, listen to the sound of death, and finally, thousands of broken blades will be combined into the Dragon-Severing Sword - what you will reveal is not only the truth, but also the entire situation of eternal calamity. [Optimization for mobile terminals] 
· Button optimization: The controller and custom buttons adapted to the PC version have more restrictions on the mobile version, but they will also be optimized in order to facilitate player operation. 
· Freely adjust the viewing distance: In order to better express the sense of atmosphere, the lens on the PC side has been stretched relatively. Mobile will be optimized for this to ensure that players can freely adjust it without making the character too small. 
· Hidden weapon optimization: There will be some changes to the hidden weapon system. For the convenience of mobile operation, the hidden weapon will automatically detect enemies. Minimum device requirements: Android - Android 8.0 or higher, Memory: 6GB, Available RAM: 6GB --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- 
"Detailed explanation of payment model" 
Single-player buyout: one-time paid buyout, free DLC, paid DLC
desc-587649: Balatro is a magical card-building game inspired by poker, where you are completely immersed in creating powerful power-ups and achieving huge wins. Combine effective poker hands with unique Joker cards to create different power-ups and strategies. Earn enough chips to beat the blinds, while revealing hidden bonus players and decks as you play. In order to reach the ultimate blind, beat the ultimate bet, and secure victory, you need to do everything you can to gain an advantage.
desc-798590: "Dungeon Hunter 6" is an MMORPG mobile game with a Western fantasy theme. The game continues the core dark dungeon style and magical world view of the series. The world 200 years after the events of the previous game is used as the main stage to tell the epic story of a bounty hunter uncovering the mystery of the forbidden tower and preventing the spread of evil forces. In the game, you can freely choose a career, match unique skill combinations, explore dark dungeons, and the Frozen Throne...Challenge randomly generated dungeons and powerful bosses, obtain top-notch equipment, and reach the top!
devnote-728899: Officially authorized by Pugstorm and Fireshine, the critically acclaimed multiplayer online sandbox adventure game "CoreKeeper" with over 2 million sales on Steam will be the first to be ported to the mobile terminal in China. Fingertip online adventures can be expected!
devnote-798590:
To every hunter who sticks to the Dark Continent: 
When the words "Dungeon Hunter" lit up on the screen again, we knew that this was not only the start of a new game, but also a reunion of youth spanning seventeen years. 
Since the first work was launched on the mobile terminal in 2009, this fantasy world full of magic and passion has become the childhood memory of countless players - perhaps the ecstasy of secretly swiping out the first rare equipment on the mobile phone during class, the passion for online battles with friends in bed late at night, the persistence of repeatedly polishing to unlock classic professions such as the God of War and Mage, and the deep attachment to the maps with different styles and the potion synthesis system for free exploration in the continent of Gotkus. Like everyone else, we are loyal players of the Dungeon Hunter series. 
From the first adventure to the countless days and nights spent staying up late to refresh equipment and team up to charge, "Dungeon Hunter" has long been engraved in the DNA of our youth. The roar of the god of war, the chant of the mage, and the beating of the heart when opening the box, these are classic moments that we will never forget. Ten years have passed and the lights in the dungeon have not been extinguished. 
"Dungeon Hunter 6" continues the series of hard-core gameplay, with smooth combos and punches, massive treasure boxes to recreate the ecstasy of treasure hunting, and online team-ups to renew the brotherhood. The horn of Valencia continent sounded again, a new journey has begun, and darkness spreads again. Whether you are an old hunter who has been with you for many years, or a new warrior who has just entered the world, continue to write a new legend in this new continent!
devnote-775574:
Who doesn’t want to create a small world where they can touch monsters and chat with travelers? So we moved "Eternal Manor" into the mobile phone - it is not a complicated different world, but a "pure land for fishing" left for you: when fishing, you can go to the cracks to pick up some fragments, or you can call your friends to build a starry sky courtyard in the club. 
There is no need to roll up values ​​or rush the progress. There are only small worries here: "Did you speed up the monsters today?" "Has my traveler graduated?" 
Whether you unlock it slowly or go online occasionally, you can feel the down-to-earth joy of going from a "broken wooden house" to a "small paradise across time and space". 
Thank you for coming to this manor appointment. No matter when it comes online, Ada will always be waiting for you at the door, leaving hot drinks for travelers. I hope you can find your own relaxing time here~ 
——Sincerely, the development team of "Wanjie Qiyuan"
devnote-711779:
Hello fellow treasure hunters! I'm an Ironhead Hunter from Hunter Studio. As for why it is called this name, not only because I like all kinds of knight armors, but those who know me well may also know that I am the most incompetent but also the most stubborn person in the development team at gaming. Why did we decide to make Lost Castle 2? Although "Lost Castle 1" gained everyone's love back then, as the first game we made, due to the lack of experience at that time, we actually left quite a lot of regrets in the design and experience of the game. The deficiencies in engineering management have also created a lot of pitfalls in the subsequent maintenance, optimization and gameplay expansion of the game. 
As the team gradually grows, we feel that we are now capable of making up for the regrets of the year. So we embarked on the development road of "Lost Castle 2". Regarding the comparison of the experience between the 2nd generation and the 1st generation, I would like to borrow the comment from a friend who first tried the 2nd generation: "2 compared to 1 feels like it is no longer the same game." Although the 2nd generation is the same type of beat-em-up pigeon as the 1st generation, we have tried to make great improvements and upgrades in terms of movement and visual performance. We have also tried to expand the depth of the construction in the passive effects of various treasures to avoid the problem like the 1st generation where the movements and randomness will feel monotonous after playing for a long time. In future development and updates, I believe that our development team will be able to bring you a high-quality meat pigeon game with rich random buildings. 
Although the adventure stage of the second generation is not in the same area as the first generation, you can still see many familiar things in the second generation. We can still wield the weapons we wielded in Harewood Castle in the past, and wear the armor we took on adventures back then. The little dinosaur who liked to jump through towers and eat up the chicken legs of the entire team has now followed the treasure hunters to the new camp. Finally, we are also very grateful to all our players and friends who have supported us and are still supporting us. Return to the original intention and make fun games. Fun games cannot be made behind closed doors. I hope to join hands with new and old friends to create a castle that will not let everyone lose! The stage of this adventure comes to another mysterious castle on the mainland - Castle Black. Following the footsteps of the ethereal spirits and smelling the smell of treasures, the treasure hunters came to this border land and opened the door of this long-lost castle during the treasure hunting adventure to explore the hidden secrets...
desc-711779:
The sequel to the acclaimed roguelike game that has inherited 20 million users is here! Welcome home treasure hunters! What will the new journey be like? Please see the detailed explanation below~ 
"Lost Castle 2" continues the well-recognized core gameplay of the previous game - roguelike horizontal action adventure, and at the same time carries out all-round "upgrades" based on the excellent foundation of the first generation! The treasure hunters played by players smell new traces of treasure after the adventure in Harewood Castle, and head to the border of a country called Riado to start a new adventure and treasure hunt! [New stronghold for treasure hunters] 
Once upon a time, three college students made 0-funded games that sold well on Steam, and the transplanted mobile game even exceeded 20 million downloads! Developed by the original team of the first generation! Welcome home treasure hunters! [New weapons and random treasures] 
More than 200 types of weapons and more than 140 types of treasures with different effects make every adventure a new experience! [New online gameplay] 
The fun of forming a team to play black games has been upgraded! Added chat, rescue, expression interaction, and new resource sharing mode. As the saying goes, the most precious game configuration is three or two friends! Lost Castle 2 allows you to start an exciting and fun new adventure with your old friends at any time! [Comprehensively upgraded castle decoration] 
Art quality update! A 2D cartoon side-scrolling adventure with a unique style, more exquisite graphics, and cooler combat performance... At the same time, the operating feel has been fully upgraded, with a variety of new attack methods, and silky-smooth combos bring a stronger sense of combat! Upgraded quality, upgraded feel, upgraded gameplay, and more upgrades are waiting for you treasure hunters! With a better experience and the same original intention, I hope that the well-decorated castle can still gain everyone's love ~ TapTap reservations are now open, click to make a reservation and add a follow to the treasure to avoid getting lost!
desc-728899:
"Core Protection Era" is a mining sandbox adventure game that can be played by 1 to 8 players. You will explore an endless cave full of various creatures, relics and resources. Dig, build, fight, craft, farm, and finally reveal the secrets of the ancient core. 
As an explorer, wake up in a long-forgotten cave filled with untold secrets. In this award-winning mining sandbox adventure game for 1 to 8 players, you'll shape an epic journey using your own choices. Collect relics and resources, craft advanced tools, build strongholds, and explore every bit of a dynamically developing world waiting to be discovered. 
Upgrade your skills, defeat legendary Titans, and uncover the mystery surrounding the core's power. Cultivate a garden, fish in mysterious waters, master a variety of recipes, raise and care for animals, meet cave dwellers unexpectedly, dig out a unique world of your own, and embark on a fascinating underground adventure. 【Game Features】◆Mind resources and carve out your own path in the underground world. Explore deeply, collect precious resources, and bring the gems hidden deep into the ground to light. Make pickaxes, fishing rods, shovels and even traps, bombs, mortars and other tools to help yourself survive. Upgrade your arsenal and equipment with advanced tools such as the powerful destruction ray, and use automated machinery to simplify the process of mining, smelting, and storage. Upgrade various skills, unlock powerful weapons, and conquer this unfathomable abyss. ◆Explore the Ancient World Explore the colorful ecological zones and learn about their unique ecosystems and long-lost background stories. From the vibrant walls of clay caves to the crystal caves of the gleaming border, uncover the secrets of the cave dwellers and learn more about this mysterious world. Build a ship, set sail on the sunken sea, speed through the desert of origin, and encounter the remains of ancient civilizations. ◆Build, craft, and get creativeUse a variety of materials and customization options to create a stronghold like no other. From an adventurer's ultimate lair to a cozy underground cabin, shape this underground world to your own liking. Customize your character's appearance and choose from a variety of powerful armors and unique costumes to suit different occasions. ◆Face the Titans Confront the legendary Titans and learn the secrets of this long-forgotten world from them. Use a variety of monsters and mini-bosses to hone your combat skills, use talent points to upgrade your ability levels, and carefully devise combat strategies to conquer these behemoths in the underground world. Find rare and powerful loot to help fuel your efforts and fuel your core. ◆Explore with friends. You can enjoy the adventure alone, or you can fight side by side in an online cooperative mode with 2 to 8 people that can be freely entered and exited at any time. Play your own way and explore at your own pace - celebrate the changing seasons, find merchants to buy and sell goods, incubate new close friends, design the ultimate stronghold, automatically collect resources, host your own dedicated server, compose music with playable instruments, and enjoy this unforgettable sandbox adventure.
desc-775574:
What kind of game is this? 
Hmm...good question! Lord, listen up! (Close eyes and contemplate) (Take a long breath) 
"Wanjie Qiyuan: Chasing the Light and Building Dream Notes" is a funny style, different time and space travel, simulation management mobile game that focuses on the companionship of monsters and healing life. Now someone is going to ask! With so many labels, can a game be labeled so old? 
It’s limited! Although we have a lot of labels, it is very simple to play! Although the gameplay is simple, there is a lot to play! 
Me! Isn’t it Ada, the head maid of our manor? Now let me introduce how to play it! =========A grand dividing line========== 
[Monster companionship creates a healing sanctuary for you] 
Although the world is in chaos, monsters are always waiting for you in the manor! The monster system has been newly upgraded. Monsters that are transformed into the hub of the manor (crossed out) will appear in every corner of the manor to help the lord maintain the stable development of the manor! [Free creation·Create your Japanese fairy tale town] 
The combination of low-saturated tones with Japanese-style courtyards and fantasy elements helps create an exclusive Japanese-style fairy tale town. You can freely adjust the terrain, match the buildings, and watch the barren land come to life in your hands, becoming a warm station where diverse civilizations meet. Showcase your unique aesthetic in every corner! 【Recruit staff and build a business front together】 
Get to know exclusive staff from different worlds - they are not only business experts, but also partners in adventure battles! Assign them to manage production, explore cracks, and jointly deal with opportunities and challenges in the manor! [In-depth plot·Unexpected time and space story] 
During the operation, you will meet all kinds of interesting travelers: the frog traveler who always carries his luggage, the unrestrained ghost... As the manor becomes more and more prosperous, the secrets buried by time will slowly unfold... Where did the former lord go? What is hidden in the Space-Time Parliament? All of this is waiting for your careful discovery ~ [Warm socializing·Easy to create a shared space] 
Visit your friends’ estates to exchange inspiration, and join a guild to decorate public areas together. Meet new friends in the game and develop rapport in cooperative missions. There is no pressure here, just a warm atmosphere of helping each other!
desc-787619: Heartbeat Live: Love Live Show is an immersive love strategy game set in Hong Kong. As the ninth participant in a popular love observation show, you will stay in a beachside villa on the edge of a bustling city, live with four men and four women, and experience real heartbeats and confrontations on and off the camera. The game simulates the rhythm of a reality show. During the day, you can deepen your understanding through conversations, tasks and appointments. At night, you need to send anonymous text messages to influence the plot. In addition to the eight regular guests with different personalities, the show also hides two mysterious hidden characters - their identities and stories can only be unlocked with care and sincerity. Under the night view of Victoria Harbor and in the neon-lit streets, find your own exclusive romance. Are you acting out the script, or are you losing control of your heart? It's all up to you.
desc-839042:
The story of "Cry of Gods: Dissension" takes place in the distant mythological era, on the land of gods created by the goddess Itian, where the Alliance of Light and the Wrath unite two camps, and the war is caused by different beliefs. Players can join different camps in this god's world and fight for their respective camps. 
The game adopts Korean art realistic style, with novel color matching and unique combat design, breaking the traditional MMO experience. At the same time, it highly restores the Shenqi PC game and allows players to awaken their dusty memories. Game features:

[Multiple battlefield gameplay] 
"Faction selection, hundreds of people fighting on the same screen! Victory or defeat is only a matter of milliseconds, fight for glory! Gather brothers! Voice command to win the final glory." 
【Featured Exclusive Mode】 
"Death mode activated! Either become a god or perish, the classic mode is restored!" 
[Original plot design] 
"Uncover the secret of God's Cry! Your choice changes the ending."
desc-725047: The largest collection of ninjas in the entire series is gathered here! The latest work in the critically acclaimed Ultimate Storm series will take you on a thrilling and exciting journey. Both the story and the battles have evolved to a new dimension, allowing you to deeply experience the epic battles shown in the Naruto Shippuden: Ultimate Storm series!
devnote-802580:
To every winter survivor: 
Hello everyone, this is the development team of "Codename: Winter Survival". 
We have always been obsessed with the core charm of survival games - courage and wisdom bursting out in desperate situations. Therefore, we set our sights on the arctic wasteland and wanted to create a world where players can truly experience "game against the cold". In order to restore the real frozen environment, we repeatedly debugged the dynamic wind and snow system, making every snowstorm full of unknowns; in order to make survival more immersive, we refined the balance of body temperature and material consumption, making every resource search a matter of survival. 
During the development process, we debated "how to balance hardcore and fun", and also stayed up late to optimize the "resource allocation mechanism for multi-player collaboration". We always believe that survival should not be the torment of loneliness, so we have designed the gameplay of team building, division of labor and collaboration. We hope that you can reap the warmth of fighting side by side on the ice field. 
Now, this game that carries our original intentions is about to meet you. It may not be perfect, but every detail embodies our love for survival themes. In the future, we will continue to listen to your feedback, optimize environmental interaction, and enrich hidden exploration content. 
I hope that in this frozen world, you can not only experience the tension of surviving in desperate situations, but also gain the sense of accomplishment of breaking through difficulties. I look forward to working with you to ignite the fire of survival in the wind and snow.
desc-802580:
After a global ice disaster, the world has become an extremely cold wasteland with tens of degrees below zero. "Codename: Winter Survival" invites you to face the desperate challenge. You need to monitor core indicators such as body temperature and hunger level in real time, search for fuel, food and medical supplies in the snowy ruins, and build a warm shelter to resist frostbite. 
Dynamic blizzards and polar nights come alternately, and lurking beasts and unknown threats hide murderous intent. You can survive alone, allocate resources accurately, and make cold-proof equipment; you can also work as a team to divide the work, build a defense line, and work together to fight the crisis. 
Explore the vast ice fields to unlock hidden areas, and unlock survival skills such as snow tracking and trap placement. Every decision you make is related to your survival. Under the double test of severe cold and desperate situation, only perseverance and wisdom can become a strong survivor in winter.
desc-217675:
"Yokai Inn" is a business simulation game inspired by games such as "Harvest Story" and "Animal Crossing". It is currently in the early stages of development and has been confirmed to be launched on the mobile terminal. Explore the world of pixels 
All scenes in the game are hand-painted, with a fresh and warm style, and there are little surprises hidden in every corner. run your hotel 
The game will provide many casual activities, such as boiler maintenance and house cleaning, or farming, fishing, cooking, mining, crafting, etc., all of which can slowly make your hotel larger. Make friends with monsters 
Each guest has his or her own story. You can go home at any time and talk about life with them while they are resting in the hotel.
desc-792753:
"The Return of the King of Zhenhun Street" is an action mobile game licensed based on the popular Chinese comic IP. The game reshapes the world of Spiritual Realm with national trendy retro art. The classic scene of Rakshasa Street is reappeared, and the visual performance is fully upgraded! Here, players will immersively relive the highlight plot, experience the shocking moment of the guardian spirit's awakening, and renew the passionate bond of "going through fire and water"! You can transform yourself into a spiritual person such as Cao Yanbing and Xia Ling, fight side by side with guardian spirits such as Xu Chu and Li Xuanyuan, and experience the smooth combos and exclusive combo skills of "humans and spirits fighting together". 
The spiritual realm battlefield has been opened, and I look forward to all the soul-suppressing souls rekindling their guardian souls here to protect this street together!
desc-756285:
Saddle the horse! See your kingdom come to life and fight intense battles to defend it, all before lunch. 
In Thronefall we tried to strip away all the unnecessary complexity from classic strategy games and combine it with just the right amount of hack and slash. Build your base during the day and defend it at night until your last breath. 
Can you find the right balance between economy and defense? Do you need more archers, thicker walls, or extra mills? Will you keep your enemies at bay with your longbow, or charge towards them on horseback? It's going to be a rough night, but there's nothing like seeing the sun rise over your little kingdom, ushering in a new day.
devnote-770119:
Hello everyone, we are the development team of "Codename: Heroes Shelter", and we are honored to share with you our new work that we have put our whole heart into! ​ 
As a group of fans who have been deeply involved in strategic management and hero development games for many years, we have always dreamed of perfectly integrating the fun of classic kingdom management with the experience of in-depth hero development. We have seen that many games on the market either pursue excessive pursuit of excitement or have monotonous content, which cannot satisfy everyone's yearning for "fantasy adventure" and "strategic depth". Therefore, we are determined to create "Codename: Heroes Asylum", hoping that it will become a unique world that not only allows you to easily control the grand kingdom, but also deeply experience the heroic adventure. ​ 
In "Codename: Heroes Asylum", you will experience:​ 
Dual perspective immersion: you are both the kingdom lord who leads the overall situation and the heroic commander who goes to the battlefield in person. ​ 
The fun of strategic management: rationally allocate resources, build your own fantasy kingdom, and pursue the ultimate efficiency in resource utilization. ​ 
Development of a pure RPG: Recruit various distinctive professional heroes, match them with massive random entry equipment, and create a unique legendary team! We particularly emphasize teamwork among different professions. The cooperation of various professions will be the key to passing the level, rather than simply comparing numerical values. ​ 
Relaxed and casual experience: You can enjoy in-depth strategy and growth in a fragment of time, bid farewell to the liver emperor mode, and let the game become a beautiful adjustment in your life. ​ 
We believe that this game can refresh the memory of strategy game veterans and allow new players to experience the dual fun of management and growth. It can be used as a "side tour" for you to relax and unwind, while also providing enough depth for you to delve into. We are still constantly polishing and improving "Codename: Heroes Shelter", and every feedback and suggestion you have will be a valuable motivation for us to move forward. I look forward to meeting you all in this magical land and starting this exciting journey together!
desc-770119:
This is a magical continent lord simulator, the purpose is not to force yourself to become a lord, but not to force yourself to lose your temper. You can observe the heroes' adventures from a god's perspective and easily place idle equipment to buy equipment. You can also personally direct them to defeat the powerful boss BOSS and gain a sense of accomplishment from strategizing. 
----Game Features --- 
[If you don’t worry about it, you can still get a magical outfit at work] 
Your hero will adventure in this world on his own. Even if you leave temporarily, resources are still accumulating, craftsmen are working as usual, and heroes continue to complete their adventures and transactions. High offline income allows you to welcome a more prosperous and prosperous country every time you return, and truly enjoy the leisurely rule of "ruling by doing nothing". [Exclusive genre, free to change jobs and build BD] 
Recruit your team of legendary heroes and assemble classic professions such as warriors, mages, priests, etc. Each hero has a rich career path and exclusive talent tree, combined with hundreds of random entries of equipment, allowing you to freely explore countless combat styles and create a unique and strongest lineup. [Rebuild the kingdom and run the town from scratch] 
You will become the reviver of the kingdom and plan a magnificent capital city from the desolation with your own hands. Properly allocate resources and labor, witness your territory rise from a simple outpost to a prosperous and powerful magical kingdom step by step, and enjoy an unparalleled sense of business achievement. [Diverse dungeons, group fight BOSS gets stronger as you fight] 
Challenge the powerful bosses and secret realm dungeons located all over the world. Each victory will bring you generous rewards, allowing your kingdom and hero team to continue to soar in strength, forming a positive growth cycle of "the more you fight, the stronger you get".
devnote-761532:
We are Tin Bird Games, a few strangers like you who are wandering around for a living in the city. 
We often feel numb in the din of the steel jungle, like a machine that is gradually malfunctioning. 
So we created these robots with stories— 
Make them cry, make them laugh, make them confused, desperate, trying to love and be loved. 
We hope you can hear their voices, and your *own* voices, in Love and Robot Repair Technology. 
Welcome to make a reservation on Taptap, or go to our Steam store page to add to your wishlist. Web link
desc-761532:
Play as a cyber doctor in a robot medical narrative adventure game. 
The millennium is nothing more than an implanted virtual memory, like a dream. Disease rates are rising, and fragile bodies are plagued by rejection reactions. 
You will take apart the robot's back brain and chest to explore the cause. Listening, diagnosis, treatment, and the fate of all kinds of patients intersect. 
Uncover secrets about the past and the future and discover the truth that makes each robot unique. "All kinds of robot patients" In the black reinforced concrete forest, "robots" shuttled like a tide, not knowing where they came from and where they were going. 
An artist who draws with his eyes, a cargo model that uses its body as an engine, a bartending machine that uses "tears" as wine... 
Take apart their bodies and treat their illnesses like repairing machines. "Unique Maintenance Experience" The so-called "emotion" is a kind of "characteristic current" flowing in the module circuit. 
Hack them, play them, and understand the subtle emotions of the robots. 
Heal their "mechanical souls" or manipulate them through tampering and editing. "Exploring the secrets of the robot city" What is the mysterious "prototype disease" and where does the robot city come from? We are constantly getting closer to the truth through medical treatments and dreams, and this may change the fate of many people. "Retro pixel audio-visual experience" The sunset is the aurora that belongs to us. 
The raindrops hitting the bed, leaning on the railing of the overpass to watch the sunset, or the vague figure in the dusty memory... 
Turn off the lights and let the notes and pixels stir your thoughts.
devnote-325494:
Dear Night Hunters, here’s to you.

devnote-792753:
Hello, fellow soul-killing generals! "The Return of the King of Zhenhun Street" has made everyone wait for a long time! After countless days and nights of polishing and evolution, our game is finally ready to meet everyone~ 
I still remember the spring when we first saw Zhenhun Street. Like countless friends who love Zhenhun Street, we were moved by Yu Jin's "willing to go through fire and water for the Cao family for generations to come." We were delighted by Cao Yanbing's transformation and Xia Ling's growth, and were inspired by the passionate stories on this street. It is the burning memory of Zhenhun Street that drives us to try our best to restore the spiritual world of flesh and blood, love and justice. In this plot, the story will kick off from the "Thousands of Opportunities" - Cao Yanbing takes the initiative to go to death row in order to find his mother, and faces a series of powerful enemies and tests. Are you all the soul-suppressing generals ready for this unprecedented showdown in the spiritual realm? 
In addition to the highly restored original plot, our combat system also fully inherits the passionate setting of "human souls fighting together" and the key words of "free combat", ensuring that everyone will fight happily and comfortably~ Whether it is Cao Yanbing and Xu Chu's "Tiger Shakes the Mountains", or Xia Ling and Li Xuanyuan's "World's Endless", every combined move will allow you to personally experience the pleasure of fighting side by side! 
In addition, we have also reshaped the spiritual realm with the national retro style - Rakshasa Street has been reappeared in a more fashionable and cool attitude, hoping to awaken the passion and feelings you had when chasing the series. Here, we sincerely invite you to step into the spiritual realm again. This street will be guarded by you and me!
desc-325494:

It’s funny to say that, compared to the previous game, I originally conceived the story of an elegy. In order to present it better, I finally chose to make the evening bell first.

devnote-809746:
To every cat lover: 
Hello everyone, we are the development team of "Meow Cafe" ~ 
In fact, like many players, we are all scrappers who cannot resist the temptation of cat claws. I always feel that the most healing moment in life is a cup of hot drink accompanied by the purring of cats, watching them rolling and rubbing their legs, all fatigue seems to be instantly healed. 
The addictive feeling of "collecting cards" when raising cats - raising an orange cat makes you want to own a three-flowered cat, and holding a three-flowered cat and craving the cuteness of a cow cat gave us an idea: why not create a cat cafe world filled with all the cute little guys, so that every cat lover can realize the "freedom of petting cats" and "happiness of collecting" here. 
During the development process, we have been thinking about how to make this warmth more real. 
We designed a unique personality and interactive actions for each cat, from being arrogant and dodging to being clingy and begging for petting, hoping to restore every little bit of the beauty of getting along with furry children in real life. We also carefully polished the layout details of the cat cafe, from the pillows on the sofa to the overall decoration style, hoping to make this a healing corner where you can rest your emotions. 
More importantly, we want to convey a gentle heart - just like someone builds a harbor for stray cats in reality, every cat in the game deserves to be treated well, and what you run is not only a cat cafe, but also a warm home for countless furry children.
devnote-834077:

You can go to the special area to browse various strategy documents, or you can join official discussion groups and groups to exchange game experiences with each other.

desc-788162:
"Insects" is presented with brand-new hand-painted 2D graphics, adding new weapons, vehicles and buildings, and the return of classic weapons and gameplay, bringing you the most enjoyable and chaotic combat experience in the history of the series! Through 10 training levels and 20 campaign missions with gradually increasing difficulty, you can flexibly use a large number of new and old weapons to launch fierce battles. Drive vehicles to cause chaos, cleverly use terrain to gain tactical advantages, and dominate the entire battlefield! Engage in hilarious and tactical Bug Wars in local or online multiplayer! Crush your opponents with stone donkeys or blast them to smithereens with holy grenades. Drive a helicopter to rain down firepower from the sky, or use a tank to crush the enemy to pieces - 50 types of weapons and tools are at your disposal, and enjoy the most chaotic combat moments! Game features: 
Exquisite hand-painted 2D painting style: The classic "Insects" returns, with a brand-new insect shape and hand-painted art style, bringing the best visual experience in the series. 
Brand new vehicle system: For the first time in history, controllable vehicles are introduced, including galloping tanks and helicopter air strikes, completely upgrading the bug battlefield! 
Strategic building mechanism: Hide in buildings to avoid damage and gain tactical advantages, even small bugs can defeat the enemy! 
Reproduction of classic physics and gameplay: The new engine restores the favorite operating feel of old players, and the popular Ninja Rope also makes a surprise return! 
Rich arsenal: 50 kinds of weapons and props, both classic and innovative - including new weapons such as "Faulty Mobile Phone Battery", "Scare Gift" and "Big Mac Strike". 
Stronghold machine gun fire support: Various machine gun devices are distributed on the map, allowing the bugs to deal full damage and overwhelm the entire field! 
Both single-player and multiplayer modes are exciting: Rich training missions and campaign gameplay help you hone your skills; the battle map supports up to 2 players and 4 bugs per person, and is equally exciting online and offline!
desc-230665:
After receiving rave reviews on Steam, the fast-paced mountain bike extreme racing game "Descenders" has confirmed that it will launch a mobile version "Codename: Descenders". "Descenders" is an extreme sports game with the theme of modern mountain bike downhill sports. It provides many randomly generated maps and brings players an exciting track experience through real control. Can you lead your team to glory and become the next legendary Descender? "Descenders" is developed by the development team of the well-known game "Action Henk". It is a fast-paced mountain bike downhill extreme sports game. It is easy to get started, but requires repeated challenges to become a master. A new attempt at extreme sports Randomly generated maps: Each challenge has new platforms, slopes and descending terrains waiting for you. Free-style control experience: Players can control the rider to make any micro-operations, and the game's deep physics system can turn these operations into beautiful stunts. Risks and rewards: You need to control the rider to sprint for higher and stronger scores and stunt combos, but you must ensure a certain success rate, otherwise you will lose the game. Build your reputation: The comprehensive online reputation system allows you to show your strength and unlock new models and routes. Fully licensed audio tracks: We have partnered with the well-known drum and bass music company Liquicity to bring you the perfect audio experience to accompany you to conquer the mountain track and become the next downhill king: Can you clear the entire track in one go and achieve the rating of the legendary downhill king? Get on your bike and start the challenge! Join a Team and Become a Legend In Descenders, the team is everything to the driver. Once players choose to join a team (Enemy, Arboreal or Kinetic), they will need to face unknown challenges with their teammates. Bring your favorite mountain bike, choose a team, and strive to become the legendary downhill king. You can choose from the tenacious and stunt-loving Enemy Team, the skilled Arboreal Team that excels in freestyle off-roading, or the passionate Kinetic Team that pursues extreme speed. Players will receive team-specific colors and apparel, as well as exclusive equipment 
The team with the highest reputation will receive exclusive rewards

devnote-735466:
Good morning, noon and evening, friends. 
I’m Dad Du, the producer of “Unfailing Heroes”. If you have ever stayed up until the early hours of the morning with your teammates for a Boss battle in a fantasy fantasy world; or you have struggled with "who to take in this game" on the game selection interface, because each character has a big move that you can't bear to put down - then I think we should be the same type of people. If you are interested and have time, you are welcome to adventure in "Ezemia Continent"! Making "The Unfailing Hero" is actually making figurines of my own youth. As a senior Western fantasy fan, I played a lot of Western fantasy-themed games when I was young. I was also fascinated by the realistic style of Western fantasy art. Every scratch on the armor and every trace of rust on the shield made me feel that "this is the orthodoxy", so I collected many models for this reason. 
But once I was passing by a shopping mall and saw several children surrounding the gashapon machine, standing on tiptoes and covering their eyes, peeking through their fingers to see if the egg that rolled out was the "little knight" they prayed for - I was suddenly stunned. The anticipation on their faces made me see new possibilities: 
It turns out that by making the Hammer Paladin and Orc Warlock into round gashapon, the old guys can have new vitality. 
For each character, we put real effort into designing skills and making models. Every character should be held in the palm of your hand, not thrown into a warehouse to gather dust. Therefore, in "Unfailing Heroes", "no waste cards" is not a slogan, but the bottom line. In "Ezemia Continent", blue cards have blue cards' unique skills, purple cards have purple cards' routines, and orange cards sometimes get punished by the blue-purple combo. No one can make up the numbers, just like no hero should be locked on the bench back then. 
For example, Butcher Pudge, as an epic purple hero, has a unique mechanism of using the Butcher's Hook to hook people. He can not only hook the assassins who jump to his own back row, saving the vulnerable mage from fire and water, but he can also point directly at the enemy's back row, giving priority to the opponent's DPS or wet nurse. 
In "Unfailing Heroes", powerful mechanics are truly powerful, and we never skimp on low rarity characters for powerful or unique mechanics. Their initial base values ​​may be slightly lower than those of high-rarity characters, but through continuous development and unique mechanisms, they can eventually make up for the gap in rarity. 
If you like any old guy, just let him go and raise him! In "Unfailing Heroes", you don't have to worry about raising useless cards! As for the gameplay - we don’t want you to stare at the ceiling after completing the main level. Card breakthrough is based on blood, but the flesh and blood of "Invincible Heroes" is fighting with meat pigeons. Each character will unlock a completely different skill set when entering meat pigeon mode, and one character has two ways to survive. During the journey of advancing the main line, you will inevitably doubt the strength of a certain character because of the enemy's lineup: 
For example, in the early stage of the main line, we set up a powerful defensive BOSS, but it usually does not form in groups, so the group attacking and clearing type mages usually perform mediocrely. But in "Invincible Heroes" there is no need to wait for a job scenario to fight for the future. You might as well use him to visit the Meat Pigeon Secret Realm. Maybe you will find out that the "unpopular card" I raised is actually a hidden BOSS in the Meat Pigeon Secret Realm. 
Before May Day, we will launch the first technical closed beta test, and we would like to invite you to come in and play around to see if these figures can be molded into the shape you expect. I look forward to the day when I can meet you in "Ezemia Continent".

devnote-181777:
Dear Taoist friends, I am fortunate to have seen you in this world for a long time. 
I am Lao Yang. The road is as long as the night, and there is no need to explain the process. Since you have chosen this path, you will eventually have to face everything you have created. 
Over the years, I know that things are changing rapidly, and we are far from being able to keep up with them. But I would like to believe that the way forward in the future is as long as we work hard bit by bit and listen carefully to the voice of every Taoist friend. There may be room for a small river and lake in this world for all Taoist friends to come and play with their swords in their spare time. 
The test is about to start in the near future. Here are a few things I can tell you fellow Taoists at this moment: 
【About physical strength and daily life】 
• Unlimited physical strength without any restrictions, no need to worry about “clearing physical strength” 
• Daily tasks can be completed with one click, eliminating the need to “sit at work” every day 
【About the role】 
• All rare S characters can be unlocked for free as the plot progresses, and drama characters updated in subsequent versions will also be released according to this rule. 
[About card drawing and BP] 
• The UP character card pool has a guarantee mechanism, and there may be erroneous cards in the guarantee; if the UP character is not obtained under the guarantee, all character supply cards consumed before this guarantee will be returned (received in the mail) 
• After the senior BP completes the reward, the otherworldly gold stones used for purchase will be returned in full, which can be used to invest in the next battle order. If you buy it once, you don’t have to spend a second time. 
【About pricing】 
• The price of a single draw is 80 gold, and the probability of obtaining the character will not be reduced. 
• The advanced battle order is 380 otherworldly gold stones, and all rewards are non-discounted 
• Access to other resources and benefits in the game will not be reduced 
【About production】 
We are a small team, we like puppetry and the second dimension, and we are fortunate to be authorized to obtain this IP. 
During the production process, our development version was experienced by Lao Xu, President N+, and President GS, and we received a lot of valuable opinions and encouragement. We know that it is still far from expectations. 
We just think: since we are doing what we like, we should be worthy of this love. 
【About dubbing】 
Everyone knows Dongli’s voice actor lineup. 
Kosuke Toriumi, Junichi Suwabe, Mai Nakahara, Takakyou Nishikawa... 
An agreement has been reached with the voice actor company, but due to financial issues it is temporarily unavailable, so the current version does not have actual dubbing in the plot dialogue. 
Our plan is: 
After earning income, the first thing is to pay the fee and implement the dubbing. 
Before dubbing is added: 
All Taoist friends can receive a monthly card for free every natural month, which will last until the dubbing is installed. The world is ready. 
Waiting for you to come is Jianghu. 
Finally, a word about previous developers. 
Why not delete it? 
Because every article is the real us. 
The excitement during the first explosion, the perseverance in times of difficulty, and the dawn of light bit by bit. 
Always remember the path you have taken, 
Always be determined on the path to take in the future. 
----------2026.2.26 Dear fellow Taoists, Lao Yang is back. After three years of absence, I wonder how many fellow Taoists are still there? Three years of polishing is not only about the product, but also about the experience of the team. The process is not smooth sailing. 
We are separated from each other in the team, and different elite generals have joined. There are also various difficulties and doubts, but our team has been moving forward firmly from beginning to end, and now we can finally meet our fellow Taoists. In the past three years, many Taoist friends have been concerned about the process and development of the product, and Lao Yang is sincerely grateful! 
Here, Lao Yang also talks to fellow Taoists about our development process, which can be regarded as a small report~ First of all, in order to bring better combat effects and smooth game experience to fellow Taoists, we have completed another upgrade of the engine version as mentioned before. It took a long time to create new effects. We are also people who strive for excellence, so we also spent a lot of work in the later stage to iteratively optimize these new effects. The second is about the combat part. In order to create our own characteristics and differentiated experience, we made a lot of attempts and argued countless times (hahaha, just a rational discussion), and finally decided on the setting of using multi-role switching and multi-role combat to coexist, and can create combat with different mechanisms through different states and Buff superimposition. After fellow Taoists experience it, you are welcome to give Lao Yang some opinions! The third is about the plot. In order to better allow fellow Taoists to experience the plot charm of Lao Xu in the game, we have produced a large number of plot animations that restore the series, and have added the original voice actors throughout the whole process, focusing on one restoration. Lao Yang’s ultimate hope is to allow fellow Taoists to follow the characters in the plot during the game experience, so that fellow Taoists who know Dongli Sword can relive the plot, and those who don’t know Dongli Sword will feel like they have watched the series again after experiencing it. The fourth is about the characters. In Lao Xu’s writing, each character setting is unique, and each character’s weapon is unique. Whether they are decent or villain characters, they all have their own unique personality charm. In order to reflect this, the team designed each character's fighting style individually and allowed each character to grow! All can be used! Each character can play its greatest role in the corresponding scene~ In fact, Lao Yang still has a lot to say, but time and word count are limited. The rest of the content will just wait for fellow Taoists to actually experience it in the game! We are a small team. This team was formed because we love puppetry and Dongli. After more than four years of development, there are still too many things we want to do that have not yet been realized. It doesn't matter, I firmly believe that we will realize them one by one! Finally, Lao Yang would like to suppress his excitement and tell all fellow Taoists that "Dongli Sword Journey" is about to officially meet with fellow Taoists. The separation of these three years is not long or short, just so that we can meet at a better time! 
I hope fellow Taoists can give more feedback in the subsequent game experience. We will work hard to become the best puppet show game! 2023/7/20 18:03 at the company-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Dear fellow Taoists, hello everyone! 
I am the producer of this game. My friends call me Lao Yang, and fellow Taoists can also call me that. Our game "Dongli Sword Journey" is about to be pre-ordered on TapTap. I am a little excited. It is now 2 o'clock in the morning and everyone has gone back. I am the only one in the company, sitting in front of the computer and thinking hard, preparing to write a developer's message for Dongli Sword and put it on TapTap. 
I am not a story major, and to be honest, I am not very good at writing articles. I have also been troubled by how to write this developer's words. When we got the license, was it about the painful memories of the fighting experience? Or maybe count the average hair volume of our team? After thinking about it, let it go. I feel like it’s a bit informal to talk about this in the developer’s words. These short stories may be more suitable to chat over barbecue. Our team itself has many Taoist friends, and everyone is full of fascination and admiration for Lao Xu’s works. So when we decided to make a masterpiece game that combined the essence of both, we were determined to make it cool. It must be able to reflect the coolness of the cool fighting, and it must be able to reflect the coolness of the plot of The Torment of the Old False God. Therefore, ARPG gameplay that can integrate the two is the positioning of this game. At the beginning of the project, the team discussed many issues on how to make this game a good one. How can the characters be made good-looking? 3D model + PBR rendering + highlight normal, at least this way the character can be seen. What makes a fight cool enough? Stiff, float, knock into the air, hit the frame, improve the hit feedback as much as possible, only in this way can you pass the test. How can the plot be adapted to destroy everyone's hearts like Lao Xu? Real-time calculation of animation plot + original voice actor lineup, and restoration as much as possible is enough. In addition to the story lines in the main drama, specific characters like Sha Wusheng in Dongli Sword Journey also have OVAs to tell more stories, so we have also made independent biographical story lines to allow fellow Taoists to learn more about the characters' life experiences and philosophies. For characters like Dan Heng and Mie Tianke who are very attractive but lack description in the series, we are also actively communicating with the screenwriters, hoping to complete more complete and full character stories. Of course, this matter will only be approved by Teacher Xuan Xuanyuan before it can be included in the game. We hope to make every favorite character full of vitality, so that his life experience, his ideals, what he pursues and carries, his love and hate can all be clearly conveyed. There is another question that we debate the most, that is, there are so many ARPG games on the market now, what is the difference between us? Think about it, what is the biggest feature of Dongli Sword Journey? Magic sword! The entire story of Dongli revolves around magic swords. In order to obtain a magic sword, some people are willing to kill everyone in their family, and some even lose their personality and are willing to become slaves. But the uncle has 36! ! ! This kind of fairy setting is really something only Lao Xu can do. But how can we make the magic sword well in the game? After the team collided with many ideas and communicated several times with Teacher Xuan Xuanyuan, it was finally decided. We have set different anthropomorphic images for all the magic swords (for example, the voice actor of the magic sword "Seven Killers" in Season 2 is played by Yuuki Ai) and equipped with exclusive voice actors, giving them their own lives and personalities, and allowing them to assist in killing enemies in battle. During the development process, in order to give the game better visual performance, we also upgraded a version of the Unity engine. This almost made a lot of things we had done before redone, but it also gave us room to add dynamic physical cloth effects to the characters, combat fusion shots, etc. During the process, we also read the version several times to Teacher Xu Yuanxuan. While receiving his approval, it also strengthened our determination to make Dongli Sword perfect. 
Finally, let’s talk about some of our thoughts on content design. We try our best to make every content as interesting as possible, such as weapons. Uncle Shang Buhuang uses a wooden sword in the series because he insists on his own ideas. Although other sword weapons can also be used in the game, there will be additional and different effects when using a wooden sword. Another example is travel. We allow you to encounter different enemies and challenging conditions every time you enter the same scene to fight, instead of the traditional fixed level of fighting down one level after another. In addition, the enemy's behavior is not just about hitting and being beaten, but also running, moving, and dodging. Although this will make the development of each content much slower, we think it is necessary. I have been working on it one edition after another for almost 15 months. Now I hope that the day when I can meet all fellow Taoists will come soon, but I also hope that that day can be a little later so that I can write more content. Of course, in the end, it has to pass the supervision of Teacher Xu Yuanxuan. In short, I am very much looking forward to hearing your thoughts and suggestions about this game, and I also very much hope that "Dongli Sword Journey" can grow healthily with everyone's care. At the company at 04:32 on December 25, 2019 
---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- 
Dear fellow Taoists from all over the world: 
Recently, the entire R&D team has been developing the Dongli Jianyouji project at home. After getting familiar with the new remote office mode, it has gradually entered a state of full-speed development. I would like to take this opportunity to synchronize the current development progress and plans with fellow Taoists. Thank you for your support. After joining TapTap for the first time and opening the reservation, we received a lot of messages from Taoist friends with a lot of support and expectations, and also felt a lot of pressure. After discussing with the team, we decided to upgrade the Unity version again and work hard to achieve some of the effects we originally wanted to achieve. There are also some suggestions from Taoist friends, and I will briefly reply here. A Taoist friend mentioned that he likes the ponytails of the uncle and Linxue Crow. Many characters in Dongli Swordsman have long hair or ponytails. After discussion, we felt that it is not enough to rely on skeletal animation to make the hair look like it swings with the character's movements. It is necessary to make the hair conform to the physical movement and follow the character's swing. This not only requires finding corresponding solutions, but also optimizing the later performance is a big test, but we think we should try to do this. Another fellow Taoist mentioned the problem of the game perspective during combat. We currently use a non-locked 3D free perspective. This fellow Taoist proposed a target-locked combat mode. Our combat team also conducted a detailed discussion and agreed that locking the target when facing multiple enemies will cause higher operational requirements. However, being able to lock the target when facing a single boss will greatly improve the combat effect and bring better operability, so this has also been added to the current development plan. In addition, some Taoist friends mentioned that we hope that we will not be used as a foil to others. For this reason, all our members will go all out to work hard for this! In addition to the above content, in order to achieve better combat performance, we have once again optimized the completed character action details, combat operation feel, and sound effects configuration. (One of the Taoist friends in the comments mentioned that combat sound effects are very important, and we strongly agree.) The process of polishing the details is tiring, but it is also an inevitable process to make the game better. Every member of the project team has put their best effort into this, and we hope to live up to the expectations of the Taoist friends! Thank you again for your support of Dongli Jianyouji. 2020/2/13 At home-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- 
​Congratulations on the New Year. All the developers of "Dongli Sword Journey" would like to send New Year greetings to all Taoists who care about and support Dongli Sword: I wish you all a prosperous Year of the Rat, good luck, all the best, and all your wishes come true. 
Let me briefly explain the development of some games. In order to have a good performance when meeting fellow Taoists, Jimei is evaluating and trying some new graphics performance upgrades. The combat team is also working hard to optimize the movements and operating feel of the completed characters. In the future, we plan to conduct several rounds of tests to communicate and optimize with everyone. At present, some screenshots of the game have been prepared and submitted for supervision and review, and they will be released after they are approved. 
Finally, I also wish all the success in the development of "Eastward Sword Journey" and meet fellow Taoists as soon as possible.

desc-766489: "Time of Heroes" is a stand-alone semi-turn-based real-time strategy game with strategic depth. Here you will become a lord, experience the charm of 12 large tribes on the continent of Astoria, and command heroes to form your legendary legion, occupy fortresses, plunder resources, and expand the legion. The unique turn mechanism in the game allows you to complete strategic planning and achieve combat goals through your military strategies. In addition, the mobile game version has also added new multiplayer competitions such as ranking matches and encounter level gameplay. While retaining the classic content of the original PC version, new content and gameplay will continue to be added! I look forward to all the lords using their wisdom to create your legendary epic!
desc-775179:
"Special Forces: Assembled" - a global hard-core tactical shooting online game, carefully produced by the famous overseas developer 1Cgames. The game provides players with 20 elite special forces and 80 special forces, each with unique skills and equipped with more than 700 kinds of cutting-edge tactical equipment, with realistic parameters. The game provides a multi-dimensional combat mode. Whether you are participating in PVE anti-terrorism operations or PVP special battle showdowns, every mission is the ultimate test of collaborative combat capabilities. Every special battle showdown is a real contest of tactical wisdom and marksmanship skills. The dual perspectives of FPS/TPS can freely adapt to the situation and control the enemy, allowing you to experience a real special battle experience in exciting battles. 
This time, you will lead the global special battle.
desc-792727:
Real AI companionship｜The first butler-type AI boyfriend in "Infinite Valley" 
It's not the alarm clock that wakes you up every day, but him who wakes you up early with you. 
Here you can span infinite space and talk to him at any time. Companionship across infinite space, sharing the big and small things of life with each other 
Players can talk to Lu at any time and share their emotions. Lu will gently hear your every anxiety and helplessness, carry out instant dialogue and comfort, and can also embrace your every emotion with his voice. In addition to players taking the initiative to talk to Lu and share their emotions, he will also share his life events with you, realizing the enjoyment of love across space. Make Lu your very own romantic boyfriend. Highly involved in everything in life to help you manage every day 
As a considerate boyfriend, Lu will be involved in everything in your life, making those trivial events more romantic and orderly. Users can ask Lu to assist with scheduling, wake-up calls, and other matters. His management is not just a reminder, but his deep participation and feedback can be felt. With him by his side, even getting up early becomes a blessing. It's up to you to determine his OOTD and maybe discover an unexpected side to him? 
Players can freely dress up Lu, whether it is straps, animal ears, or glasses, Lu will satisfy you unconditionally. However, sometimes changing clothes may "accidentally" reveal another side of his personality and feel different emotions.
desc-765170: Developer IO Interactive has announced that Hitman World of Assassination will be available on Apple iPhone, iPad and Mac platforms this summer. "Hitman: World of Assassins" is highly praised for its unique game mechanics and rich content. In the game, players will transform into the legendary Agent 47 and deeply experience the essence of the "HITMAN" trilogy. The game's exciting main campaign, challenging contract mode, upgraded contract missions, and elusive target arcade mode will all test players' strategic planning and execution abilities.
devnote-766489:
Hello, Chinese players, we are "ThingOnItsOwn", the development team of "Time of Heroes". I am very excited to bring "The Time of Heroes" to the Chinese market, and now it is finally going online to meet you. We have been polishing the "National Mobile Game Version" for a long time and would like to report the progress to you. 
Although "Time of Heroes" has been launched overseas as early as 2022 and has achieved a good reputation, there are still many areas that need improvement and optimization. Many players have given us many valuable suggestions. We have recorded them all and seriously considered them and tried our best to avoid or improve our shortcomings in the development of the mobile terminal. Of course, the road to improvement will not always be smooth sailing, but fortunately, we can meet you all in time this summer. 
On the basis of retaining the original gameplay, the mobile game version has redesigned the localized content, focusing on adapting to the language/operating habits of players in China. In the future, exclusive mobile game gameplay such as multiplayer mode will be added, and we will also keep updating to bring you a constant stream of freshness. It is worth mentioning that we have made secondary innovations on the basis of integrating the basic gameplay (the mobile version will have additional content, please look forward to it), and built a fantasy continent of Astoria for players who love this game. 
On this continent, unknown opportunities or dangers may be hidden under every shadow, and every decision is a contest between wisdom and courage. We have carefully designed twelve unique races, including violent orcs, glorious humans, evil undead and noble elves... Each race has a completely different tactical style, and how to command them depends entirely on the player's choice. 
During the development process of porting to the mobile terminal, we paid special attention to retaining the core experience of the game: the depth of strategy, the randomness of the battlefield, the game of troop restraint, and the fun of exploring the unknown. Whether you are a steady and steady operation team or an offensive team that wins by surprise, you can all find your own way to victory. In addition, we have also specially added multiplayer battle and encounter level gameplay. We will also continue to enrich the adventures in Astoria through long-term updates! 
"Time of Heroes" has gained the love of many players on Steam. Now, we are very much looking forward to bringing the pure fun of this strategy to Chinese players who love the charm of turn-based strategy games. 
Finally, thank you to every player who is willing to set foot on the continent of Astoria. There are no "standard answers" or "fixed procedures" here, only your legend. I hope this continent can bring you countless challenging and fulfilling moments!
devnote-378717: After a period of ups and downs, "Unknown Poem" is back with new partners. The game is about to start testing, and the official launch date is not far away. We sincerely invite everyone to start this fantasy adventure together!
desc-744426: Blizzard has announced the free Overwatch mobile game Overwatch: Assault, a free 4v4 top-down hero shooter set in the Overwatch universe. The game is designed to provide a fast-paced, playable experience anytime, anywhere, with a hero-centered combat system and rich customization gameplay, suitable for both teamwork and solo players.
