desc-378717:
"Unknown Poem" is a fantasy adventure + horizontal version ARPG mobile game. The story takes place in a world where magic and technology intersect, where you will meet new friends with different personalities, explore various continents in the world, and fight and adventure together. An immersive fantasy adventure is waiting for you! ✧ Fantasy world·Plot exploration 
In this fantasy magical world, you can not only experience the main plot, but also unlock character-specific stories and explore the truth behind strange phenomena in various places. ✧ Join hands with partners and fight powerful enemies together 
In an era of universal magic, you will meet many charming partners with different abilities. You can establish bonds with them, form a unique battle team, and jointly face unknown powerful enemies! ✧ Smooth combat and free switching 
Horizontal action battlefield, free combination of skill chains, switching roles during the battle, strategy matching output sequence, and exclusive combos. There is also the influence of element accumulation and combat evaluation. Strategy and operation are both emphasized, and the possibilities are endless. ✧ Matching equipment and developing strategies 
All equipment can be cultivated, and its attributes can be freely constructed. Explore different combinations and customize the strongest configuration for your team, playing a key role in different battle situations. ✧ Multi-dimensional dungeon·endless challenges 
There are special dungeons scattered across major regions, with completely different combat mechanisms and clearance methods. Each game is a brand new test, waiting for you to conquer all difficulties with your strength and wisdom.
desc-803292:
"Strange Stories from Mountains and Seas" is a 2.5D deeply immersive RPG game with the background of cultivating immortals. Under the leadership of a mysterious man, you will embark on the path of cultivating immortality, starting from the most ordinary cultivator, and finally reaching the great avenue, traveling through multiple universes, looking for the hidden history lost in the chaotic time and space. · Immerse yourself in cultivating immortality 
From the mist-shrouded Lingshan Wonderland to the dark and deep underworld, rich resources and unknown challenges are hidden everywhere. The delicate scene design and gorgeous skill special effects present you with a real and dreamy world of cultivating immortals, allowing you to immerse yourself in the wonderful journey of cultivating immortals. · Diversified practice 
It provides a variety of cultivation and development system gameplay, including fairy spirits, gods, mountains and seas, sects, fairy fate, demon subduing, etc. The vast world of cultivating immortals is waiting for your exploration, from the deep secret realm to the prosperous heaven, there are unknown challenges and opportunities hidden everywhere. Let the road to immortality be full of variables and challenges. ·The origin of cultivating immortality 
In the game, players can not only join or create a sect and meet like-minded immortal cultivation partners, but they can also develop deep feelings with their favorite TA, experience ups and downs together, and rise together. · Refining weapons and elixirs 
Spiritual beasts are companions, and magic weapons are in hand! Collect rare materials, learn the art of refining weapons and alchemy, create exclusive magic weapons, transform and infuse spirits, gradually unlock more abilities, and create your own legend of immortality. "Strange Stories from Mountains and Seas" will take you into a fantasy world where fairies and demons coexist. You can stroll among green mountains and green waters, or fly with a sword above the sea of ​​clouds, and experience the legendary journey from mortal to immortal!
devnote-786756:
Thank you to everyone who watched "Jojo's Bizarre Adventure: Golden Hymn". 
As a genuine authorized mobile game of the "JoJo's Bizarre Adventure" series animation, "Golden Anthem" has always adhered to the concept of restoring animation. In order to better fit the story of JOJO, the production team used 3D modeling and scenes, which can not only show the well-known animated characters and classic scenes one by one, but also bring more freshness to players with alternative creative methods. This test will open the main plot based on "JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Golden Wind", and set the levels according to the animation plot. 
At the same time, players can relive famous scenes from the series of animations such as Dior's "I am no longer a human being" and Caesar's "The Last Ripple" in "Golden Hymn". Even in terms of gameplay and mechanics, the production team also used the animation series as a blueprint to open up more creative possibilities. 
"Golden Hymn" uses JOJO animation as its creative source, focusing the core combat gameplay on strategic matching, skill restraint and cooperation. Not only that, the game also has an original "environmental combat system", under which characters can obtain corresponding buffs and debuffs. For example, in the game, Shikoaro's skills and normal attack range will be increased accordingly in environments such as rainfall and heavy rain; Nalanja can be immune to the attack range reduction effects caused by heavy fog and sandstorms. For more game information, please stay tuned for the official TAPTAP account of "Jojo's Bizarre Adventure: Golden Hymn"! The production team very much welcomes all suggestions from partners, and together with the collective efforts, we can make "Golden Hymn" a real strategy game of wits. Finally, the production team sincerely hopes that "Golden Hymn" can truly convey the beautiful belief of this classic line said by Zebelin in the animation: "The hymn of mankind is the hymn of courage." Once again, thank you to everyone who carries your love and always walks with you.
desc-759961:
I traveled back to Jiangcheng a thousand years ago and became a workshop owner... Why was it you who traveled through time? Sect disputes, secret fights in workshops, conflicts between alien races, and the restoration of princes, the calm surface of Jiangcheng has undercurrents... Playing with ancient times, turning wasteland into a good place 
Create automated production lines, from wooden boards to circuit boards, design each of your production lines. 
Gradually unlock future technologies, from silicon purification to photovoltaic power generation, and build your super-era workshop. 
Use cross-region transfer stations to receive products of all levels and expand your branch factory territory to the entire continent. 
Make wine, press oil, make ovens, or even watches and antibiotics. Amaze the ancients with your future products! 
Reinforced concrete, rubber, large computers, these will all be built in batches by you in ancient times a thousand years ago! ! ! Make friends with ancient people and talk about love spanning ancient and modern times 
Currently, 12 playable characters are open, including royals, rivers and lakes, merchants... Uncover everyone's secrets and pursue the friendship and love you want. 
Talk about marriage with the partner of your choice and live in the workshop together. He/she will also bring you strong support. 
Make friends with nearly 30 ancient people, each of whom has their own schedule of changing seasons, participate in their lives, and use modern knowledge to solve their problems. 
In Jiangcheng, everything happens naturally. It's up to you to decide when you want to work, explore, or fall in love. Practice martial arts and conquer the world 
Get started with the extremely fast combat system, dodge and attack, and defeat your enemies with reasonable operations. 
Orthodox learning or adventure in the world, external skills, internal skills, light skills, hard skills, more than 40 kinds of martial arts let you dominate the world. Open large map exploration 
Explore the four villages on the map, complete village tasks and discover their secrets. 
Explore the mysterious realm left for you by the mysterious predecessor, go deep into it, and defeat strange monsters. 
Explore the entire continent, discover treasures, bravely explore the Bat Cave, and punish bandits for the people. 
Sign contracts with mine owners across the map and let the ancients work for you. Multiple ways to play, free to choose your development direction 
Are you a craftsman or a people person? The number one person in the martial arts world or an expert in life? It's all up to you. 
Create elixirs, weapons, clothing, and become an ancient craftsman. 
More than 20 kinds of dishes with different buffs, including five delicacies stew, snow cloud soup... make them in your kitchen! 
Fill the Tiangong Pavilion with the products you made, and let the ancients come to see modern technology. 
Use the power of future technology to repair the time machine and complete the mission that only you can accomplish.
desc-786756:
"Jojo's Bizarre Adventure" super popular animated series authentically authorized mobile game, the first beta of "Jojo's Bizarre Adventure: Golden Hymn" is about to begin! A wonderful adventure is about to begin. 
Here, you can relive the story of the Joestar family’s struggle with fate over hundreds of years, see all generations of JOJOs fighting with their partners, immerse yourself in every bloody or tragic battle, and relive every famous scene engraved in your memory! 
In terms of gameplay content, the game strives to achieve a deeper restoration and deeply bind the plot content and gameplay. "Golden Anthem" hopes that "3D strategy cards" can also bring a passionate and witty fighting experience unique to JOJO! 
-Ability countermeasures and intelligence games: What determines victory or defeat is not only the character's combat style and development, but also the character's skill combination and application. With this information in hand, you can gain insight into opportunities before the battle and make the battle more advantageous! 
-Newly accessed environment system: 18 realistic and dynamic environments. Each battle may bring unexpected situations due to different weather conditions. Some characters will also trigger exclusive effects under specific conditions. 
There are more surprise mechanisms hidden in battles, waiting for everyone to discover! "The hymn of mankind is the hymn of courage." Welcome to embark on an adventurous journey with JOJO and their friends in "Golden Hymn"!
devnote-803292:
Hello everyone! I would like to sincerely thank all my fellow immortals for their support all the way to "Strange Stories from Mountains and Seas". Today I finally have a formal meeting with you, and now I will have a good chat with you about this work of cultivating immortals. 
We always adhere to the original intention of becoming an immortal even if you are a prostitute, so that every immortal cultivator can freely pursue his dream of immortality and write his own immortal chapter of immortality!

For the rest of the time, just concentrate on studying the equipment lineup, just hang up and wait for the ascension ~ 
I am grateful to be with you all. We will never forget our original aspirations and work hand in hand with all our fellow immortals to build this wonderful world of mountain and sea cultivation that is full of chivalry and grand dreams!
desc-779246: "Island Hunter" is a "one-click-one-turn" light rogue war game. With nothing but hope and a revolver, you will trek between islands and brave a shattered world to challenge the will of God and appease the wrath of the gods.
desc-826128: In troubled times, demons are rampant. As the orthodox descendant of Maoshan, you wear a Bagua Taoist robe, hold a peach wood sword, draw talismans and seals, refine demons and summon gods, and experience the original supernatural ghost hunting legend! Delve deep into the strange affairs of the people, track down the ghost bride, subdue the zombie king, and solve the century-old corpse plague... Rich plot missions, immersive first-person perspective, freely explore the mysterious world, and start an ups and downs journey of the heavenly master slaying evil!

The mobile version porting plan is officially launched - UNITY reset decision! Bosses are welcome to stop by and make a free reservation~ 
Hello everyone, this is the otome game development team Berry Night Production Team, which is mainly composed of two office workers who love stand-alone independent games; "Calamity Black Dragon and the Lie Princess" is the first reverse harem otome visual novel game developed by the team with an imaginary western fantasy theme. I hope Little Black Dragon can give everyone an immersive reading time^^! In terms of creation, we know that we are still immature, and we have stumbled and made a lot of jokes. Little Black Dragon is not a perfect work. As a creator, we watched this project gradually grow from a new folder to finally online, and gained everyone's love along the way, which made the team deeply feel the meaning of creation. We will also actively listen to everyone's feedback, accumulate experience, and continue to persist on the road of game development. Thank you again to all players for their support and attention! Extra number! The development of [1V1 Free Extra] with Heilong has been progressing in an orderly manner, and other male protagonists' extras and multiplayer extras will also be completed one after another. desc-744397: "Fishing Sails Undercurrent" is a single-player fishing adventure game with turbulent undercurrents. Sell ​​your catch, upgrade your boat, and unearth long-buried secrets in the deep sea. Explore a mysterious archipelago and finally understand why some things are better forgotten.
desc-597767:
"The Black Dragon of Calamity and the Princess of Lies" is an otome-oriented visual novel with a Western fantasy theme. 
"Can love rooted in lies bear fruit?" Players will play the role of a human princess who was taken away by the dragon of disaster, trying to establish a bond with the dragon, seeking a glimmer of hope, and doing everything possible to reverse the dangerous fate. 
⚡Note: All characters in this game are aged 18+. It is a visual novel game with storytelling as its core. There is no absolute 1V1 line or ending. 【Game Features】 
—Contains 3 male characters that can be conquered. Princess, please choose your favorite route: 
60% The rational and arrogant legal shota black dragon (there are adult male forms but not many) 
30% Cynical theatergoer Bai Long 
10% The tsundere and bamboo horse brave man who is dissatisfied with his body 
—Script setting close to Japanese-style Western fantasy 
—Full-color & hand-painted style CG, storyboards and props pictures 
—A variety of completely different endings. Is love only affecting the speed at which I draw my sword, or is it that the little black dragon also has his own burning winter. This is a story that explores the essence of emotion between truth and falsehood. 
Please say you love me before the dawn of One Thousand and One Nights.
devnote-826128:
When weirdness breaks through Yin and Yang and the world becomes purgatory, we gather gods from all walks of life to eliminate demons and defend the way! 
As lovers of weird themes and mythical worlds, we created this card game with the advent of weirdness as the background; 
With card construction as the core, we create a strategic and interesting game, allowing players to flexibly match their decks and enjoy the thrill of strategizing! 
After the official test, the team will also send a generous resource gift package. We look forward to everyone coming to experience it and leave your valuable comments or suggestions!
desc-602386:
The game is currently available for pre-order overseas and will be officially launched overseas on June 4, priced at US$7.99. Skul is a fast-paced action rogue-lite game where you can transform into different characters by changing your head. With 100 playable characters, each with their own unique abilities, and tons of items to create wild BDs, combat is both exciting and challenging. Demon King's Castle in Ruins It is nothing new for humans to attack the Demon King's castle, it has happened countless times. The difference this time, however, is that the adventurers decided to join forces with the Imperial Army and the "Heroes of Carleon" to launch an all-out onslaught in the hope of wiping out the demon once and for all. They attacked the Demon Fortress with overwhelming numbers and succeeded in completely destroying it. All the demons in the castle have been captured, except for a lone skeleton named "Skull". Dark Mirror Mode After completing the main story, test your skills and limits in the new challenging Dark Mirror mode! Features 
-You are the last hope of the entire demon race! Play as Skeletor, slay arrogant heroes on the way and save the Demon King from the corrupt Cullen army. 
- Losing your head has never felt right: try out new skulls, borrow their former owners’ powers and dashing outfits, and create synergies with unique items to defeat your enemies. 
- What is dead may never die: You won't rest until you face all the challenges of this action-packed rogue-lite platformer. 
- Feast your empty eyes on vibrant cartoony pixel art 2D animations as you help various demonic creatures return to their original state. 
- From Egyptian mummies to Greek minotaurs and even an official Dead Cells crossover... will you find all the fun Easter eggs scattered throughout the game? Thoughtfully redesigned for mobile devices 
- Improved interface - Exclusive mobile UI with full touch controls 
- Cloud Save - Share your progress between Android devices 
- Controller support
desc-836162:
As a cat, you became the mayor of a cat village. You wanted to live a peaceful life, but you were forced to shoulder the KPI of the whole village! 
You can choose from the beginning: go back to ancient times and be the head of a pastoral cat village, spin yarn, make wine and grow cat grass; or be an urban cat boss in the modern era, open a factory and live broadcast to develop industry. Agriculture, forestry, and planting are all arranged, and textiles, food, and manufacturing are all under your control. From land reclamation and logging to assembly line production, it is all up to you. 
The Maomao employees under me each have their own "cat design": those who are more active in eating than working, those who are more serious about fishing than working, and those whose appearance is good but not their brains... If they are coaxed well, they work hard, but if they are not coaxed, they will go on a collective strike to fish. 
The left hand is responsible for production, and the right hand is for petting cats. While preventing trouble in the next village, Xiaopo Village is built into an economically powerful village in the cat world. Being the leader of a cat village and pursuing a career is so exciting!
devnote-773090: If you encounter bugs or have good suggestions, you can join the group to communicate.
desc-773090: In the fantasy world, illusions are turned into reality, reincarnation is rebuilt, and the road to true immortality is directed. Search, fight, withdraw, and collect gold are played with various popular surprises. Spell construction, magic weapon development, and realm breakthroughs continue to become stronger!
desc-776078: Xiao Ming and his classmates embarked on a journey to Antarctica after the party. However, something unexpected happened and the ship was hit by huge waves and eventually capsized. In the chaos, only a few people survived. In order to find a chance of survival, they had to cross the freezing ice fields of Antarctica, and finally arrived outside the towering ice wall - accidentally stepping into an unknown territory beyond imagination: the vast "big world". Is all this the end of a disaster or the beginning of a legend?
devnote-836162: Put aside your worries and become the head of a cat village, leading a group of lazy and cute working cats to farm and build factories~
desc-211274: Instant Town Building Tool It can be used to build ancient towns with winding streets, small villages, towering churches, intertwined canals, or castles in the air. Build block by block. There are no goals and no real gameplay. There are just countless buildings and countless beauties. That's all. Townscaper is an experimental project. It's more like a toy than a game. We can pick colors from the palette, select a house color block and place it in an irregular grid, and then see how {Townscaper}'s underlying algorithm automatically turns these color blocks into cute little houses, arches, stairs, bridges and lush backyards according to different configurations.
desc-790468:
When war breaks out in the blue ocean, and when dangers lurk in unknown waters, a sailing feast that combines strategic games, random adventures, and leisure is waiting for you to set sail! 
Here there are fierce tower defense battles with gunfire, deep sea exploration with frequent adventures, and exclusive climate buffs "backed by God" - this is the nautical tower defense strategy adventure game "Thunder Wars" tailor-made for you! [Observe the sky and set up formations, and play new tricks in strategic tower defense] 
Different from the fixed confrontation of traditional tower defense, in this sea area, "depending on the weather" is the key to victory! Before the challenge starts, the weather forecast will accurately report the buffs of the day for you, and you can also gain insight into the elemental attributes of monsters in advance - heavy rain can restrain wind-type pirates, thick fog can suppress the attacks of wind-type monsters, and the blood moon phenomenon can suppress the three elemental powers of water and scenery. Use the power of the sky to set up a defense line and directly invalidate the enemy's attribute gains! You can build a turret defense line at will, from blazing wheels to freezing ice arrows, and build an exclusive defense system with different characteristics and skills. When the enemy steps into the defense line, the full screen of special effects explodes, and the visual impact of gunfire and waves interweaves, making every defense exciting! [Hang up to protect your liver, and set sail easily with a full cabin of benefits] 
Worried about being too tired from sailing? The casual idle system allows you to win the game! Even if you are offline, your ship will automatically cruise and explore, and continue to collect gold coins, materials and experience. Once you are online again, you can receive full idle benefits. There is also a continuous upgrade of the welfare system, daily login, accumulated idle time, and deep-sea challenges to receive precious props. 
You can also invite friends to sail together to help you - you don’t need to max out your liver, and you can easily defeat powerful enemies, allowing you to enjoy the adventure and fill the cabin with treasures at the same time! [Multiple ways to play, unlock the full sailing experience] 
The game is never limited to a single mode: Want to challenge your limits? Then participate in the "Endless Sea" mode and hit the defensive record under waves of strengthened enemy attacks; Want to form a team to have a carnival? "Quick Team Formation" invites friends to build a defense line and work together to repel giant sea monsters. You can also invite brothers to form a pirate team in the Poseidon Arena to conquer the four seas together! ;Want to explore Buddhism? The "Deep Sea Adventure" mode allows you to travel through the sea at will and collect hidden treasures everywhere. There is also a deeply strategic "Elemental Tower" gameplay waiting for you to conquer! There are five exclusive element towers in the game: wind, water, fire, wood, light and darkness, which can hone elemental strategies in a targeted manner. From strategic tower defense to casual exploration, from single player to team collaboration, the rich gameplay fully covers your sailing needs, making adventure always full of new directions! 
Calibrate the course now, rely on meteorological wisdom to decipher the enemy's attributes, use strategic defense lines to guard the route, and harvest treasures from random encounters - this ocean legend is waiting to be written by you!
desc-717730:
"Virtual Ring" is a strong combat performance strategy development game exclusively for V Circle. 
The girls who appear in the game are all famous V-circle anchors in this plane; but in the parallel world called Virtual Ring, they are fighting idols who change the world. 
In the game, you can develop a team, build a lineup, travel through time and space full of "what ifs" with your friends, and compete with legendary idols from different teams!
devnote-78734: NOeSIS01 is now available on Steam for free, and you are welcome to download it. In addition, thanks to D University for its careful Chinese translation, and all TAP friends who helped with crowdfunding. Welcome to follow the post bar: NOeSIS False Memory Story Bar
desc-813663:
Welcome to "Dragon Talisman: Heavenly Sacrifice", a card strategy adventure that spans time and space, starting from now on! 
At the end of the Eastern Han Dynasty, the heaven and earth were out of order, and a strange fog enveloped Jiuzhou. Under the surging undercurrent, a silent war with the world as a sacrifice and heroic souls as a chess game is awakening and quietly sweeping the Central Plains. 
Hundreds of famous generals from all major camps were included in the dragon talisman. 
Collect the cards of hundreds of famous generals from Wei, Shu, Wu, and other heroes, freely build camp bonds, and control your strategic army in the confusing chaos of the troubled times. 
Should we forcefully attack and break the formation, or should we make a decision and then act? Every card is the key to your victory. 
Raise their generals, plan their strategies, explore their dangers, and offer sacrifices to the world. ​ 
Lord, please enter the game with your talisman and recruit outstanding heroes. In this era of blood and sacrifice, write your own story with your own hands - a legend of troubled times that no one can replicate.
desc-220317: "Star Warframe" is a science fiction-themed MMORPG whose main fun is the collection and matching of equipment. At the TENNOCON 2021 press conference of "Star Warframe", the developers of the game showed everyone the operating status of "Star Warframe" on the mobile segment, and shared their new achievements in breaking the limitations of each platform and allowing data to be interoperable across all platforms. Super Heroes Various types of heroes restore super power fantasy. Each Tenno hero with a unique appearance has unique positioning and attributes. Choose different super heroes to play and get different extraordinary experiences. Action shooting: slide shovel, wall walk, slash, back stab, close combat gives you the pleasure of instantly defeating the enemy. Long-range attacks include cool operations such as sliding shovel shooting, quick switching of far and near lenses, and drawing swords. The battle is full of pleasure. At the same time, you can also use strategies, positioning, operations and other skills to achieve close combat and one-shot assassination effects. Every planet in interstellar exploration will leave your traces. In the vast universe, you will play the role of a Tiannuo warrior and experience a magnificent legend of salvation and self-redemption. Frozen worlds, lava surfaces, interiors of lost ruins, mysterious voids, temples of prehistoric civilizations, hidden passages and chambers... Thousands of interstellar maps are waiting for you to uncover. The display room of supernatural weapons, ancient weapons and future technology, from cool cold weapons such as bows and arrows, long knives in ancient times, to hot-blooded snipers, shotguns and other modern weapons, to futuristic laser guns, electromagnetic cannons and even biological weapons, Tiannuo warriors can freely choose the weapons and equipment at hand to release themselves in every battle. Collect modules and play with super modules to create exclusive heroes in depth. Hundreds of card MODs scattered across the stars can bring different attribute bonuses to your heroes and weapons. In addition to the fun it brings, how these cards are combined and installed on heroes and weapons is also a brain-burning matter. If you choose the right MOD, your super hero and mission experience will be completely new. Clan system: Create a team, compete for interstellar supremacy, join a clan, you can quickly find teammates to join the mission; you can build a real clan home with other clan members, arrange it freely, decorate duel rooms, barracks, temples of honor, auditoriums, courtyards, build laboratories to develop different technologies and blueprints; after creating an interstellar channel, you and your clan will fight side by side, and even form alliances with other clans. Fight fiercely in the black zone to snatch rewards and resources, and share interstellar honor.
devnote-813663:
My dear lords, I wish you all the best. 
When we first came across the mist-shrouded history of the Three Kingdoms in the pile of old papers, one thought always lingered: If those names that had been mentioned in history books could rise again with swords in their hands, would their stories be different? 
So, we took action. 
This is not only a game, but also a "historical reconstruction experiment" that we wrote together with you. Here, every general is no longer a cold card data. We blend historical materials and imagination to give them skills and souls that transcend the times. What we want to present is not a re-enactment of history, but another possibility of history. 
"Nurture the generals, plan the strategies, explore the dangers, and sacrifice the world" - these twelve words are the rules we have set for this battlefield. There is no fixed and strongest lineup, only ever-changing strategic games. Should Guo Jia's Ice Rain resonate with Zhou Yu's Karma Fire, or should Zhang Fei's Evil Shadow and Zhao Yun's Gentian strike together? Hundreds of famous generals have thousands of connections. We only set up the stage, but you control the plot. 
Those figures who have left regrets in the history books may be here to reach the end of the story with you. 
This world is waiting for its new owner.
desc-762269:
"Burning Era" - the ultimate treasure-gathering holy land for fish hunters! 
Do you think this is a traditional idle RPG? No, "Burning Era" doesn't take the usual path! 
During the day, fight against beasts, skeletons, and ogres in the forest. At night, you can be directly transported to the technologically advanced Outland Mecha Base, where you can confront each other head-on with alien magic armors. You can also create new tricks by placing them! 
[Various mercenary system - create the strongest team exclusively] 
There is no useless profession here, only insufficient brain power. 
9 basic professions + 28 advanced schools, you can freely change professions and match them as you like. 
●You can: Create an iron-walled tank army, and fight the BOSS without losing blood! 
●Assemble a team to treat the nanny, so that the whole team can always be resurrected with full health! 
●Heap burst output, clear the picture in one second, and the damage fills the entire screen! 
●You can also play summon flow, control flow, gain flow...all kinds of cool tricks are waiting for you to unlock. 
Is it a single-core explosion or multi-core collaboration? The fun of matching the lineup is definitely more confusing than ordering takeout on weekends, but every time you try a new genre, people say - it's so cool! 
[Fantasy maps with different styles - exploration is never boring] 
10 major theme scenes appear in turn, are you visually tired? Doesn't exist! 
The maps are not only very different in style, but also have different monster ecology, dropped resources, and hidden adventures. Every time you change the map, it's a new adventure. 
[Ultimately refreshing combat experience—hanging up does not mean boring] 
Regardless of the placement, the battle scenes are not ambiguous at all! 
●Cool skills + realistic sense of strike 
●Explosive combos, full of special effects 
●Digital crit, screen blast 
When you adjust your lineup, you'll see tons of damage numbers popping up on the screen when you come back. Hanging up can also make people feel so happy that they take off! 
[The beam of light flashes wildly, and the equipment drops wildly - All European Emperors] 
Here, explosive equipment never depends on kneeling down and praying, it all depends on hanging up and strength. 
●Equipment beams fall like rain 
●Random affixes and various sets to create exclusive magical outfits 
●The moment you get the best equipment, the screen will shine for you 
The equipment is not tied to an account. You can use it yourself if you want. You can cash it out if you want to trade it. There is also a place for people who want to use it. 
【Relax without getting upset, feel refreshed without getting tired】 
●No physical limit, you can get benefits anytime you go online 
●You can still use it when you are offline, and you will not fall behind if you hang up for free. 
●The explosion rate is impressive, you can graduate even if you are a micro-player, and you can become a boss even if you are a free prostitute in "Burning Era" - it will not lie flat when placed, and it is awesome to hang up! 
Whether you are a fisherman who doesn’t have much time, or a strategy party who likes to study genres, you can find your treasure hunting paradise here. Join now and start your super exciting treasure-earning journey!
desc-78734:
Story summary - 
There is a girl who can access the memory of someone by looking into their eyes. 
There was a childhood sweetheart who regarded two scary dolls painted in red as her parents and lived a weird every day. 
There is a sickly sister who can manipulate people's hearts with just a smile. 
And our protagonist met these girls who seemed to have flaws, and was later involved in a series of strange events. 
It was like counting the memories of the distant past with his fingertips. All the events slowly eroded his heart. 
This is a bitter, yet nostalgic story of memory. ~Author's words~ 
It's been a long time since the demo version was released, and I'm very sorry for the delay in releasing the official version. 
This is the first time I have made a game in my life. Except for the illustrations, which were done by two people, the other parts were basically made independently by me. 
We're currently working hard to make games that are deep, free, and accessible to a lot of people. 
It would be a great honor for us if we could give you a try. 
I would like to express my sincere gratitude to Mr. ogapee, the creator of ONScripter, who has developed such an excellent game engine. 
Finally, I sincerely thank all players for downloading this game. 
We would be very happy if you could rate this game (in Google Market) with stars. Hobby Club Classic Chocolat:cutlass

On January 30, 2013, since I was unable to create a shell program that supported the GBK font, I installed a virtual machine (Japanese XP) on my computer and started to translate it in the form of Japanese Kanji (SHIFT-JIS encoding). 
In early February 2013, due to the limited number of Japanese Chinese characters, it became increasingly difficult to complete high-quality translation in the SHIFT-JIS environment. 
At the end of February 2013, the translation was suspended; at the same time, an email was sent to the developer, hoping that the other party could help improve support for GBK, but nothing happened. 
On May 16, 2013, while wandering around the Android forum, I came across a post about changing the ONS internal code to GBK, and then I found the author of the post - ioncanon on Sina Weibo. 
On May 30, 2013, ioncanon greatly rewrote the program for me (and I stayed up all night, so touched T_T), and the game finally fully supports GBK. On the same day, translation resumed. 
On May 31, 2013, ioncanon greatly integrated armeabi and armeabi-v7a into the APK. 
On August 1, 2013, the translation of the game script was halfway completed. 
On October 30, 2013, the game script has been translated. 
October 30, 2013, internal testing. 
On November 5, 2013, the photo editing was completed. 
On November 15, 2013, internal testing was completed. 
On November 30, 2013, proofreading and polishing were completed. 2. Regarding the translation of KOYOMI (こよみ): 
In the comics, the relevant Chinese team translated her as "Li", which is actually not wrong. 
But based on the content of Chapter 4 of the game, I think the translation of "li" into a single word is not very good. 
Because her name is related to the other one in word count, 
That person has a three-character name, 
She should also have a three-letter name. 
(As for who it is, I won’t spoil it here. You will understand it by the end of the game)
devnote-762269:
Hello everyone, we are the development team of "Burning Era". 
To be honest, the initial inspiration for this game was very simple: we are a group of deep "fishing parties", and we are also diehard fans of idle games and dark treasure-grabbing games. The idle RPGs on the market are either too frivolous or too futuristic. Brushing equipment is boring and the battles feel like playing house. So we decided to make a treasure farming game that is both fun and exciting. 
We want you to just hang it up in your spare time and see the damage numbers on the screen soar and the light beams flash across the field. We also hope that even if you only have fragmented time, you can still feel the fun of genre matching, the sense of accomplishment in developing equipment, and the heart-pounding thrill of swiping treasures to unlock light beams. 
Of course, in addition to idle browsing, we also packed in a lot of interesting content: 
There are so many mercenary schools that it is difficult to choose 
Equipment system with random affixes and suit combinations 
Map scenes with completely non-repetitive styles 
A bold fusion of magic + science fiction. We know that the game is not perfect yet, and there are still many areas worth polishing. But as long as there are players who are willing to find their own happiness in "Burning Era", whether it is to hang up and retire, or to go crazy and deep into the genre, we will continue to update and optimize, and will never fail. 
Finally, thank you to everyone who chose, supported, or even complained about "Burning Era". It's you who keep this little gaming world burning. 
——Sincerely, the development team of "Burning Era"
devnote-810754:
Here, you will never face the wind and snow alone. You will remember: when you are exhausted, the almost stranger at the foot of the cliff gently pushes the last supply in front of you. In the thundering hanging mountains, you exchanged silent glances, and you understood who had taken that step first. On the steepest section of the road to the top, what you step on is not a rock, but someone's steadily arched back. This is not a game. 
This is a distant embrace, achieved through cables, signals and trust.
desc-810754: In "Climb to the Summit Together", you will be on different fantasy mountains. The core of the game is climbing hand in hand with others: through real physical grasping, sharing ropes and tools, and supporting each other in desperate situations such as volcanoes and ice cliffs. When physical strength is exhausted, it is the helping hands of teammates that bring warmth. Every time we build a ladder for a stranger or share food, it is a warm encounter that transcends strangers. This is not only a challenge to reach the top, but also a journey that shines with companionship.
devnote-547975: Hello everyone, we are Hejie Light Year. This is the third game of our team. I hope you will like it.
desc-547975:
Welcome adventurers to "Super Dimension Evolution". This is a classic pixel-style dark treasure-grabbing game, a dark jihad steeped in decadent glory, a perpetual motion machine customized for brushes. Skeletons and monsters are just walking treasure chests, and reaching a full level is just a new beginning. The core teachings remain unchanged: blast, blast, blast again, blast again. The whole battle is automatic, and you can experience the authentic treasure farming by simply hanging up. 
--Multiple elements and genre combinations create unlimited possibilities for combat 
--Random equipment, random entries, equipment matching with different attributes and affixes, every battle is full of freshness 
--Ranger and mage professions are available for selection, and barbarians are being produced to create exclusive characters.
devnote-799886:
Hello everyone, I am Abin, the initiator of this project. I am addicted to games, especially immortal cultivation games. I have played almost all immortal cultivation categories on the market. As a result, I spent a lot of money, but I always feel that it is not what I imagined cultivating immortals to be like. 
Like many people, we have an idea: Since we can't find the kind of game we want, we might as well make one ourselves. 
I am a game industry worker myself, and I have been planning alone for a long time. Later, Taoist friends who like to cultivate immortals gradually started working part-time with me. 
We got rid of those "one-click sweeps" and "automatic hang-ups", and hid real surprises in the map's fog, caves and random events; 
We believe that cultivating immortality should not be a matter of trying to gain value, but a process of slowly accumulating, freely exploring, and getting to know people. 
This game is actually what we think "cultivating immortality" should be like: leisurely, interesting, full of unexpected surprises, and respectful of your time. 
We have been polishing it for more than a year. It may not be perfect, but it is sincere enough. 
If you are tired of the routine of "paying money to become stronger" and still want to believe that there should be romance, opportunity and fireworks in the world of immortality... you might as well give this game a try.
devnote-232480:
This game is a cultivating immortality game that we represent. As players, we have experienced the previous game and were very fascinated by it, so we have cooperated with the developer for version 2.0... We will implement some ideas that we think are relatively open and interesting in the game. I hope everyone can support and make suggestions! The road to cultivating immortality is long, and I am lucky enough to walk with you. 
——————————————————————— 
【Contact information】 
Public account: blingbling-game 
If you have any comments or suggestions, please feel free to click on the official account [blingbling-game]
desc-232480:
"Different Immortal Cultivation Sect 2" has been expanded and optimized based on the content of the first generation, and will be greatly improved in terms of openness and playability compared with the previous game. In addition, we have also improved the art performance, striving to give everyone a better immersive atmosphere of the Immortal Cultivation Sect! (The content of the preliminary plan is roughly as shown in the promotional picture. We will continue to develop and optimize the actual gameplay. If you have other ideas and suggestions for children's shoes, please leave us a message...) By then you will be able to experience: 
1. Taking charge of the sect - does it focus on productivity, cultivating spiritual roots and improving cultivation potential? Or should you focus on the current value of force and meditate to create unique skills? Or do you do nothing and concentrate on traveling? It all depends on your personal preference and adapt to the circumstances. 
2. Formulate a system - multiple training systems such as sword cultivation, weapon cultivation, alchemy cultivation, and talisman cultivation are waiting for you to choose. You, the leader of a sect, can formulate the training style of your disciples. 
3. Recruit disciples - Whether they are mortals or immortals, as long as the strength of the sect under your command has increased, they may come to become disciples... Every time the sect ascends the ladder to heaven, there will always be different seekers. Who is lucky enough to join the sect depends on your decision. 
4. Resist foreign enemies - Many sects outside the Immortal Mountain are eyeing you, because once you successfully defeat them, you will receive many rewards and inheritances... At this time, it is a great test to set up the mountain protection formation under your sect. How to know yourself and the enemy and decide on a good strategy depends on you, the leader of the sect! Of course, if you don’t want to just defend, you can also take the initiative to attack other sects... 
5. Personnel training - Facing dozens, hundreds or even thousands of disciples under your sect, after all, you have limited energy and it is difficult to train everyone step by step. It is not a simple matter how to properly transfer the skills or cleanse the marrow to help some potentials achieve their ascension as soon as possible. In addition, you can also set responsibilities and entrust important tasks to some disciples who you like. 
6. Sect Competition - In addition to self-cultivation, each sect competition can also give some disciples the opportunity to improve their realm. It will be up to you to decide how to set the rules and rewards of the competition so that they can grow faster. 
7. Hundreds of events - ranging from the survival of the entire sect to the love and hatred of each disciple. There are always many emergencies in the sect waiting for your decision every day, which will also affect the direction of the sect to a certain extent... 
8. Travel to all walks of life - In addition to sect matters, you can also go out for training alone or with some disciples. You can experience all kinds of interesting things in the world and secret realms of the fairy world. If you are lucky, you can also tame various strange beasts along the way.
devnote-770884:
In "Alien Explorer", you will open up your own world in the universe - "open up" in the true sense! 
With the ability to change the terrain, you can dig and shape the environment as you like, mine resources, build tools and vehicles, build a huge base, embark on a journey to explore the mysterious and beautiful alien galaxy, and gradually uncover its hidden secrets. 
Alien Explorers is a soothing and relaxing game that can be played alone or with friends. With this work, the System Era team hopes to evoke our shared awe of the unknown and respect for the natural wonders of the universe, and rekindle humanity’s pure joy of space exploration. 
Now, we’re excited to bring this journey to you in a brand new format. 
Please enjoy! 
Alien Explorers is a soothing and relaxing game that can be played alone or with friends. With this work, the System Era team hopes to evoke our shared awe of the unknown and respect for the natural wonders of the universe, and rekindle humanity’s pure joy of space exploration. 
Now, we’re excited to bring this journey to you in a brand new format. 
Please enjoy!
desc-770884:
"Alien Explorer" is a space-themed open world sandbox construction game. You will play an "Alien Explorer" and interact with the strange new world in a unique tactile way, shaping the environment as if it were clay in your own hands. Build a base, control resource management, automate production lines, and more while solving the mysteries of the universe alone or with friends. Please become an "alien explorer" that everyone respects 
"Alien Explorers" receive rigorous training to explore the frontiers of outer space for the benefit of all mankind. Creativity and ingenuity are the keys to their survival. Reshape the environment 
Alien Explorers are trained to use the Shape Gun, a powerful tool that can dig, collect, shape, build and color terrain to the user's will. Here, the entire universe is your sandbox canvas! Build a base with your own hands 
Build custom bases throughout the solar system to survive and thrive anywhere! "Alien Explorer" uses a modular system to quickly splice objects into place to create unique buildings. Automation systems, crafting stations, power plants, resource collectors, railway facilities, everything is built from scratch and can be customized according to the actual ecological conditions of the "planet". Learn to survive in a strange solar system 
This unknown galaxy consists of seven celestial bodies. Every celestial body can be fully explored from the surface to the center of the earth. To understand them, "alien explorers" must contend with their unique geographical environment and challenging biomes. Uncover the mystery of the universe 
These strange worlds are filled with mysterious structures and relics, and the "alien explorers" themselves will receive puzzling communications from unknown sources. Curious alien explorers may try to understand these phenomena and the secrets of the solar system. Alone or with friends 
Although the "Alien Explorers" each work independently, they are also helpful team players! Team up with other "Alien Explorers" and work together in 2-4 player online co-op mode. "Alien Explorers" has received special praise from 1.4 million people on Steam. In 2019, it won 5 awards including "Best Art Design", "Best Game Design" and "Best Adventure Game" at the Webby Awards, known as the "Internet Oscars". In addition, it also won the "Gamer Voice Award" at the South by Southwest Film Festival.
desc-799886:
"Cultivation as an Immortal in My Free Time" is an exploration game for cultivating immortals. Players play the role of a down-and-out monk who has lost all his spiritual energy and cultivation, and embarks on an adventure in order to find his past memories. [Travel freely and encounter three thousand adventures] 
You have traveled over 90,000 kilometers across the continent of cultivation, and there are more than 3,000 unknown opportunities scattered throughout it. Cultivation is no longer just about meditating, but a journey every time you stop. [Manage the cave and repair freely] 
When he was tired, he drank tea and farmed in the cave, overlooking the clouds and mist in the mountains. This place is far away from fights and disturbances and belongs to you alone. It is a place where you can rest peacefully after practicing. [Taoist couple practice together and spend eternal life together] 
On the road of spiritual practice, I met someone who had a similar connection. Become a Taoist couple and participate in the exercises together. Their breaths will blend and their minds will be in harmony. They can also travel together through the mountains and rivers, playing the piano and the sword in harmony. [Refining hundreds of treasures, matching them as you like] 
Collect the magic weapons scattered everywhere, match them freely, and trigger bonds. The battle does not rely on crushing numerical values, but relies on strategy to win. 【Choose your own path, my destiny is mine】 
There are thousands of paths you can dabble in: sword cultivation, alchemy cultivation, formation cultivation, talisman cultivation... or even creating your own one, it's all up to you.
desc-151502:
Set sail towards infinite possibilities - "The Age of Discovery: Origin" This is a story that took place in the 16th century - an era when mankind was still full of unknowns about the world. 
Now is the time to set sail! Sail into the open world and experience an unprecedented shocking experience! Koei Tecmo's genuine IP, based on "Age of Discovery 2", perfectly reproduces the independent plot lines of the five protagonists! Freely choose to become a trade tycoon, ocean overlord or legendary explorer - traverse 200+ historical ports in a 1:320 real-scale earth, discover 60+ primitive tribal civilizations, or lead a fleet to conquer 300+ different battle terrains! Popular admirals from past generations such as Catalina and John Farrell gathered across time and space to compose epic battles with hundreds of historical celebrities from the 15th to 17th centuries. Yoko Kanno's 104 original symphonies reproduce the magnificent movements of the Golden Age of Navigation. Unreal Engine 4 technology implements "delayed rendering" technology, supports dynamic effects of multiple light sources on the same screen, greatly enhances the reality of sea surface light and shadow and weather changes, and immerses you in every moment of geographical discovery! Your choice will rewrite history - dominate the Mediterranean route or explore a lost continent? Now, take the helm of your own sailing legend!
devnote-837030:
Dear Lords: I am the producer of "New Three Kingdoms: Rise of Glory". On behalf of the development team, I would like to thank you for your attention to the game and welcome you to participate in this test. "New Three Kingdoms: Resurrection of Glory" is a geo-strategic SLG with the theme of Three Kingdoms. This game has the following innovative designs: 
——Team aspect: The number of troops is determined by the team level, so there is no cost to change generals; each team has an independent reserve pool, so that each team has real combat capabilities; combined with general camp, unit cycle restraint, general bonus, formation, and formation stones to form a rich matching strategy ;——In terms of generals: the generals with the same name have been cancelled, and stars can be upgraded with one click to reduce the burden of general management; blue and purple generals can be upgraded to orange quality; treasures are obtained directly from the recruitment pool and are no longer separated from generals; new tactics, mounts, and equipment are added to enrich the season development of generals. ——Combat: The game battle is adjusted to a turn-based system. A large round includes 3 general attack rounds and a treasure round; treasures are the skills of generals. General skills are divided into command, passive, active and pursuit, each with their own strengths; adjust the positions of generals through formations to change the counter-position relationship;. ——Maps: A 4 million grid super sand table map, each territory can be freely transformed into its type; you can also change 4 adjacent grids into military camps to increase production; and you can manage the territory like a jigsaw puzzle and freely adjust the placement; you can also transform the landscape to gain technical bonuses, and you can also decorate the territory; "pathways" are still the core expansion mechanism of the game. ——Acquisition of military commanders: A large number of recruitment orders and military commanders are given away in the game, which reduces the price of recruitment and ensures that the first 300 recruitments of the basic military commander card pool will not contain duplicate orange military commanders or treasures. This is the game's first appearance, so there are bound to be many immature aspects in terms of rhythm and experience, so please bear with me. We regard this test as an open "product co-creation meeting", and you are the most valuable "chief experience officer" in this co-creation. We sincerely look forward to your most honest opinions and suggestions. We will listen carefully and record every piece of feedback you have. I hope that with your help and witness, we will continue to polish and iterate our products and go all the way. Thank you again for participating in this test and I wish you a happy game. "New Three Kingdoms: Rise of Glory" production team
devnote-151502:
The official QQ group of "Age of Discovery: Origin" has been officially opened! 
Whether you want to chat with other admirals about route strategies and share sailing experiences, or you want to get the latest game news and test updates as soon as possible, you can find it here~ 
In the future, we will also arrange small interactive activities and exclusive benefits in the group from time to time. Admirals are welcome to join!
devnote-767302:
**"Dream Shape" will be officially launched on Steam on September 11th. Everyone is welcome to add to your wish list! ** 
Hello, Chinese gamer friends! We are Lizard Smoothie, a Korean independent game development team composed of two college students. We came together because of our love for MOBA and independent games, hoping to use our own way to create a game experience that feels fresh and interesting. "Dream Shape" is our first attempt to combine the MOBA operation sense with the Roguelike adventure gameplay. It is also a journey that we cherish very much. Although the team is small, we put all our passion and efforts into it. Thank you for your willingness to pay attention to our game. I sincerely hope that you can experience happiness in the world of "Dream Shape". If you have any ideas or suggestions, please feel free to share them with us!
desc-837030: "New Three Kingdoms: Resurrection of Glory" is a mobile game with strategy as its core, focusing on "wisdom and decisive victory". Through free land management and transformation and a cost-free general replacement system, the game reduces the operational burden and focuses on tactical games. It emphasizes fair competition, where skill combination and restraint determine the outcome of the battle, and is supplemented by the generous starting benefit of “three hundred draws without repetition.” On the grand sand table with millions of tiles, players can lay out personalized territories and experience the dynamic Three Kingdoms conquest. The key to its success lies in whether it can permanently integrate the concept of "not selling values" with in-depth strategic gameplay to truly realize "your Three Kingdoms, written by you."
desc-756756:
Use heaven and earth as a chess game and play a big game of chess! "Yaoyao Chess" is a Chinese-style monster-themed auto-chess game that integrates and innovates pure Chinese monster aesthetics with "big battlefield" free formation strategies. Eight players will mobilize diverse forces such as the Demon Realm, Dragon Palace, Immortal Court, and Youdu to control nearly a thousand units of chess pieces to start a battle between demons and ghosts on the unbounded battlefield! The Qitan Discussion is now open, and we welcome all of you to compete! [Battle of demons and ghosts, play something new] 
Not a Western-style fantasy, but a pure Chinese-style auto chess! Listen, the gongs and drums are beating, and the Nuo-faced boys are marching in worship; look, the lights are dimming, and the ten-tailed fox demon boy shoulders the hope of the entire Tushan clan. This work is rich in allusions from the Three Realms and the oriental legends. Now the Chinese scroll is spread out in front of you - Sir, why don't you take a journey through this Chinese legend of monsters and ghosts? [Heaven and Earth chess game, the lower end is bigger] 
Crush the traditional chess board and play a big game of chess! Operate freely on the unbounded battlefield, get rid of the shackles of the chessboard, and there is no fixed pattern in battles and vertical and horizontal movements; the moves are like forming formations, and all kinds of tricks are manifested with the grand battle situation of monsters and ghosts. How to use the unique mechanism of the school stands proudly and waits for your strategy. [The Phantom God helps out, let’s have some fun] 
Start with "god teammates"! The original phantom god system aids the battle, and hundreds of Chinese phantom gods can be summoned by you: Ten-tailed fox demons, Nuo gods, black and white impermanence... All phantom gods are born out of Chinese ghost allusions, and each has magical powers that can resonate with the various schools preparing for war. Various strategies such as formation and change of formations are all based on the magical use of this magical power. [Infinite chess pieces, explode on time] 
The chess pieces have grown from a single soldier to an army of thousands, and the output has changed from scraping to full-screen bombing! War cries and farewells, electricity meters activated, hexagrams turned to search for traces - despite the ever-changing situation, they still adhere to the principle of chess and follow the heart, and the power is determined by the king. They are comfortable and relaxed, and the gameplay is diverse. In the discussion of heaven and earth, there is no other word, but the word "free".
desc-789669: The "Horizon" series MMO RPG mobile game "Steel Frontier" jointly developed by Korean developer NCSoft and Sony has been released. This game will be launched on PC and mobile platforms. Players take on the role of a machine hunter, teaming up with other players to kill machines and competing with rival tribes in an area called the Deadlands (inspired by Arizona/New Mexico).
desc-767302:
"Shape of Dreams" is an action Roguelike game that combines MOBA style. Embark on an adventure in the dream world, edit the memory of the hero, and create your own unique character. Challenge the depths of the dream alone, or fight side by side with up to three friends to face unknown trials together. 【Unique dream incarnation】 
Create a unique character through the "Memory Editing" system. Attach mysterious gems and essences to your memories, giving them special effects and stimulating synergy. Melee attack and extremely powerful long-range output? Self-destruction mage? Everything is possible! [Diverse heroes, diverse gameplay] 
Various character types such as remote output, strikers, tanks, mages, etc. are waiting for you to choose. Confident in extreme control? Try Mist, the fast and agile melee character! Support the battlefield for teammates? How about Vesper, a solid and powerful tank character? With the help of rich interactive systems such as treatment, buffs, group control, etc., enjoy the smooth battle brought by collaboration! 【An adventure that everyone can enjoy】 
A variety of difficulty options and a permanent upgrade system allow every player to gradually improve and enjoy the game. For players who like challenges, we have also prepared ruthless trials such as lucid dreams and powerful hidden bosses that directly subvert the rules of rapids. Overcome challenges and prove yourself! [Uncovering the secrets of rapids] 
The dream world is always changing. In a procedurally generated world, dream dwellers, quests, events and hidden secrets await your exploration. The various secrets that exist in the world will provide new experiences in every game. Along the way, unlock over 200 collection elements. But be careful, hunters are always watching you.
devnote-775523: This game is a story-based interactive interpretation game produced by "Soffis MBM", and the UP owner "copiklaGrogu" is authorized to Chineseize it.

Oops, I’ve finally come to you! Welcome to Dream Island! 
Thirsty or not? Are you hungry? Was the journey smooth? (Passing drinks) Regarding Floating Dream Island, we want to create a carefree world where you can lie down in a daze and full of imagination. It is like an ideal free summer vacation, with no cram schools and homework, only sunny days, starry skies and playmates. Here, you can use your superpowers to build a unique and wonderful island with residents with different personalities, plant and fish on the island, collect animals, make friends, hold parties, build islands with different themes, and build your own home as you like. You can also travel on the island to explore more magical mysteries of the superpower country... It doesn't matter where you go. The scenery you have seen and the memories along the way are the meaning of travel! Just like life, you have experienced it before.

devnote-423237:
Hello everyone, I am AliveGameStudio, and I am currently developing a Cthulhu-based dark magic survivor-like meat pigeon - "Curse Link". 
The gameplay of this game is inspired by the game "Noita". I want to create a gameplay with the core mechanism of linking items to each other to form a chain reaction. 
Using this linking method, the effect combination between props can be more free and have more depth. 
You can combine props to create different skill effects according to your understanding, forming your unique style to clear out massive monsters and gain a refreshing harvesting experience. 
The final effect that may be achieved is often unexpected even by me, a developer. 
After participating in our internal beta test on STEAM, some friends will also compare "Curse" with "Magic Craft" and "Backpack Hero", because "Curse" also has prop effect links, and you need to adjust your matching method in the backpack. I want to use an existing and popular game as an example, which may make it easier for new friends who don't know this game to understand "Curse". 
Currently, "Curse Link" is still in the development process. We will start internal testing according to the development progress. Friends who are interested in us can come to STEAM to apply for internal testing and experience it in advance. We also look forward to everyone providing us with feedback so that we can make "Curse" better and better. 
Finally, we hope that friends who see it here can give us a reservation or add it to their wishlist on STEAM. Your encouragement is our biggest motivation to move forward! 
Thank you all!
desc-719198: Hello new administrator, welcome to "Floating Dream Island"! Here, you can experience the fun of island life at your own pace, plant super crops, fish in the sea of ​​clouds, collect pigment ores, capture magical animals, transform the terrain and lay roads, place buildings and furniture... Or you can do nothing and buy a sunny day from the weather company to brighten your day. Life is adventure. From the sea to the sky, take a flight around the world - ice caves, starry skies, deserts... Encounter fantasy countries with different appearances, and the scenery is outside the window. When you feel lonely, go meet your neighbors! They have very different personalities, but the same thing is that they are happy to be friends with you. Try to like their circle of friends, or initiate a topic, and start a funny and healing daily life while playing around. Of course, you can also meet more new partners on the journey! desc-800521: Write the epic of your civilization with your invisible hand! "Hayek's Civilization: Market Economy" is an in-depth strategy game that combines economic simulation and civilization construction. Inspired by the free market philosophy of famous economist Friedrich Hayek, where the invisible hand will guide your country to prosperity! 📜 [Epic Era Crossing] Starting from the Stone Age, where people drank blood, it went through the Bronze Age, the Classical Age, the Feudal Age, the Age of Exploration, the Age of Enlightenment, until the roar of the Industrial Revolution and the dawn of the Information Age. Each era has unique technology trees, building systems, and social challenges waiting for you to conquer. ⚖️【Real Market Economy】 Say goodbye to the simple resource accumulation of traditional strategy games! There are complex and real supply and demand mechanisms, dynamic price fluctuations, and industry chain linkages. Grain, timber, copper mines, spices, coffee, steel... more than 20 kinds of resources are interrelated, and every fluctuation in the market may determine the rise or fall of the country. 👥【Multiple Social Classes】Yeoman farmers, woodcutters, miners, craftsmen, merchants, scholars, clergy, knights, capitalists... 16 social classes each have their own demands. Meet their needs and gain stability and prosperity; ignore public opinion and face strikes, rebellions and even the collapse of your empire! 🏛️【Rich Building System】More than 60 types of buildings with different functions, from simple huts to magnificent factories, from farmhouses in the fields to bustling trading ports. Each building can be upgraded to form a complete industrial chain to maximize the efficiency of resource circulation! 🔬【Technology leads the future】More than 80 technologies are waiting for research and development. From barter to financial capitalism, from ground stone axes to steam power - every technological breakthrough will bring about a qualitative leap for your civilization. 🌍【International Conference】Start a diplomatic game with more than 20 AI countries such as the Steppe Khanate, Desert Caravan, Silk Empire, and Archipelago Sea Power. Trade exchanges, peace negotiations, military confrontations... everything can be done in a single thought to achieve hegemony or protect peace. ⚔️ 【Military and Diplomacy】 Form an army to defend the territory and train from slingers in the Stone Age to elite infantry in the industrial age. Participate in wars, sign peace treaties, and collect reparations - protect everything you have worked hard on in the shadow of swords. 🎭 [Random Events] Harvest and famine, plague and prosperity, natural disasters and man-made disasters... Dozens of random events make every game full of variables. Every choice has a cost, and every decision has far-reaching consequences.
desc-423237:

The developer of "Plague Inc." is a new masterpiece popular with over 190 million players. "Plague Inc." has been praised by 120,000 people and has received a version number. The Chinese mobile version & TapPC version will be launched soon! First launch exclusive limited time offer! Decades after the natural disaster raged, the survivors reappeared. Can you lead the survivors to rebuild civilization from scratch? Repeat the same mistakes or open a new path? Every decision will affect the fate of mankind! 🌍【Rebuilding civilization on the wasteland】 
The world is no longer what we remember. Green forests, abandoned cities, hidden mutants... Explore the post-apocalyptic world, scavenge and collect scarce resources, but remember - crisis is always lurking around the next corner. 🛠️【Explore the wasteland, scavenge and manage】 
Recycle materials from abandoned cities and build houses, farms, and lumberyards from scratch to give survivors a home. Expand territory, research ancient technologies, and turn ruins into prosperous strongholds step by step. ⚙️【Hard choices shape society】 
This is not a simple survival game. Every decision affects the direction of society: Should we prioritize teaching children survival skills or protecting culture and knowledge? Are animals pets or food? Democracy brings freedom, and management ensures efficiency? Your choices will shape a unique society. 🧠【Your choice determines the outcome】 
The game has a built-in dynamic event system driven by millions of decision-making combinations. Ten unique leaders with different abilities lead people through the darkness, unlock new strategies, and open up a new path for mankind. 🎮 [Single-player friendly, buy out and play] 
No connection required, just buy it and play freely. Expanded content will be continuously updated in the future. It's time to prove that even if the end comes, mankind can still rebuild hope.
devnote-761144: Don't be afraid of the end, settle down first. After the disaster, the company's China branch has opened recruitment!
