devnote-835959:
We have completely integrated the most romantic "sword-making" aspect in martial arts into the game. 
Forging a sword first forges the heart, and the same goes for playing games. me 
We have done a complete closed loop of sword making, from material selection, forging, engraving, to cutting, every step is in your hands. Complete 
After all, a truly famous sword is never the product of an assembly line. It is the hard work and heart of the swordsmith. We have left enough space for you with thousands of runes and thousands of combinations. Whether it is a simple sword that can defeat all magic with one move, or an infinite sword system with full sword moves, as long as the sword you forge is a famous sword that is unique in the world, it will be handed down from generation to generation. 
The version is still being polished, just like a famous sword is still being forged, and there will inevitably be flaws and shortcomings. 
But we believe that it will all be worth it when you create a perfect combo with your personally choreographed sword moves, and when you forge the named sword with the final word. 
The rivers and lakes are far away, so I am glad to meet you all. 
Hold the hammer, 
Forged sword, 
Kai Feng. 
We are in the arena, waiting for your famous sword to come out.
desc-835959:
This is a vertical screen placement action mobile game, where you can control thousands of swords with one hand. 
You will become a swordsmith, forging the sword, molding its bones, and engraving its soul. One box contains ten swords, and one decision can determine the outcome. 
The core of the game is a complete closed-loop sword-making process, with an original skill slot mechanism of "sequential settlement from left to right". Each move can be cast according to your wishes. You can freely combine massive runes, thousands of combinations, and unlimited styles. Whether it is the torrent of sword energy that shocks everyone with the rebound of the horizontal sword, or the ultimate explosion that instantly retreats hundreds of feet and floats in the air, it is all created by you! 
Every smooth mid-air combo comes from an understanding of the moves. The order of sword moves is your law. 
[Forged by craftsman and forged by hand, the most famous sword] 
Using iron as the bone and fire as the medium, he forged a world-famous sword that is unique in the world. A complete closed loop of sword making, from material selection to strike, the entire process is under your control. Your natal sword is only defined by you. 
[Engraving and customizing exclusive sword moves] 
The left slot determines the rules, the right seal evolves, the original sequential settlement skill slot mechanism, sprint, retreat, shuttle, link, stay in the air, knock back, block, every move is arranged by you. One more move means chaos; one less move means loss. A true swordsmith knows how to give up and balance. 
[Zongheng·Carrying a sword to conquer the world trial] 
Take the lead to march, take risks to advance, and go through the trials of the world. Fight with one hand vertically, take advantage of every move, bounce and block, and feel the thrill of mowing the grass. Every battle is a hearty battle! 
[No boundaries, create thousands of genres as you wish] 
Unrestricted styles, unlimited templates, thousands of runes can be freely matched to create a unique genre. Is it the simplest way to defeat all methods with one move? Or do I want them all, the shield's violent wind and breathless slash under the control of the infinite sword? It’s all up to you! 
[Accompanying・Sword Spirit carries his sword into the secret realm] 
Hold the soul in the sword, go to the grave in danger, and break through thousands of secret realms. The sword is cold, but the soul has warmth. Develop your own sword spirit and travel with you throughout the world to forge famous swords. Please, gentlemen, 
Melting all laws in the furnace, 
Forge a legendary sword that is unique in the world!
desc-343834:
In the cold and dark depths of the universe, nine dragon corpses pulled an ancient bronze coffin and came to the stars. 
Where is the end of the ancient road in the starry sky? Are there really immortal immortals in the world? The vast world of Xianxia is about to unfold before us. 
Climb the road to heaven, sing songs and cover the sky with a snap of your fingers! "Zhetian World" is a Chinese-style immortal cultivation mobile game adapted from the officially authorized novel "Zhetian" written by Chen Dong. The game is loyal to the world view of the original work and highly restores the classic plot. Starting from the end of the universe when nine dragons pulled coffins and stepped onto the stars, the legendary "immortals" in the long-ago era gradually unveiled their mysteries... As a mortal with a holy body, how can he strive to conquer the holy realm all the way? The vast world of Xianxia is about to unfold on your fingertip screen. [Exploring the Eastern Wasteland - Free exploration of Tianyuan Adventure] 
The vast Eastern Wasteland, a free map, refuses to be restrained! There are also wealth, lovers, Dharma, land, and all kinds of adventures, helping fellow Taoists to travel around the world and enjoy the ultimate visual feast! [The battle for the emperor's path - the magic weapon helps the ascension] 
Conquering the south and conquering the north will lead to the path to immortality. One emperor’s achievements will lead to thousands of bones being withered! Thousands of strange weapons and treasures are waiting for you to conquer, with divine patterns and sacrificial weapons, and Taoist scriptures to assist you. Fight against the demons and the holy body! Different paths lead to the same goal, the IP is restored to the extreme, and the emperor's light shines for eternity! [Aiming for the Holy City—Battle between Immortal Sects, Strength Is Respected] 
You are not alone on the road to immortality, the immortals are here to help! If you want to gallop through the ancient times, organization is essential. Dominate the Eastern Wasteland and take control of the Holy Land; fight against ancient creatures, protect all living beings, eliminate evil and promote good, and aspire to the Holy City! [The founding of the sect—experience in the deserted tower, asking questions and cultivating immortality] 
Three thousand worlds with bright stars! Under the guidance and teachings of the ruthless emperor, fellow Taoists will recruit friends and allies one after another to form sects. You started from the humble beginning, grew up from the flowery branches, climbed up the deserted tower, stepped onto the heavenly steps, and accumulated a lot of experience. Will you be the brightest star in the ancient times? Let’s wait and see!
devnote-343834:
Hello fellow Taoists, after many years of preparation, "The World that Covers the Sky" has finally opened for pre-order this midsummer. 
As the first adapted game with the genuine IP license of "Zha Tian", we are proud but also anxious. After all, "Shading the Sky" is already a phenomenal IP in the world of immortality, with a huge fan base. Too many people have spent their youth following the stories written by Teacher Chen Dong, so we understand the weight of the burden on our shoulders and the expectations of thousands of like-minded people. To create such an emotional IP, we must first ensure that the main body of the game completely follows the world view of the original work. 
Under the majestic structure, we have boldly built a world that can be explored and grown at will. From the moment the Taoist friends touch the screen to start the game, our purpose has been clear that "every step is to relive the original work." We have worked hard to restore most of the scenes and characters in the IP. The interstellar shock of the Nine Dragons pulling the coffin, the sudden awakening of the Holy Body's fate, the countless sufferings and disputes encountered by the strange people on the way...the crazy old lunatic, the mysterious and powerful Wu Shi Emperor, the ruthless Emperor who is suspected of not being dead, etc... After many difficulties and dangers, he finally became a worldly immortal... The scenes in the book that you once shocked will appear before your eyes, and the immortals in the book that you once sympathized with will be by your side. In the book, the dream of the male protagonist is no longer a misty and distant dream. Secondly, in order to ensure the overall high quality of the game, we have made some innovations in the core gameplay and added a diverse slg system to the traditional cultivation of immortality. The effect presented after the fusion will be more in line with the Xianxia game's style of taking sect forces as the unit, solving the shortcomings of the traditional cultivation of immortals and unlimited painting. In addition to the combat training sessions, of course the most popular free world is also indispensable. You can freely explore the plot branches or dungeons. 
In order to match such diverse gameplay, we have also set the tone of "ultimate oriental aesthetics" in terms of art expression. The AI ​​research laboratory collaborated with the art team to explore the possibilities of AI creation. Whether it's static renderings or combat animations, the visual effects can meet expectations. As a result of our original intention, what we want to bring you is a "different kind of cultivating immortality", and we hope that everyone can have a worthwhile gaming experience. 
Please leave a message, regardless of praise or criticism. We will take every comment from every Taoist friend seriously. 
Before the game is launched, your expectations and supervision will help us present a more perfect "Zhetian World" to everyone~ 
Click to make an appointment and enjoy cultivating yourself~ We will try to meet you as soon as possible!
desc-747818: Back to School is a super interesting open world school game. <The game has no in-app purchases, no ads, and absolutely no money. >The school in the game is an open world that you can freely explore. All scene buildings are seamlessly loaded. You can go where you want to go and get what you want. There are many interesting ways to play in the game, such as realizing the daze fantasy during class, stopping time, teleporting, etc., and of course there is also the function of blowing up the school and destroying all the school buildings that every reader has imagined. There are also replicas of games on your mobile phone that you like to play during class. In short, this unique way of playing will bring you a unique experience. The game is made with Unreal Engine 5 and uses many next-generation technologies. For example, Nanite can make the model have movie-level high precision. Lumen can provide light and shadow comparable to the natural environment to make the day and night cycle in the game real and delicate. In addition, the game is first-person, which allows players to better experience the game immersively.

desc-795883:
The search, attack and withdrawal must be fast, the operation must be stable, and the SAN value must be low! 
Search for divine objects in the abyss, and resist madness in the exhibition hall! Don’t Starve Cthulhu: Search, fight and retreat + manage a fun game! 
Use a rusty ax to chop off the deformed tentacles, touch the severed horns of old gods, and slime slates; go back to the museum to wipe the relics and put them in display cabinets, and earn tickets by relying on tourists' "Wow, so evil" to prevent the exhibits from "escaping" in the middle of the night - carry the abyss with your left hand, and run the business with your right hand. Your exhibition hall is the last line of defense for the seal!
devnote-795883:
To be honest, when making this "crazy and miserable" game, our team was almost "burning out the CPU" along with the owner of the game - but the more we made it, the more we got into it, because this is what we wanted to do, and it was a work that didn't cater to conventions. ​ 
From the beginning, some people said: "Having evil gods and museums, the gameplay is too complicated, isn't it?" "Will the setting of mental pollution dissuade players?" But we wanted to try: Can we make a game that has the excitement of exploration, the pyrotechnics of management, and allows players to feel the weight of the story? ​ 
In order to balance the "weirdness" and "not heavy-handed", we changed the design of the exhibits countless times - it should make people feel "Wow, so weird", but also not make people uncomfortable. In the end, we even set the "three no's principle" for the art team: no bloody scenes, no scary jump scares, and no physical discomfort. The madness value system has been revised to version 8, from the initial "hard drop in value" to the current "progressive impact" (for example, when the madness value is high, hallucinatory barrages will appear, and the operation will shift slightly), it is to let you experience the reality of "being on the verge of madness but still holding on". ​ 
We dare not say that this is a perfect game, and we even know that it may have many imperfections: for example, random events in the ruins may make your mentality explode, and the strategy of exhibit placement needs to be explored slowly. But we can guarantee that every gameplay and every plot is the result of our careful polishing - there is no forced money, no routine tasks, just a pure game that wants you to experience "the owner-style persistence". ​ 
If you are tired of the same old skin-changing games and are willing to give this "a little crazy, a little miserable but very sincere" work a chance, we are waiting for you in the museum to "keep on living" together!
devnote-312927:
Why do we like Republican martial arts movies such as "Fearless", "Ip Man" and "Fist of Fury" so much? I think this stems from the spirit and spirit that flow in our blood and belong exclusively to the Chinese nation. 
In that era when foreign powers invaded, tigers and leopards looked around, and wars broke out, 
There is such a group of people who yearn for powerful power, not to bully others, but to protect their home and country. 
With such a group of people, we yearn for unparalleled courage, not for the sake of daring, but for the purpose of punishing evil and promoting good. 
With such a group of people, we yearn for a firm will, not to have our own way, but to keep integrity and uprightness. 
So, facing strong ships and cannons, guns, fire and grenades, they still waved their fists with their flesh and blood. 
In that dark age, with one punch, it was like the sun was rising! "Martial Arts" is a story about traditional martial arts facing the challenge of guns and artillery. It is also a story about warriors looking for a way out in the middle of the times. 
We have constructed such a normal time and space, allowing those familiar martial arts of the Republic of China to compete on the same stage in the name of martial artists.

desc-338566:
"Honor of Kings: Star Break" is newly developed by Tencent Tianmei Studio Group. It is the first hero action mobile game of the "Honor of Kings" IP. The King of Heroes parachuted into the Star Soul Battlefield and fought to the final moment in a space where the safety range was shrinking! A new large map battlefield, Chang'an, Jixia, Great Wall and other areas of the King's Continent are available for you to explore freely. desc-392133:
This is a beta version of an independent game with WW2 as the story background. It took about 4 weeks to complete the 1.0 version test. 
Initially, it was in response to the initiative of "No Sugar Added" sister, the richest man in Shanghai and a well-known game producer, "Refuse to mess around, focus on playing solo, and the first place will get a 50 yuan bonus." Well, the bonuses are not really important. The main thing is that I want to play solo. This year has been a bit chaotic. I am getting lazier and lazier. I haven’t released any new works, so I worked hard for 4 weeks to make this test work. There are actually many similar games like WW2. I have always wanted to create large-scale 64V64 and 128V128 battle simulations. Unfortunately, due to the limitations of mobile hardware, I have not been able to solve the core technical solution. Currently, 50v50 is the limit of my own Huawei test machine, so I have to wait for the technology to mature. After talking a lot, let’s get down to business and talk about the content of the game: 
The gameplay is still classic capture the flag. 
Players can choose to play as the red team or the blue team, capture the stronghold and fortress through defense, and consume the opponent's team's strength. The team with the highest score in the end wins. 
Each stronghold flag can contribute 100 points to the team, and losing a stronghold will deduct 100 points, so offense and defense are both important. Ground vehicles: M4 Sherman tank, Type 89 tank 
AI vehicles that provide fire support in the air: P40 fighter, Zero fighter 
Infantry weapons mainly include large bolts, such as Springfield, 38 Dagai, Mo Xing Nagant, Mauser, etc. . . 
Various aircraft, tanks, personnel carriers, artillery, machine guns and other vehicles and equipment will be added in the future. 
This game is currently in a beta version. Although it is not very complete now, it will continue to be updated and improved like my other Modern Warfare game that is under testing for a long time.
devnote-392133: I hope my game can bring you a little happiness. I'm sorry if I can't, but I will continue to work hard!
desc-833117: "Survival and Injustice" is a realistic urban survival simulation RPG that starts an immersive urban adventure from the perspective of a low-level worker. You start from a youth hostel, start as a sorter, and a delivery person. You work hard under the pressure of survival such as fullness, health, and social status, and unlock diversified jobs and contacts in the market. The game revolves around the dusty 7.29 construction site accident. You will come into contact with clues to the incident in your daily work, get to know various market characters, and collect key information. All mysteries and hidden secrets need to be explored by you personally. In the process of survival and pursuit, you can uncover the secrets hidden in the corners of the city and experience a real and suspenseful life.
devnote-833117:
Have you ever wondered why someone would pay a hundred times the difference for a good night’s sleep? When we stand in front of the neon-lit revolving door of a hotel, the choice is never just the softness or hardness of the bed - it is a silent declaration of social identity and a secret desire to be treated gently by the world. 
In the game, we have built a breathing ecosystem: when the player drags his tired body and stands in the neon rain curtain, the musty smell of the shabby youth hostel and the fragrance of the five-star lobby form a crossroads of fate. Every time a card is swiped to check in, the invisible balance of social status is rewritten. Those seemingly extravagant purchases are actually the password to open invitations to dignitary dinners and the key to unlocking black market trading channels. 
As for the philosophy of food selection, we have buried more delicate human touch points: in the steam rising from the street corner stalls, there is hidden wisdom for survival that transcends satiety. When you continuously select the same type of beef noodles, you will see the character's eyes gradually dimming, and the animation of the chopsticks turning the noodles becoming more and more sluggish. This is not a simple numerical attenuation, but through audio-visual language such as the sound effects of tableware collisions becoming duller and the food color saturation decreasing, allowing players to truly sympathize with the psychological fatigue of "eating tasteless".
desc-779214: Simulate the search, defeat and withdrawal of everything! You can use it as a mouse, you can attack fiercely, you can block bridges, you can even cheat! There are 14 people in a 5-minute round. Take the lead and pack a gun into the park. There is a key room and a gate for extraction, as well as soldiers and bosses! devnote-734885:
10,000 reservations reached! "Thank you letter from developers' tears" Good morning/noon/evening, fellow guardians: 
When the programmer used his hairline to assure the planning team for the 10,086th time that Crocodile Brother would not cross eight pieces of farmland in one step, we suddenly discovered—— 
Reservations exceeded 10,000! ! ! (The boss ordered everyone on the spot a glass of fresh XX water with all sugar and ice removed. It was delicious~) Tears burst out. 
It is your support and encouragement that makes the bonfire in the town burn brighter and brighter, makes the art girl change the legendary "last billion version" red panda in tears, and makes the programmer David not leave in vain in the morning (?) It is time to fulfill our promise! (Of course, there is also the boss’s promise to return the perfect attendance award to me/smile.jpg) 
Guardians who are reading now please go to the forum and leave your feedback or thoughts for a chance to win three postcards~ Finally, thank you all again for your support, and I hope we can meet these warm partners in this ice and snow as soon as possible~ 
(Oops~Clicking the reservation button is as addictive as playing with a red panda~/Crazy hint.jpg) (showing off the honey XX city) little transparent ✧⁺⸜(●˙▾˙●)⸝⁺✧ Sincerely————I am the dividing line————I always thought that everyone else was in the meeting except me, until I entered the studio... 
Later, I was drawn into the gossip cricket boss group in the studio. I thought I finally had a foothold in this office... 
Until I was pulled into the "Bingdongdong Town" project group again, and after looking at the group announcement, the sky fell, how could it be two months ago? ! Before I could feel sad that I was still a handyman and a transparent planner after all, the boss said that this group would now collect everyone’s ideas about the game and brainstorm. I believe everyone has a lot of good ideas. Some kind of colorless pungent gas! I obviously just found out (of course I didn’t press Enter when saying this) that the boss waved his hand and said we were going to make a doomsday-themed game! 
He said this doomsday is very simple, no zombies, it’s too cliche! No aliens, nothing new! Don’t run out of resources. How can players draw cards without resources... Well, no... In short, we are making ice and snow themes, making blizzards! 
The boss also said that other apocalypse games are too hard-core, so what we want to do is to do something different. We make cute and healing animals, and create a small town for the animals. They survive, build, and reproduce in the town. Now everyone is on 996, working in the company during the day and working in the game at night. We have to do something different to make it easier for everyone. 
The boss was so speechless that he took the time to take a sip of honey and felt inspired again. gourmet food? right! gourmet food! So a part in which little animals run a gourmet restaurant was added to the game framework. 
The boss said that the town is already there and the restaurant is there, but it still lacks residents. Let me write dozens of animal inhabitants into it. The residents are struggling to survive, and civilization needs to continue, so we add another little animal to get married and give birth to little animals. 
The boss also said that free games must have day and night alternation, so the day and night alternation gameplay was added to the framework. 
The boss also said that a multi-language system will be added so that players all over the world can be healed by warmth. 
The boss said... 
… 
… 
He finished the meeting alone... 
Enough, I say enough, the point is, will players like it? 
Hiss...you'll like...right? In short, in his soliloquy, this game framework of healing + ice survival + construction and management + multi-language was born. 
Originally, that's all I wanted to tell you (mainly to let everyone know the true face of the boss, so that if the game is not fun, I can blame him), but after I finished writing this, I realized that the boss was standing behind me while drinking honey and peeking at the screen... 
He thought I wrote him too much like the boss Jingzhi in the Little 
But it is impossible to rewrite, and Quanqin will not come back even if he rewrites it:) In short, I would like to say a final sincere message to all the guardians: Thank you very much for taking the time to watch me complain about the boss, and please also use your little hands to make an appointment (kowtow). Your support is our biggest motivation to build the town! 
(The boss said that if the reservation exceeds 10,000, he will hold a small lottery and return perfect attendance to me. Please, just treat it like chicken feeding, cluck, cluck, cluck, QVQ)
desc-734885:
"Icy Winter Town" is an ice and snow apocalyptic survival game that perfectly combines animal food management and town construction. In this eternal winter world of ice and snow, you will transform into a brave and optimistic red panda. As a survivor of the winter town, you will light the furnace to dispel the cold and fight against the extreme cold. You will develop fields and farms here to withstand the long cold winter and sudden snowstorms. 
In a small town, you can use your whims and unlimited creativity to make the town a warm home. You will carefully manage the only gourmet restaurant in the town. In the cold eternal winter, only hot food can heal the hearts of the small animal survivors. 
Here, you will also meet small animal friends from different families with different personalities. You will unite to resist the wind and snow, survive in the extreme cold, and build the town into a haven full of hope and warmth. 
Let us create a warm and healing world together in this ice and snow! 【World view】 
The story takes place in the Shining Forest. With the fall of the Shining Star, the century-long summer of the Shining Forest suddenly turned into an eternal winter. Ten years have passed, and the ice and snow have still not melted. Many animal towns have been buried by ice. More and more small animals have been displaced and have to leave their homes to find new shelters. The surviving red panda and his younger brother Dongdong are also trapped on this endless ice field. 
As night fell, younger brother Dongdong had a high fever, and the red panda also fainted from exhaustion. Just when their consciousness was blurred, they seemed to see a faint light flickering in the distance. With the last of their strength, they stumbled forward and found that it was an abandoned town, with the embers of the campfire still glowing slightly. 【Game Features】 
❄Town Construction❄ 
As a survivor of Dongdong Town, the red panda needs to light the furnace to fight the extreme cold, and at the same time open up fields and farms to store food to withstand the long cold winter and sudden snowstorms. ❄Food Business❄ 
Run a warm gourmet restaurant and use delicious food to heal the animal survivors gathered in the town. After a cold day, hot food makes every little animal feel happy. ❄动物居民❄
 As the town develops, more and more animal survivors gather in the town. These animals not only actively participate in the construction of the town, but also form deep relationships here, and they begin to thrive in this frozen apocalypse. ❄Alternation of day and night❄ 
The alternation of day and night in the winter town brings temperature changes, and the animal residents in the town will also arrange their own lives accordingly. ❄Weather System❄ 
There are not only cold flurries and blizzards in the town, but also sunny and rainy days. When the temperature rises, the snow on buildings and plants will gradually melt and become more suitable for survival. Take advantage of this time to grow your town.

The idea for the game comes from a variety show called Container Blind Box and the search-and-defense game Operation Delta. 
What would happen if the east building manager’s room card was obtained through bidding? 
if: 
Feng Yi’s skill is to be able to see the picture on the table 
Uluru's skill is the ability to see the outlines of items in the safe 
Luna's skill is to be able to see the number of items in the safe 
Weilong's skill is to be able to see whether there are red quality collections in the entire room 
Red Wolf's skill is to be able to see the number of all collections in the room 
Zoya's skill is to know the average price of each grid of items in the room. 
… 
Knowing this information, if the room card is auctioned, who will get the reward?
desc-785213:
The core gameplay of BidKing is a multiplayer strategy game + collectible collection game. 
There are many characters in the game, each of which has its own different skills based on past experiences, which can be used to obtain more information when bidding. 
During the game, each bidding round is a game of wisdom. The game uses a secret auction mode, relying on other players' skills and bidding information plus the intelligence they know to make bids. Through rounds of bidding, the collections in the auction are valued, so as to achieve the purpose of winning the collection with the lowest bid. 
Of course, the game is not just about winning at a low price. If you are smart, you can also choose to provide false information and let other players spend much higher than the market price to buy the collection under the wrong information. This reduces your own losses and makes other players spend more. This is also a moment to show your wisdom. 
The auction field is full of intrigues and intrigues. Who is the real king of the auction?
devnote-804380:
Hello fellow Taoists: 
We know that you are tired of the same "automatic path finding", tired of the "combat strength competition" with piled values, and tired of the "immortal life" pushed by the plot. What you want is a warm practice that is truly yours. 
So, in this world: 
You can "hang up". Don't be tight all the time. Open up a spiritual field and watch the seven-star grass sprout in the moonlight; sit in front of your own cave and watch the sea of ​​clouds billow and the sun rise and the moon set. Hanging up is not about being lazy, but about allowing time to accumulate cultivation and insights in your world. 
You can "create". There is no set “graduation gear.” You can temper a piece of mortal iron with the true fire of Samadhi, merge it with a ray of thunder spirit captured by chance, and then enlighten an ignorant weapon spirit to it - in the end, a natal magic weapon is born that is unique in the server and is connected to your mind. Your imagination is the most powerful weapon refining technique. 
You can "chance". On the road of cultivating immortality, magic pills, magic weapons and equipment, magic techniques and Taoist methods, heavenly materials and earthly treasures are all placed and hung up, accompanied by opportunities. 
We have abandoned the complicated and bloated daily life. The in-game Buddhist system has no fixed time activities to make everyone more relaxed and free. 
The path to immortality has been opened, waiting for you to come. 
——Sincerely, the development team of "Cultivation of Immortality: Starting from Idle"

"Cultivation of Immortality: Starting from Hanging Up" is a leisurely cultivation game that allows you to hang up, collect treasures in the Buddhist system, and explore secret realms. 
Here you can enjoy the joy of cultivating immortals while idle. The game combines cultivating immortals with placing idle treasures to create a unique, relaxed and free immortal cultivation game. Detailed introduction to game play 
[Place AFK to cultivate immortality and gain treasure] 
Relax and leisure, you can hang up offline, and your cultivation level will increase automatically. It is actually a magical tool for fishing and cultivating immortality at work. 
Place it to collect vegetables, collect treasures and raise pets, simplifying the operation. You only need to enjoy the fun of getting stronger and collecting treasures. 
Freely collect treasures, and various magic weapons, fairy skills, and demon pets will be randomly dropped. 
There are no scheduled activities and tasks, allowing you to play as you go and practice Buddhism. [Demon Pet Fusion and Mutation Cultivation] 
Capture, cultivate, and fuse to create a wild beast that belongs only to you. 
Capture various monsters, each with unique blood and skills. 
Put two demon pets into the fusion spirit array, and there is a chance that a new fusion mutant beast will be born and inherited. 
Combining strategy with bloodline, you can cultivate the best partner with all-around combat, support and control. [Freely choose the school of cultivating immortals] 
Freely convert between classic sword cultivation, alchemy cultivation, talisman cultivation and other schools. 
Each genre has its own unique magic weapons, equipment, and magical skills that can be freely matched. 
After ascension, you can cultivate demons and immortals, it is your choice. [Freely join the Immortal Cultivation Sect] 
Freely choose your orthodoxy: there is no strongest, only the most suitable. Each sect can learn different sideline routes to immortality. 
Hehuan Sect: Working together as one heart, deep love leads to deep love. 
Alchemy Pavilion: One cauldron and one furnace to refine the essence of heaven and earth. 
Soul Palace: Control the soul and drive away ghosts, walking in the realm of yin and yang. 
Divine Forging Sect: Refining weapons with ingenuity to create immortal weapons. 
Medicine King Gate: Nourishes all things and understands the origin of life. 
Your choices determine how you socialize, grow and fight. [Create your own magical skills] 
Infinite Creation: Your way, you define it 
Break through the limitations of skill books and become a true "creator". 
Self-created magic system: Integrate the basic five elements rules, invest your understanding, and randomly generate unique and exclusive skills. Skill names, special effects, and effects are all determined by the birth process, and can be shared, rated, and traded in the ghost market. 
Deep magic weapon refining: Each piece of equipment has random affixes. You can lock rare attributes, recast the rest, and through strategic cultivation, create a graduation artifact that perfectly fits your build. [There are many other gameplays waiting for you to experience] 
Immortal Ghost Market: All transactions are missed in the Immortal Ghost Market. 
Create magic weapons: In addition to dropping them accidentally, you can also refine weapons to create the best magic weapons. 
Immortal cultivation: reclaim spiritual fields, plant rare medicinal materials, trigger spiritual plant mutations, and harvest high-level materials. 
All-purpose workshop: From refining basic elixirs to forging natal magic weapons, all outputs can be used for personal use or participated in ghost market transactions.

desc-228050:
"Rebuild Survival Camp" goes deep into the ultimate RPG adventure. In "Rebuild Survival Camp", you can experience the comprehensive intersection of farm farming, animal husbandry, simulated management, AFK, and card strategy management in the post-apocalyptic world. 
This is not a short escape, but a journey about how to manage and rebuild your home, how to survive for a long time, and how to build a home in the apocalypse. In an apocalyptic world where zombies are rampant and civilization collapses, survival is no longer just about living for one day, but about fighting for resources, home, and the future every day. 
In the ever-approaching apocalyptic threat, you will ensure your own survival step by step through simulated management, placement growth and strategic battles, and allow the survivors to continue their hope. In an apocalyptic environment full of zombies and mutant threats, survival is not only a challenge - 
Your core mission is to build and operate a shelter and farm, create a home that can survive for a long time, unite survivors in the apocalypse, and cultivate your team of survivors. ——Your doomsday survival guide——※ Attractive plot and continuous survival adventure 
In "Rebuild Survival Camp", you will be immersed in an RPG adventure that revolves around survival and apocalyptic choices. 
The world has collapsed, but survival continues. The beginning of every day is a new survival test, forcing you to think about how to manage resources, how to develop your home, and how to continue your life in the apocalypse. 
Survival is not just exploration, but also choice, an adventure that paves the way for the future in the apocalypse. ※ Master the key to survival, management and manufacturing 
Real survival comes from simulated management and long-term planning. 
Use the unique abilities of survivors to run your farm, manage resources, and arrange production so that your home can continue to operate in the apocalypse. 
More than a hundred kinds of production and development content allow you to continuously grow between survival and management, from a simple shelter to a self-sufficient survival base. ※ Survival cycle of idle growth and resource collection 
In a cruel apocalyptic world, survival is a long-distance race. 
Through the placement growth system, even if you leave temporarily, the farm is still operating, resources continue to be collected, and the home continues to develop. 
This is a rhythm designed for long-term survival, so that every time you return, you can feel the accumulation and progress of survival. ※ Card development and strategic battle 
When survival is threatened, battle is inevitable. 
Cultivate survivors through the card development system, form a team, and face zombies and apocalyptic threats at critical moments. 
Fighting is not just confrontation, but also a necessary action to protect resources, protect homeland, and protect the results of survival. ※ Home construction and doomsday management 
Your refuge is more than a fortress, it is your home in the end times. 
Build facilities, upgrade technology, and expand farms and production chains to make survival no longer just a hand-to-mouth existence, but to truly take root in the apocalyptic world. 
Every construction is to make survival more stable; every operation is to ensure the continuation of the future. In summary, "Rebuild Survival Camp" is a doomsday RPG with an apocalyptic art style that integrates simulated management, placement growth, farm development, card development and strategic combat. 
In this apocalyptic world, survival is not a short-term miracle, but a step-by-step achievement achieved through management, construction, and growth. Every sunrise is another proof of survival; 
Every resource collection, every construction, every battle is to survive longer and better in the apocalypse. 
In "Rebuild Survival Camp", survival itself is your ultimate goal and glory.
desc-793726: Players will play the role of HR, recruiting talents and managing employees for the company. They need to resolve various incidents among employees and arrange various activities within the company, with the core goal of continuously improving their professional level and competing for industry honors. ⭐Know people with a keen eye and a sharp eye: Faced with a mountain of resumes, can you see through the moisture under the packaging at a glance, or are you blinded by the rhetoric of the "face tyrants"? Every interview is a psychological game. You need to use sharp questions to explore the candidate's true abilities and personality. ⭐Team management, the way to balance: It is easy to recruit people but difficult to retain them. Do employees want a raise, promotion, or fishing? You need to weigh company budget against employee satisfaction, and find a delicate balance between cold performance reviews and warm humanistic care. Be careful, pressing too hard may lead to employee dissatisfaction or even resignation! ⭐Diverse situations in the workplace, authentically restored: From the ignorant newbie who just graduated to the veteran in the workplace, from the technical master to the fishing master, each character has a unique personality and background story. You need to deal with various emergencies: internal strife among employees, poaching of core members, and even office romances... ⭐Company growth and legendary achievements: As your career level increases, you will unlock more permissions, expand the company's scale, participate in industry award selections, and ultimately build an unknown startup company into a unicorn company that attracts world attention. The current version is mainly for the display experience of recruitment gameplay and core processes. It will be continuously improved and supplemented with new interesting gameplay and game content in the future. We look forward to your continued attention~

desc-823768:
Based on Journey to the West, it reshapes a fair turn-based mobile game that puts strategy first. 
Cross-level synthesis of divine pets and free skill matching make the battle brain-burning and changeable, with strategy as the main focus and numerical values as the supplement; 
The Chinese style ink scenes are delicate and beautiful, and the silky combat + hosting hang-up make it easy to develop without losing depth. 
Fine polishing allows civilians to enjoy the game, recreating a new chapter of Journey to the West in fairness and game! [The eight sects have very different styles and complementary divisions of labor] 
Tiance, Dragon Palace, Xuanyuan, Putuo, Ten Thousand Beasts, Fire Cloud, Hades, and Fangcun all show their strengths 
Insight into the enemy's lineup, layout of skill rhythm, and smart defense against the enemy are the keys to victory. [Synthesis of divine pets, free skill matching] 
Make the battle brain-burning and varied, and the multi-dimensional development system covers characters, pets, partners, mounts, etc. 
There are rich competitive gameplays, including rankings in the arena, gang battles, and cross-server heroes competing. Every game has a full sense of accomplishment. [Heroes compete in martial arts, open social gameplay] 
Three major turn-based social gameplays - forming a bond to share rewards and receive gifts, forming a bond to unlock title skills and increase friendship, 
Participate in cross-server competitions as a single player or in a team, and experience the fun of fighting together while improving your personal abilities in gang hegemony. 
Only by defeating the enemy with wisdom and winning by planning can one truly control the situation of the battle.
devnote-823768:
Hello fellow gamers! We are the R&D team of "Fantasy Stones Official Edition", a group of gamers who have been deeply involved in turn-based games for many years and have always loved the theme of Journey to the West. 
The original intention of making this game is very simple - what was once a pure strategic game has gradually turned into a pile of numerical values. So we made up our minds to create a Westward Journey turn-based mobile game that is truly fair and truly focuses on strategy and supplemented by numerical values. 
During the development time, we repeatedly debugged the numerical balance to make the core resources available for free, open up free auction transactions, so that every player's efforts can be rewarded; we polished the skill system of the eight sects, so that each sect has an irreplaceable role, so that the lineup matching, skill release, and position layout, Becoming the key to deciding the battle situation; we have deeply cultivated and played the game. We have not only developed a multi-dimensional development path to meet everyone's needs for creating exclusive characters and pets, but also created a variety of gameplay methods such as idle, advanced challenges, team BOSS, etc., taking into account the relaxed experience and strategic depth, so that office workers can easily keep up with the rhythm. 
The Chinese-style ink scenes and silky combat experience embody our care in every detail, and every adjustment stems from our awe for the players. We know that a good game is never made by the developer, but by the players. 
Finally, I would like to thank every player who is willing to stop. I hope that "Dream Stones Official Edition" can become a turn-based mobile game that you are satisfied with. I hope that we can work together in this journey to the West, using wisdom as the blade and strategy as the armor, to write a new chapter of our own Journey to the West.
desc-826484:
The first intangible cultural heritage Nüshu fantasy puzzle game, using the world's only female script "Nüshu" as the key, it falls into a strange puzzle and reveals the truth behind the singing hall. 
Lin Xiao, an ordinary college student, accidentally stepped into a strange and unpredictable world. 
The place is covered with red silk and decorated with phoenix crowns and harems - it not only forces all the intruders to pretend to be brides to be married, but also blocks their way. What kind of truth is hidden under this strange contradiction between red and white? 
There are undercurrents surging in the crisis-ridden "Zi Ge Tang". Are "them" surrounding them enemies or friends? 
Who created this isolated world of Nu Shu with his own hands? 
Who is it, always guarding silently in the invisible place? 
The right and wrong of all this is just for you to personally enter the game and feel it carefully.
devnote-826484:
Unwilling to have the intangible cultural heritage "Nvshu" just stay on display cabinets, we decided to make a cross-border game to showcase the magical charm of the only female writing in the world. 
Hello everyone, we are the development team of "Ziugetang". From "intangible cultural heritage practitioners" + "game enthusiasts" to "intangible cultural heritage game developers", it is simply a gamble of "asking for trouble". Nonetheless, we started. 
At the beginning of the project, we reached a consensus: to make "Nüshu" the core gameplay of our game! But it’s not easy. We have meetings to polish the script, repeatedly revise and improve the core gameplay and puzzle logic, and then seek help from fairy painters everywhere for art performance... We fell countless times on the balance beam of "cultural richness" and "game fun", and overturned countless times. In this process, whether it is worth it is no longer what we consider. Whether it is fun, interesting, and whether we can let everyone know "them" is what we are more concerned about. 
Everyone can still experience the fun of traditional Chinese puzzle solving in this game, but on this basis, we have made the phonetic characteristics of "Nüshu" the core mechanism. We hope that when you face a character pronounced "ming" in the game, what you decipher is not only the mechanism of using it as "ming" to light a lamp, or as "ming" to make sounds, but also the survival wisdom that women of that era passed on to each other in the darkness. 
"Sitting in the Song Hall" is our first work. It must be a little green and may not be perfect yet. But it is filled with our love for Chinese suspense and our awe for intangible cultural heritage. 
The game is still in an intense development and polishing period, and we really need your suggestions! Please leave your thoughts in the comment area without hesitation, and I also implore everyone to click on the precious [Reservation]. This will be the most powerful motivation for us two cross-border dream chasers! 🔥
desc-832799:
Hero Defense is a text-based card placement mobile game with a deep sea theme. It uses minimalist and impactful two-dimensional graphics, striving to restore the magnificent steel duel within a few inches. 
The game is set in the apocalyptic ocean after the global energy crisis and the Great Depression. It uses the intricate game of the major forces as an entry point to lead you to experience the ultimate romance of the era of battleships and giant guns. As the selected "commander", you will control the core battleship that carries humanity's last hope, command various ace fighters that are transformed into powerful "generals", and open up a path for survival in the gap between the Empire and the Federation. Will he be a watchman maintaining order, or a careerist exacerbating unrest? The future of mankind depends on your thoughts.
