devnote-198290:
Hi we are "Wings of Light Studio"! 
After several years of hard work, our first game is officially released! This is a tribute to the classic tower defense game, inspired by the addictive TD map in "Warcraft 3" and the refreshing combat experience of the "Orcs Must Die" series. When we were students, these games brought us countless joys and quietly planted the seeds of our dream of "making a game of our own." Initially, this was just my "obsession" - a programmer trying to use code to recreate the happiness in memory. But I soon discovered that independent development is far more than just writing logic: planning, art, special effects, music... every link is a new challenge. Fortunately, I met many like-minded partners along the way. Their joining gradually warmed up this small team, and also made the game slowly change from "functioning" to "interesting". The development process was like a long adventure: we experienced the madness of adjusting values ​​all night long, and we also experienced anxiety and helplessness in front of resource and capacity bottlenecks. But every time we see characters moving on the screen and special effects exploding when traps are triggered, that kind of pure joy always makes us grip the mouse again. "Make a game that you want to play" - this simple idea has supported us to this day. As a small independent team, we know that the game still has many shortcomings: the gameplay may not be mature enough, and the art resources are also a little green. But every design embodies our love for tower defense games, and every optimization is the sincerity of the team after repeated arguments. If you can feel this sincerity when playing, and are even willing to give us suggestions (or make complaints), it will be our greatest happiness. Thank you to everyone who supports us - every download and every piece of feedback you give us is the light that illuminates our progress.
desc-198290: "Tower War" is a Roguelike action tower defense game. Here, you will experience the dual fun of hero control and tower defense construction, create a unique combat system through strategic combination, and open a new battlefield of human-tower collaboration!
desc-840877:

devnote-820664:
Hello fellow Taoists, I am Leng Chihaitu, the chief planner of "Dream New Zhu Xian: Enjoy Lightness". Although the Spring Festival has passed, I still want to say a belated Happy New Year to everyone~ 
When we first met, everyone must have felt very strange to me. In the days to come, I will work with fellow Taoists to accompany the development process of this new product. 
As a game planner who has been in the game industry for so many years, I have always loved the turn-based MMO game category. 
But what is intriguing is that as game designers, we find that gradually we ourselves are trapped in a wall - a wall made of "industry standards", "successful templates" and "paid models". Therefore, players "pretend to be happy" inside the wall, and we "pretend to be innovative" outside the wall. 
The reason why we made "Dream New Zhu Xian: Enjoy Lightly" is to tear down this wall with our own hands and return the game to its original intention - relaxation and enjoyment. 
To achieve this goal, we decided to make some changes that "go against the ancestral teachings." These changes are no longer patchwork, but a redefinition of the underlying layer: 
1. Violating the ancestral motto of “selling value”: Let transactions and output return to players 
In the light enjoyment, the official axed mall will no longer sell values. We have streamlined the development system to the extreme. Equipment no longer relies on tedious crafting, but is all dropped through gameplay; mounts will also return to their essential appearance and will no longer be tied to combat capabilities. More importantly, we have opened up true free transactions, so that fellow Taoists can get what they need in a fair environment and enjoy it easily. 
2. Violation of the ancestral motto of "rolling server levels": all people will be permanently 69, and the season will be restarted 
In order to completely eliminate everyone's anxiety of "not keeping up with the team", we will adopt a permanent level 69 setting for everyone. The pressure to level up is gone, and the catch-up mechanic is extremely easy. In line with the rhythm of the season system, each season is a gentle restart. No matter when you come back, it is the best time. 
3. Violating the ancestral precepts of the “professional template”: giving you the power of combination 
Less stress doesn’t mean less fun. In Qingxiang, you have the final say on your genre: 
- Variety of schools: Introducing season skills, runes and suits, the same school can evolve into multiple schools, which can be attacked or supplemented, it is up to you to define. 
-Strategic Liberation: All spirit beasts have no level restrictions and have independent talent branches; all fairy friends can be upgraded to the highest quality. Here, victory or defeat depends on your brain combination, not numerical crushing. 
If you could have your life over again, what would you choose? 
In the plot of Qingxiang, we set up the main line of "Rebirth and Zhuxian". This is not only a story, but also a state of mind. We have experienced difficult times here, and we have also had to leave due to the pressure of life. Now, the world has restarted and your destiny is in your own hands. This letter is not only an invitation to test, but also a reunion letter: 
If you have ever thought of those moments of fighting side by side late at night, but were stopped by that "wall"; then, please give Qingxiang a chance, and give us a chance to meet each other again. 
This time, let us use the most relaxed way to relive the purest time of cultivating immortality.

We will maintain our original intention, but we will not maintain our initial speed. We are currently undergoing intensive development. In the future, we will release the energy we have accumulated for many years to the market as soon as possible. Please continue to pay attention to us ~
devnote-824115:
Welcome to the officially authorized 3D sandbox strategy mobile game "Romance of the Three Kingdoms: King of the World" by Koei Tecmo. 
"Three Kingdoms: King of the World" while inheriting the aesthetics of the classic Three Kingdoms, creates a realistic ancient battlefield from a full 3D perspective. Here, you are not only the lord who strategizes, but you can also personally go into battle and write your own legend in troubled times. [Genuine Authorization] Express the graphics and attribute settings of Koei Tecmo's classic "Romance of the Three Kingdoms" series through next-generation 3D quality. From Lu Bu's feathers to the bricks and tiles of the Tongque Terrace, every detail can withstand magnified scrutiny and take you back to the dreamlike late Han Dynasty. [Self-reliance as a general] Breaking SLG's tradition of only being a "spectator", players can personally go into battle as the lord. They can customize their expertise, mentorship, and attribute growth to become a variable on the battlefield and fight side by side with famous historical generals such as Guan Yu and Zhao Yun. This time, history will not only be witnessed by you, but also performed by you personally. [Deploy formations to defeat the enemy] Reject mindless numerical collisions and introduce "pre-battle formations" and more mid-battle mechanisms. Cavalry flank raids, arrow tower highland suppression...the outcome of a battle is often determined by the formation and combination of troops before the battle begins. It is not only necessary to fight for military strength, but also to fight for the understanding and prediction of war. [Reduce Liver and Reduce Burden] Greatly simplify the tedious paving and siege operations, while retaining the core strategic game. Don’t force yourself to be too aggressive, and don’t force yourself to spend too much time, allowing players to spend their precious time on real tactical thinking and collaboration with allies. [Stories of Mountains and Rivers] The big map is not only a battlefield, but also a living "Stories of Landscapes". You can explore the mountains and rivers of Jiuzhou, search for hidden celebrities, collect anecdotes from various places, and light up the scenery on the map. In addition to the expedition, feel the depth of humanity and the joy of exploration behind the Eastern War. My lord, please mount your horse. This orthodox Three Kingdoms is waiting for your visit.
desc-824115:
"Romance of the Three Kingdoms: The King of the World" is a new sandbox strategy game originally developed by Chinese people, published by Bilibili Games, and officially authorized by Koei Tecmo. The game has carried out a 3D refresh on the basis of inheriting the painting style of the classic Three Kingdoms. From the general art to the map style, it is all presented with next-generation three-dimensional modeling, striving to bring players a higher-quality Three Kingdoms campaign experience. 
The game adopts a long-term season system operation, and does not sell resources or VIP acceleration. On the premise of retaining the strategic fun of each season, it reduces liver and krypton, and never locks the card. 
In the game, you will play the role of a hero who has just entered the troubled times. You will enhance your own power through training yourself and going into battle to kill enemies, searching and exploring to recruit talents, arranging troops and expanding the city. You will also form alliances with other players and gather alliances to defeat competitors, ultimately win the city battle, and rule the roost in troubled times. [The protagonist personally participates in the battle, immersive single-player growth experience] 
In immersive role-playing, the role-playing of the protagonist is no longer limited to the information column, but has a more dimensional and depth of the protagonist's growth path. The seven-dimensional character constitutes the basic attributes, and expertise learning determines one's own position. As the lord, you can visit any general in the card pool to expand your expertise. Even the orange generals who have not been drawn can learn tactics from them. Expertise covers six major categories. Novices can learn new heroes for early development; if they want high power output, they can learn fighting generals; if they want to strategize, they can learn from Zhuge Liang and learn from Zhuge Liang. There are also dual roles of tank and assistant waiting for you to unlock, making your Three Kingdoms journey more strategic and fun! [3D Renewal Reshapes Classic Three Kingdoms Art] 
Restore the painting style of the classic Three Kingdoms generals, high-definition 3D modeling, and dynamic presentation of all personnel; the pure 3D large map is placed with classic landmarks and landforms. Players can visit the Three Kingdoms scenic spots and historic sites, encounter people's livelihood events, get to know military generals, etc. during exploration. During the exploration process, there are also opportunities to embark on various adventure events, obtain rare treasures, and improve the generals' combat capabilities. [Say goodbye to tediousness, reduce liver burden and return to strategic fun] 
Refuse to clock in to work in the game and use fragmented time to easily gain strategic fun. Minimalist interaction design, automatically paving the way to release your hands, you will have more time to think about how to plan a breakthrough in the battle. Each battle comes with a dynamic battle report system, with double repetitions of animation data, in-depth restoration of the battle process, and the advantages and disadvantages of unit restraint formations are clear at a glance! [Follow your strategy and witness the roar of thousands of troops on the 3D battlefield] 
Dozens of groups of troops can be advanced freely, combined with multi-dimensional strategic occupations, to help alliances win easily in battles. There are also hundreds of military general tactics, including command, assault, tactics, and formations. The strategic value can be directly maxed out, allowing you to strategize and fight decisively thousands of miles away. [Colliding with traditional culture, the unique shadow puppet design takes you to appreciate the Three Kingdoms] 
There are also distinctive tongue fighting and one-on-one gameplay, which combine card battles with shadow puppet performances, allowing you to debate among the scholars under the lantern shadow, appreciate the story of the Three Kingdoms, and be able to run thousands of miles, attend meetings alone, and command millions of soldiers. desc-50224:
"Cold Blade 2" remake 
We are looking for a unique knight-errant for this arena, a fancy work in the martial arts MMO world, a arena that breaks the barriers of traditional MMOs and allows you to farm, pet, build a house, and practice martial arts at the same time. Do you want to come? If you ask me: What else can the martial arts MMO do in 2026? My answer is: farming, fishing, raising pets, building a house, stealing vegetables, being a beggar, working as a catcher, being able to mourn, being able to drive away corpses, building a gang - and then, on the way, practicing martial arts and exploring the inexplicable world. Yes, this is the remake of "Cold Blade 2". A martial arts game that tries to fit the entire world into your mobile phone. In the shadows of swords and swords, there is a passionate world of pleasure and hatred; where the smoke curls up, there is a world of fireworks and farming and raising pets. It's up to you to decide what kind of person you want to be. This world is never a single-choice question. PVP · Fighting with others is endless fun [1v1·The Peak of Swordsmanship] 
There is no professional suppression, no numerical crushing. Every move and style you practice is done by yourself. Whose sword is faster, whose punch is harder, whose will breaks down first - you will know after fighting. The winner will be famous all over the world, and the loser will go back and practice again. Fairness is the only rule here. 【3v3·Team Life and Death】 
Call on your most trusted brothers, or get randomly matched with three strangers. You can speak and cooperate with each other. At the moment when the swords cross, you will know who is worthy of entrusting your back. Some people attack, some support, and some lure the enemy deeper - a true tacit understanding, no need to discuss in advance. This is the Jianghu version of the "Three Talents Formation". Only those who survive are qualified to speak. 【5v5·Five Elements Flag】 
When three people are not enough, five people make the trip. Metal, wood, water, fire and earth, five positions and five ways of playing. What you need is no longer just tacit understanding, but tactics - who starts the team first, who goes around to cut the crispy skin, and who protects the back row. This is no longer a street fight, this is a real martial arts fight. Five people, with one heart, the five people on the opposite side are your life and death enemies. 【10v10·Ambush from Flying Daggers】 
If 5v5 is a martial arts competition, then 10v10 is a small war. Ten people versus ten people, one map, three resource points. You need to divide your troops to guard, attack in the east and attack in the west, and lure the enemy to penetrate deeper. Some people are responsible for frontal violence, some are responsible for flank harassment, and some are responsible for stealing homes. This is not the heroism of one person, this is the life and death of ten people. The moment all ten of you shout "Come on" at the same time - you will know what it means to be a brother. [Confrontation of Heavenly Punishment·Fierce Battle and Adventure] 
In the natural punishment gameplay, the exclusive map is random, the weather is random, and there will be system NPC forces that will interfere with the situation. You may be fighting with the enemy, and suddenly a team of city guards rushes in and kills everyone on sight. There are no rules, no referees, and no resurrection - only the person who survives to the end is qualified to lick the bag. [Gang war·100 people on the same screen] 
How can you bear it when your gang is bullied to its core? When a rival gang plants a flag on your territory to provoke you, will you be able to join? 
Hundreds of people are on the same screen, thousands of people are fighting in a melee, and the server is trembling. This is not a drill, this is a real feud. The attacker must break through three gates, and the defender must defend three passes. An arrow pierces the clouds, brothers come to meet each other, and with a command from the commander, everyone rushes in the same direction like a tide - at that moment, you are not fighting alone. [Wild · Gratitude and hatred] 
The most exciting battles always happen in the wild. 
You are escorting the escort, and suddenly a group of people rush out to snatch the escort. Are you fighting or fleeing? You were fighting a BOSS, and someone stole your last knife. Will you swallow this breath, or will you write down your ID and chase him across the map to the death? 
The grievances and grievances in the Jianghu can only be resolved in the Jianghu way. Today you kill my brother, tomorrow I will lead people to block your door; today you rob my boss, tomorrow I will squat on you for three days and three nights. This is the real world of Jianghu - revenge must be taken when there is a grudge, and grudges can be gratified and grudges are happy. PVE · Fighting with the sky, the fun is endless [Wild leader·heroes competing] 
Deep mountains and forests, desperate cliffs, hide real unparalleled ferocious beasts. Each BOSS is enough for you to drink a pot. But the real excitement is not the BOSS itself, but the people who fight against the BOSS with you. You may have to compete with other teams for ownership rights, or you may have to guard against someone stabbing you in the back. Every time the wild leader is refreshed, it is a drama without a script. [Team Copy·Life and Death] 
A single person can act arbitrarily and hold up a whole world. Three-person version, five-person version, ten-person version, twenty-person group version—the further you go, the more ferocious the monsters and the more dangerous the mechanisms. If someone makes a mistake in positioning, the whole group may have to start over; if someone takes a greedy move, the whole group may be wiped out. But when you finally defeat the final BOSS and look at the sparkling equipment, the sense of accomplishment of collecting treasures comes to your heart instantly. [Reward for capture·Chasing the murderer thousands of miles] 
The world is not peaceful, and reward orders are issued every day. There are criminal thieves, there are flower-picking thieves, and there are government officials who have defected. If you accept the bounty order, you will become a bounty hunter in the world. You need tracking, reasoning, and squatting. When you finally find your target in a ruined temple and the swords are facing each other - you are not completing a mission, you are acting in a martial arts movie. [Martial Arts Comprehension·Unity of Heaven and Man] 
There are not only fights in the arena, but also retreats. Find an inaccessible waterfall or an ancient pine tree on the edge of a cliff, sit cross-legged and meditate on martial arts. You may suddenly have an epiphany and use an ordinary set of Taizu Changquan to produce peerless magical effects; or you may have a flash of inspiration and create your own unique skill that will be handed down from generation to generation. Real peerless masters are never created by hard work, but by studying in seclusion. Of course, if you are tired of playing - the other side of this world is the smoke from the kitchen, the diversity of life and occupation, and the daily recuperation. Life and career · The other side of the world [Descendants of the Beggar Gang·Beggars] 
Don't want to work hard anymore? Then lie down. Squatting at the city gate, under the bridge, or outside the inn, begging for money from passing players. If you're lucky, you can pay for a meal a day; if you're unlucky, you might get beaten up by your peers. But what you don't know is that there is a true and peerless master among the beggars - what if he likes you and teaches you a set of high-level skills? [Unselfish·Catcher] 
Join the Six Doors and become a traveling agent. Hunt down famous players and maintain order in the world. If you catch a criminal thief, you will be rewarded with a hundred taels of silver, and you will also be known as "the selfless" in the world. But be careful - the person you capture may also kill you. 【Night Walker·Snitch】 
Practice light skills well, wear night clothes, and select those extremely rich players to attack. If you steal the best equipment, you can use it yourself, sell it for money, or return it to the owner to extort money. But the owner may also have set a trap for you to fall into. [On the edge of life and death·The corpse chaser] 
This is a career you can’t even imagine. Learn the secret technique of driving away corpses, and you can drive away any annoying player corpses for entertainment, and you can even whip corpses to dig for treasures. [Professional mourning · mourning ghost] 
People die every day in the world. Some people die in frustration, and some people die in glory. What you need to do is cry out the level, the emotion, and the price of two taels of silver in front of his corpse. If you cry well, your master will reward you; if you cry falsely, you may be beaten. If you can cry to the point where your heart is broken, you might even be able to understand a strange skill. 【Pastoral Pastoral·Farmer】 
Tired of fighting and killing? Then open up a piece of wasteland, grow vegetables and fish, and be self-sufficient. You can sell your food to restaurants in the city, or you can make lunch boxes yourself and sell them to players who are too lazy to cook. Even - you can secretly water your competitors' vegetable fields and harvest them secretly when they are mature. [Xuan Hu Ji Shi·Veterinary Medicine] 
Not only people are injured in the arena, but pets are also injured. Learn a veterinary skill to treat the player's pet mount. After curing a priceless war pet, the owner may be happy and give you a unique secret book. [Sit back and enjoy the success·Charterer] 
Work hard to make money, save enough materials, and build a big house in a geomantic place. The extra rooms are rented to newcomers who have no place to live, and the rent is charged on a monthly basis. You can even open a teahouse in the yard and watch the world while drinking tea. In this world, there is always a way to live the way you want. The world is so big, there is always a way to live, which is what you want. Economic System · Free Trading In the economic system of "Cold Blade 2", we have a very simple belief: what you create is yours. 【Face-to-face system】 
Who you want to sell it to, how much rice you want to sell, or give it to your brothers for free - it's all up to you. There are no restrictions, no such disgusting settings as "permanently bound after transaction". 【Stall setting system】 
Want to set up a street stall in the main city? Find an open space, spread a piece of cloth, put things up, and open it. You can yell at the top of your lungs, or you can pretend to be cool and wait for the willing person to take the bait. Players passing by can bargain or exchange items. This is the real "fireworks in the world" - there are beggars at the city gate begging for money, vendors on the street shouting, and snitches in the crowd waiting for opportunities. 【Treasure Pavilion】 
Some transactions require a middleman. If you want to sell top-quality resources, if you want to trade high-end equipment, if you can't trust passers-by - then go to the Treasure Hall. Official guarantee, safe and reliable, and the handling fee is super reasonable. This is the real Jianghu economy - not cold numbers, but living people's hearts. Social System · The world is a long one, and there is always someone to walk with. It’s so lonely. So we do a lot – so you can find the “right person.” [Brothers' sworn homage·Jinlan contract] 
Call your most loyal brothers, find a place with beautiful scenery, set up an incense table, cut off the chicken heads, and burn yellow paper. The emperor and heaven are above, and the thick soil is proof. Today we are brothers with different surnames. From now on, we will share blessings and share hardships. 
From now on, there is a golden suffix behind your ID - "Jie Jie Jinlan". You have your own channel and your own skills. When you are bullied, just shout "Brothers, someone is touching me" in the channel, and the whole world will know what it means to be a brother. The more sworn brothers you have, the stronger the bond skills you can unlock. Someone will block the knife for you, someone will help you increase your health, and someone will work with you to amplify your moves. 
But if one day, someone betrays his brother and turns against him. Then you have to go to the place where you swore your sworn vows and cut off your robes and sever all ties of kindness in front of everyone in the world. From now on, we will see each other again as passers-by or enemies. [Blue Yan/Red Yan·Long Love in Jianghu] 
There are not only swords and swords in the world, but also the love between children. The person who gave you medicine when you were seriously injured, the person who ran with you across three mountains when you were being chased, the person who quietly threw you a piece of silver when you were a beggar and then turned around and ran away. 
You can hand him/her a message: "I would like to become close friends with you." If the other party accepts the message, you will have a special identity. You can give each other tokens, unlock exclusive hidden secrets for two people, and even have an "exclusive nest" for just the two of you. Once this feeling is recognized, flowers and fireworks will fill the screen, and players all over the city will bless it. 
A confidant is someone you can trust, someone you can talk to late at night, and someone who will never dislike you no matter what you become. 
If one day, you want to go further - then go to Jianghu Yuelao Hall and ask for a red rope. But if you want unfettered freedom and someone to accompany you, then it's also good to be a pair of confidants. The companionship of wandering around the world is more pleasurable than the bondage. Someone asked: What is Jianghu? Some people say that the rivers and lakes are like a golden horse and an iron horse, and they can swallow up thousands of miles like a tiger. It means killing one person in ten steps and leaving no trace in a thousand miles. Some people also say that the rivers and lakes are like placing white deer among the green cliffs, and riding to visit famous mountains as soon as possible. It's a banquet with a banquet, where people talk about wine and mulberry. And we say: Jianghu is the version of yourself you want to be. It is the light of the sword and the shadow of the sword, and it is also a cup of tea. It's a bloody battle with hundreds of people on the same screen, and it's also one person's moonlight enlightenment. It’s the thundering cries of gang wars and the chirping of insects and birds on the field ridges. It was a life-and-death battle at the pinnacle of swordsmanship, and it was also a heart-wrenching cry in front of the grave. Some people are fighting swords in the world, enjoying their grudges; some are retreating to the countryside, raising pets and planting flowers; some are ups and downs in the business world, and are as rich as the enemy; some are here to teach and live their lives like fireworks. The world is so big, there is always a way to live, which is what you want. The world is so small, so small that no matter what you choose, you will eventually return to the place called "home". There is a pot of warm wine, a light on, and someone waiting for you. Martial arts never grow old, and the world is still young. Whether you are a knight in the shadow of swords or a mortal in the smoke - there is always a place for you here.

devnote-50224:
If you see a mobile game written like this on this day in 2026: "We don't have a job lock - if you want to practice swordsmanship, you can practice swordsmanship, if you want to learn boxing, you can learn boxing, be a swordsman today, a concealed weapon expert tomorrow, whatever." "We have no daily tasks - you won't fall behind if you don't go online, and you can come back anytime you want. You don't have to clock in like you are at work." "We don't have one-click sweeps - you have to run through every mountain in person, Fight every monster on your own. "We don't have any level of suppression - whether you are strong or not depends on what kind of martial arts you have practiced and what level you are at." "We don't have any trading restrictions - you want to buy and resell the best equipment for free?" "We only have pure swords." What was your first reaction when you saw this? Stop pretending, I’ll say it for you: “It’s 2026, and here comes another pie-in-the-sky guy.” “Isn’t this the standard tactic used by manufacturers before running away? Rush online and shut down the server in two months.” “If you don’t have this and that, then how do you make money? There must be a hidden pit, right?” “Do you really think we are leeks?” Yes, we all understand these reactions. Because we are gamers, we have been tricked countless times ourselves. So today I won’t pretend to be arrogant or make a big deal, but I will just say a few human words. 1. Let’s talk about money first – we don’t pretend to be saints 
"Cold Blade 2" will have monthly cards and battle orders. But every penny spent in the mall can't buy even the slightest value. If you recharge your monthly card, you won't have 1 more attack power than others. 
Your krypton battle order will not give you one more defense point than others. 
No matter how much money you spend, you can't become stronger with just one click. All the things that affect your strength - equipment, martial arts, materials - are all in the world, and you have to earn them with your own hands. What does the monthly card sell for? The package grid is a little bigger (but you can solve it by building a few more trumpets), the appearance is a little better (purely ugly, no attributes, you can buy it or not), the teleportation is a little cheaper (but you can also use Qinggong to run the map yourself) and that's it. Poor, right? But that's all we can do. Why do you need a monthly card? Because the team has to pay wages, the server has to pay electricity bills, and operation and maintenance costs money. We can also pat our chests and say "it will always be free, and have a great conscience", and then three months later the server will be shut down, the world will be gone, players will call us liars, and we will run around holding the pie in our hands - that is the real irresponsibility. So we chose this middle path: you can play all the core content without spending a penny; 
You can also spend a little money to support our continued survival. It is not mandatory, it is all voluntary. 2. Let’s talk about the things you hate the most – we don’t do any of them. 
We are very clear about what you hate: we hate the power list, we hate the level suppression → We don’t do the power list, we hate the level suppression → We don’t have the level suppression, we hate the daily life like going to work → We don’t have the daily tasks, we hate the job lock → We don’t have the job restrictions, we hate the one-click sweep that ruins the sense of exploration → We don’t have the one-click sweep, we hate the trading restrictions and equipment binding → We don’t have any trading restrictions, we hate the krypton gold that makes you stronger → We don’t sell any values ​​in our mall. You have been disgusted, we have all experienced it. Therefore, "Cold Blade 2" has set this line from the beginning: money can be made, but the bottom line of value cannot be touched. 3. What can you do in this world? 
Some people want to be heroes, some people want to be a prodigal son, and some people want to be a prodigal son, and some people want to be a profiteer, and make money by turning clouds and rain, some people want to be a farmer, farming and making wine for the rest of their lives, some people just want to wander around the rivers and lakes, riding horses and chasing the sunset. All welcome. You write it all yourself. As developers, we only do one thing: build a world with enough freedom, then shut up and watch your stories happen. 4. Finally, let me be honest. The graphics of "Cold Blade 2" are not top-notch, and are even a bit rough. 
Our technology is not great, and we even have very few manpower. 
But we have a heart that doesn’t want to lie to others. You can say that our production is poor, you can say that we are rustic and whimsical. But please download it and take a look - is this world really like what we said: no numerical value, no hard work, no daily life, no career lock, no one-click automation, only the purest swordsmanship, and the most real warmth and warmth of human beings. We're not perfect, but we don't cheat. Welcome to witness how far a martial arts dream without selling values ​​can go - it all depends on fate, and it all depends on you. "Cold Blade 2" is waiting for you to write your own story

A dark cultivating style idle idle mobile game. Here, you will step into the vast world of immortal cultivation, step by step from a mortal to become an immortal, and finally break through the realm and soar to the sky. You can receive generous income as soon as you go online, and enjoy the fun of cultivating immortality easily. 
[Ultimate combat, billions of damage, automatic spawning of monsters, one-click kill, experience the ultimate feeling of critical hits of tens of millions and damage of hundreds of millions. 3×3 monster grids fight at the same time, with maximum efficiency and resources rolling in. 
[In-depth development, free growth of sixteen-dimensional attributes] 16 core attributes such as attack, defense, critical strike, dodge, and penetration can be developed in an all-round way. Equipment forging, skill training, and body training breakthroughs can create a unique invincible character. 
[Spirit beasts accompany you, and legendary beasts are in your pocket] Collect legendary beasts such as Qinglong, White Tiger, Suzaku, Xuanwu, etc., cultivate your qualifications, and help in battle. desc-737932:
Face sin and save yourself 
Face sin and save yourself. Become the manager of Limbus Company and lead 12 prisoners, 
Enter the closed Lobotomy Corporation branch and retrieve the Golden Bough. ▶ Combination of turn-based RPG and real-time combat 
Exciting quarrels occur simultaneously every moment. 
Combat happens simultaneously, allies and enemies don't wait for their turn. 
In this process, the skills of friendly forces and enemies will collide with each other. This is the so-called sum. 
The outcome of the game is determined by the strength of skills and luck. If you win the game, you can cancel the opponent's skills. 
Choose the right skills to beat the sum. ▶ Simple operation method 
A simple control method that automatically battles by connecting skill icons in sequence. 
Connecting skill icons of the same color can cause more damage to enemies. 
Please feel free to enjoy colorful and stylish battles. ▶ Strategic battle using personality and E.G.O 
Strategic battles that combine personality and E.G.O to create optimal synergy. 
The enemies you will encounter have their own attributes and skill effects. 
Among them, the Abnormality has powerful and terrifying patterns, so it will be difficult to defeat it. 
Know your enemy's weaknesses and use them to combine your personality and E.G.O. to achieve glorious victory. ▶ The world of the moon project 
It continues the unique and interesting Project Moon world view of the previous games "Lobotomy Inc." and "Library of Destruction". 
In a giant dystopian city, you and 12 prisoners set out in search of the Golden Bough. 
I hope you enjoy the various events and fascinating stories along the way. 
All main stories support full Korean voice acting. So good luck to you. manager.
desc-192850:
Single and multiplayer emergency services simulation focused on emergency medical services and fire departments. Check in at an emergency center or fire department and complete unique missions in an open world. Car chases, diagnose life-threatening injuries, and put out deadly fires! 
Each department has its own vehicles and equipment for use while you are on duty. 
Solve world-spanning events in single player, or in multiplayer with friends. emergency center 
As an emergency medical specialist, your job is to keep people safe, treat injured patients and diagnose. Life-saving equipment you'll use includes medical kits, stretchers and ambulances. firefighter 
The fire department does much more than put out the flames, they work closely with medical services on the scene to quickly cut open the wrecked car so that medical personnel can access the injured and deal with the aftermath of the incident, which of course includes extinguishing the fire. Fighting raging blazes and rescuing trapped civilians requires some heavy equipment, including spray guns, fire hoses, fire extinguishers and fire trucks. Multiplayer mode 
Team up with other players online and distribute your team as you please between emergency services. Chase a variety of vehicles in the open world, go where you are needed to help civilians deal with accidents or provide rescue open world 
The map size is 3.5km x 3.5km, emergencies will occur in every corner of the city
devnote-192850:
Dear city defenders, this game is inspired by our cities and life. There will be various dangers and emergencies around us all the time. When danger occurs, firefighters, first responders, etc. are on the front line. As defenders of the city, they protect everyone's safety, maintain urban security, and rescue the wounded. 
Now! We hope that everyone can play their role, changing from the defended to the defender, and protect the city together. Through real professional work processes, everyone can experience the role-playing experience of these professions! We are a relatively small team. Because we are working on the genres and themes we like, we are always highly excited and enthusiastic during the game production and development process. At the same time, we also encountered various technical and planning difficulties. During this period, we also received help from many excellent publishing partners and other developers. Based on their various opinions and ideas, we continued to optimize the game content. The client game version has received support from many players on Steam. We hope that more mobile game players can also experience the fun of this game. While optimizing the client game version, the mobile game version is also being developed simultaneously. We believe that when the mobile game is launched, it will be available to everyone in an optimal state, and at the same time, more career-rich game content will be added. Please also support us. "Dream Journey to the West: Liyou Catastrophe" is a side-scrolling action-adventure mobile game crafted by Dream Studio. 
Fourteen years later, the original intention has not changed, and a new chapter of "Dream Westward Journey 6" has begun again. Based on the exciting side-scrolling combat, it incorporates multiple innovative strategic gameplay, classic images and new characters, inviting you to go on a journey to the west full of unknowns and passion. 
The ancient demon god broke out of the seal, the four demons wreaked havoc in the three realms, and Jiuli's homeland fell. In times of crisis, destiny comes to you! Is it the fighting saint Buddha who wields the golden cudgel and crushes the sky? Or hold the stick to determine the world, cast spells to defeat the enemy and control the field remotely? Thousands of martial arts are in the palm of your hand, and you can combine thousands of magical powers to get rid of the constraints of routines and create unlimited possibilities that belong to you! 
The gods and Buddhas have retreated, and the catastrophe has come - this common people needs you to protect it! 〓The dream of Chinese style painting is really immersive〓 
A new chapter of Dream Journey to the West begins again, with vivid interpretations of classic puppet images, inviting you to step into the flowing fantasy of Journey to the West and appreciate the beautiful scenery from the solitary smoke in the desert to the beginning of the lanterns. 〓Changshuang fighting is so enjoyable〓 
The classic gameplay is timeless and timeless. You can match the character skills as you like, and the combos can be connected smoothly. Each move is up to you. Break the situation calmly and show your combat strategy and operational pleasure! 〓Season development really reduces the burden〓 
The new season setting is easy to develop, you can enter the pit anytime and anywhere, and there is no pressure to catch up with the progress! Conquer various immortal and demon BOSS, fight side by side, and conquer the catastrophe together! 〓The real game of Hunyuan fighting method〓 
Brand-new PVP&PVE strategic gameplay is coming, compete for victory in brain-burning games, and experience an unprecedented light strategy experience! 〓Spiritual pet, true freedom〓 
Accompanied by exotic forest beasts, you can freely cultivate your own individual appearance. Strange beasts from the mountains and seas will accompany you, and you will never be alone on your long journey to the west!
devnote-784072:
Dear Immortal: 
I am grateful to have you by my side during my fourteen-year journey to the west. Since the debut of "Dream Westward Journey" in 2011, we have gone through countless youthful moments with you. From the fierce battle of typing on the keyboard after class to the common growth that spans many years, this journey to the west is not only a game, but also a youthful memory we have woven together with millions of players. 
Thanks to Shangxian for your support and waiting all the way, so that the story of dream-making can continue. From the Lingxiao Palace in the memory to the exotic Dunhuang landscape painted in Chinese style today, 
We always remember those passionate moments when the Immortal transformed into Wukong, wielded a stick to slay demons, and followed Monk Tang on his journey to the West; those days when he stayed up late to fight for dungeons to acquire a favorite piece of equipment, and repeatedly adjusted the configuration of combat power to overcome difficulties. These have long been the marks of our youth engraved in the "dream-making" together with the Immortals. 
In terms of gameplay, we have added more surprises based on the classics. In addition to the original characters, characters such as the Bull Demon King and the Iron Fan Princess will become cultivable partners, allowing everyone to freely experience different fighting styles. The brand-new "Hunyuan Battle" mode brings a season-based strategic competition. Each game only takes ten minutes, and each team can display their special abilities. There is also a unique "Inner Demon Challenge". Players must face themselves and defeat another "self" in order to continue to grow and gain a sense of breakthrough. 
We know very well that the six steps of dream creation are the expectations of the immortals and also our responsibility. During the development process, we repeatedly adjusted the combat impact and constantly optimized the scene details, testing and optimizing with great enthusiasm again and again - just because we want to make the westward journey of "Liyu Catastrophe" worthy of everyone's "dream creation". 
Now, the crisis of Chi You breaking the seal has arrived, and the door to the secret realm of Dunhuang is about to open. "Dream Journey to the West: Liyou Catastrophe" is now officially available for pre-order. I would like to thank everyone for your continued support and love for the Dream IP. 
Journey to the West is never a one-person battle. In the future, we will continue to listen to everyone’s voices, continue to polish the gameplay, and deeply optimize the experience, so that there will always be fresh stories to tell in this journey to the West. I hope that this time, we can reunite with old friends and meet new travelers. In a new chapter of dream-making, we can slay demons and demons in the flying sand and rocks, quell the catastrophe, and continue to write our journey to the west story. "Dream Making Studio"

"Attack Online" 
Love first-person shooters? Craving a fun-filled gaming experience? 
You're in luck! "Fire Line Online" will be able to cover all your needs for first-person shooting games! 
Enjoy realistic graphics and dynamic shooting mechanics. Elite heavily-armed troops clash with brutal bandits...all in the palm of your hand! Play online with your friends and experience first-person PVP gunplay like never before! The CS style that everyone loves to see has become a mobile game! There are several reasons to fall in love with "Strike Online" Eat Chicken: 
✪ 7 combat modes, including single player and multiplayer modes! 
✪ Team! 
✪ Customize your game! Do whatever you want and create your own game rules! 
✪ 14 unique maps, each with its own unique environment and style! 
✪ 50 unique weapon types: pistols, rifles, machine guns, shotguns and more! 
✪ Weapon skins! 
✪ Optimized for low-performance devices! 
✪ Exquisite picture quality comparable to PC! 
✪ Easy and intuitive operation! 
✪ Daily rewards! Play daily to receive free rewards and complete daily tasks! 
✪ Good tactical and strategic thinking, as well as teamwork are the way to win! Find your opponent's weaknesses and win! Main game modes: 
✪ Team battle! 
Two teams compete against each other. Goal: Destroy the enemy! Dominate the battlefield with your friends! ✪ Deathmatch! 
Every man for himself! Only for the most experienced first-person shooter gamers, a dangerous brawl! ✪ Team bomb match! 
It's up to the gangster team to plant the bombs, and it's up to the Special Ops team to stop them! Just like Counter-Strike and CS:GO ✪ Duel Mode! 
1v1 battle to see who is the strongest! On the battlefield, there are only you and your opponent! ✪ SPECIAL OPS! 
Two teams compete on the same field, with only one life in each round. The last surviving team will be victorious ✪ Expert Mode! 
Get ready for an exciting race. Damage X2, no room for error! ✪ Customize your game! 
Create your own game and choose the map/mode you want. Invite friends and create a shooting game lobby that belongs only to you. You can't get any experience points or money from these games, the guns will not be damaged, and the games are not ranked, but you will be able to use grenades and first aid kits. Friendly reminder: join the ranked games to improve your team level! Get bigger rewards with friends! Compete on the leaderboard! Upgrade your armor and weapons, and choose your favorite skin. With optimized game balance, realistic sound and explosion effects, and HD graphics, get ready for an unforgettable gunfight experience. 
The game will regularly provide new maps and weapons for each game mode. A new mobile cooperative shooting game from Russia’s top developer, don’t miss it if you pass by! 
Online first-person shooter inspired by Counter-Strike: Works on mobile devices!
